revision.comment: Auto generating page. date placed far in the past so it is attributed to Immanuelle and FireflyBot sends them messages if it is ever imported to Wikipedia.

revision.text:
{{旧暦10月}} '''旧暦10月10日'''（きゅうれきじゅうがつとおか）は、[[10月 (旧暦)|旧暦10月]]の10日目である。六曜は[[六曜#先勝|先勝]]である。
== できごと == * [[永禄]]10年（[[ユリウス暦]][[1567年]][[11月10日]]） - [[東大寺大仏殿の戦い]]において、[[松永久秀]]の奇襲により[[東大寺大仏殿]]が焼け落ちる。 * [[天正]]5年（[[ユリウス暦]][[1577年]][[11月19日]]） - [[信貴山城の戦い]]において、松永久秀が、名器・[[古天明平蜘蛛]]を打ち壊して自害する。 * [[寛永]]6年（[[グレゴリオ暦]][[1629年]][[11月24日]]） - [[徳川家光]]の乳母・ふくが参内し、[[春日局]]の称号を受ける。
== 誕生日 == * [[元豊 (宋)|元豊]]5年（[[ユリウス暦]][[1082年]][[11月2日]]） - [[徽宗]]、[[北宋]]の8代皇帝（+ [[1135年]]） * [[建保]]6年（ユリウス暦[[1218年]][[10月30日]]） - [[仲恭天皇]]、85代[[天皇]]（+ [[1234年]]） * [[天保]]元年（グレゴリオ暦[[1830年]][[11月24日]]） - [[清河八郎]]、壬生浪士隊（[[新選組]]の前身）結成（+ [[1863年]]） * [[道光]]15年（グレゴリオ暦[[1835年]][[11月29日]]） - [[慈禧太后]]（西太后）、[[清]]朝末期の独裁者・[[咸豊帝]]の側室（+ [[1908年]]） * [[天保]]13年（グレゴリオ暦[[1842年]][[11月12日]]） - [[大山厳]]、陸軍元帥（+ [[1916年]]）
== 忌日 == * [[白雉]]5年（ユリウス暦[[654年]][[11月24日]]） - [[孝徳天皇]]、36代天皇 * [[天正]]5年（グレゴリオ暦[[1577年]][[11月19日]]） - [[松永久秀]]、[[武士]]（* [[1510年]]） * [[宝永]]4年（グレゴリオ暦[[1707年]][[11月3日]]） - [[宇都宮遯庵]]、[[儒学者]]（* [[1633年]]） * [[享保]]4年（グレゴリオ暦[[1719年]][[11月21日]]） - [[山本常朝]]、[[武士]]（* [[1659年]]） * [[延享]]4年（グレゴリオ暦[[1747年]][[11月12日]]） - [[島津吉貴]]、第4代[[薩摩藩]]主（* [[1675年]]）
== 記念日・年中行事 == [[十日夜]]（とおかんや）
== 関連項目 == {{旧暦360日|10|9|10|11|9|10|11|10|1010}}
[[Category:japanese lunar calendar]][[ja:10月10日 (旧暦)]][[Category:qq]]

revision.comment: Immanuelle moved page [[10月10日 (旧暦)]] to [[10th day of the 10th lunar month]]
revision.text:
{{旧暦10月}} '''旧暦10月10日'''（きゅうれきじゅうがつとおか）は、[[10月 (旧暦)|旧暦10月]]の10日目である。六曜は[[六曜#先勝|先勝]]である。
== できごと == * [[永禄]]10年（[[ユリウス暦]][[1567年]][[11月10日]]） - [[東大寺大仏殿の戦い]]において、[[松永久秀]]の奇襲により[[東大寺大仏殿]]が焼け落ちる。 * [[天正]]5年（[[ユリウス暦]][[1577年]][[11月19日]]） - [[信貴山城の戦い]]において、松永久秀が、名器・[[古天明平蜘蛛]]を打ち壊して自害する。 * [[寛永]]6年（[[グレゴリオ暦]][[1629年]][[11月24日]]） - [[徳川家光]]の乳母・ふくが参内し、[[春日局]]の称号を受ける。
== 誕生日 == * [[元豊 (宋)|元豊]]5年（[[ユリウス暦]][[1082年]][[11月2日]]） - [[徽宗]]、[[北宋]]の8代皇帝（+ [[1135年]]） * [[建保]]6年（ユリウス暦[[1218年]][[10月30日]]） - [[仲恭天皇]]、85代[[天皇]]（+ [[1234年]]） * [[天保]]元年（グレゴリオ暦[[1830年]][[11月24日]]） - [[清河八郎]]、壬生浪士隊（[[新選組]]の前身）結成（+ [[1863年]]） * [[道光]]15年（グレゴリオ暦[[1835年]][[11月29日]]） - [[慈禧太后]]（西太后）、[[清]]朝末期の独裁者・[[咸豊帝]]の側室（+ [[1908年]]） * [[天保]]13年（グレゴリオ暦[[1842年]][[11月12日]]） - [[大山厳]]、陸軍元帥（+ [[1916年]]）
== 忌日 == * [[白雉]]5年（ユリウス暦[[654年]][[11月24日]]） - [[孝徳天皇]]、36代天皇 * [[天正]]5年（グレゴリオ暦[[1577年]][[11月19日]]） - [[松永久秀]]、[[武士]]（* [[1510年]]） * [[宝永]]4年（グレゴリオ暦[[1707年]][[11月3日]]） - [[宇都宮遯庵]]、[[儒学者]]（* [[1633年]]） * [[享保]]4年（グレゴリオ暦[[1719年]][[11月21日]]） - [[山本常朝]]、[[武士]]（* [[1659年]]） * [[延享]]4年（グレゴリオ暦[[1747年]][[11月12日]]） - [[島津吉貴]]、第4代[[薩摩藩]]主（* [[1675年]]）
== 記念日・年中行事 == [[十日夜]]（とおかんや）
== 関連項目 == {{旧暦360日|10|9|10|11|9|10|11|10|1010}}
[[Category:japanese lunar calendar]][[ja:10月10日 (旧暦)]][[Category:qq]]

revision.text:
{{旧暦10月}} '''旧暦10月10日'''（きゅうれきじゅうがつとおか）は、[[10月 (旧暦)|旧暦10月]]の10日目である。六曜は[[六曜#先勝|先勝]]である。
== できごと == * [[永禄]]10年（[[ユリウス暦]][[1567年]][[11月10日]]） - [[東大寺大仏殿の戦い]]において、[[松永久秀]]の奇襲により[[東大寺大仏殿]]が焼け落ちる。 * [[天正]]5年（[[ユリウス暦]][[1577年]][[11月19日]]） - [[信貴山城の戦い]]において、松永久秀が、名器・[[古天明平蜘蛛]]を打ち壊して自害する。 * [[寛永]]6年（[[グレゴリオ暦]][[1629年]][[11月24日]]） - [[徳川家光]]の乳母・ふくが参内し、[[春日局]]の称号を受ける。
== 誕生日 == * [[元豊 (宋)|元豊]]5年（[[ユリウス暦]][[1082年]][[11月2日]]） - [[徽宗]]、[[北宋]]の8代皇帝（+ [[1135年]]） * [[建保]]6年（ユリウス暦[[1218年]][[10月30日]]） - [[仲恭天皇]]、85代[[天皇]]（+ [[1234年]]） * [[天保]]元年（グレゴリオ暦[[1830年]][[11月24日]]） - [[清河八郎]]、壬生浪士隊（[[新選組]]の前身）結成（+ [[1863年]]） * [[道光]]15年（グレゴリオ暦[[1835年]][[11月29日]]） - [[慈禧太后]]（西太后）、[[清]]朝末期の独裁者・[[咸豊帝]]の側室（+ [[1908年]]） * [[天保]]13年（グレゴリオ暦[[1842年]][[11月12日]]） - [[大山厳]]、陸軍元帥（+ [[1916年]]）
== 忌日 == * [[白雉]]5年（ユリウス暦[[654年]][[11月24日]]） - [[孝徳天皇]]、36代天皇 * [[天正]]5年（グレゴリオ暦[[1577年]][[11月19日]]） - [[松永久秀]]、[[武士]]（* [[1510年]]） * [[宝永]]4年（グレゴリオ暦[[1707年]][[11月3日]]） - [[宇都宮遯庵]]、[[儒学者]]（* [[1633年]]） * [[享保]]4年（グレゴリオ暦[[1719年]][[11月21日]]） - [[山本常朝]]、[[武士]]（* [[1659年]]） * [[延享]]4年（グレゴリオ暦[[1747年]][[11月12日]]） - [[島津吉貴]]、第4代[[薩摩藩]]主（* [[1675年]]）
== 記念日・年中行事 == [[十日夜]]（とおかんや）
== 関連項目 == {{旧暦360日|10|9|10|11|9|10|11|10|1010}}
[[Category:japanese lunar calendar]][[ja:10月10日 (旧暦)]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:Japanese Lunar Calendar]]

{{Lunar October}} '''Lunar October10日'''（きゅうれきじゅうがつとおか）は、[[10月 (旧暦)|Lunar October]]の10日目である。六曜は[[六曜#先勝|先勝]]である。
== できごと == * [[永禄]]10年（[[ユリウス暦]][[1567年]][[11月10日]]） - [[東大寺大仏殿の戦い]]において、[[松永久秀]]の奇襲により[[東大寺大仏殿]]が焼け落ちる。 * [[天正]]5年（[[ユリウス暦]][[1577年]][[11月19日]]） - [[信貴山城の戦い]]において、松永久秀が、名器・[[古天明平蜘蛛]]を打ち壊して自害する。 * [[寛永]]6年（[[グレゴリオ暦]][[1629年]][[11月24日]]） - [[徳川家光]]の乳母・ふくが参内し、[[春日局]]の称号を受ける。
== 誕生日 == * [[元豊 (宋)|元豊]]5年（[[ユリウス暦]][[1082年]][[11月2日]]） - [[徽宗]]、[[北宋]]の8代皇帝（+ [[1135年]]） * [[建保]]6年（ユリウス暦[[1218年]][[10月30日]]） - [[仲恭天皇]]、85代[[天皇]]（+ [[1234年]]） * [[天保]]元年（グレゴリオ暦[[1830年]][[11月24日]]） - [[清河八郎]]、壬生浪士隊（[[新選組]]の前身）結成（+ [[1863年]]） * [[道光]]15年（グレゴリオ暦[[1835年]][[11月29日]]） - [[慈禧太后]]（西太后）、[[清]]朝末期の独裁者・[[咸豊帝]]の側室（+ [[1908年]]） * [[天保]]13年（グレゴリオ暦[[1842年]][[11月12日]]） - [[大山厳]]、陸軍元帥（+ [[1916年]]）
== 忌日 == * [[白雉]]5年（ユリウス暦[[654年]][[11月24日]]） - [[孝徳天皇]]、36代天皇 * [[天正]]5年（グレゴリオ暦[[1577年]][[11月19日]]） - [[松永久秀]]、[[武士]]（* [[1510年]]） * [[宝永]]4年（グレゴリオ暦[[1707年]][[11月3日]]） - [[宇都宮遯庵]]、[[儒学者]]（* [[1633年]]） * [[享保]]4年（グレゴリオ暦[[1719年]][[11月21日]]） - [[山本常朝]]、[[武士]]（* [[1659年]]） * [[延享]]4年（グレゴリオ暦[[1747年]][[11月12日]]） - [[島津吉貴]]、第4代[[薩摩藩]]主（* [[1675年]]）
== 記念日・年中行事 == [[十日夜]]（とおかんや）
== 関連項目 == {{旧暦360日|10|9|10|11|9|10|11|10|1010}}

== 忌日 == * [[白雉]]5年（ユリウス暦[[654年]][[11月24日]]） - [[孝徳天皇]]、36代天皇 * [[天正]]5年（グレゴリオ暦[[1577年]][[11月19日]]） - [[松永久秀]]、[[武士]]（* [[1510年]]） * [[宝永]]4年（グレゴリオ暦[[1707年]][[11月3日]]） - [[宇都宮遯庵]]、[[儒学者]]（* [[1633年]]） * [[享保]]4年（グレゴリオ暦[[1719年]][[11月21日]]） - [[山本常朝]]、[[武士]]（* [[1659年]]） * [[延享]]4年（グレゴリオ暦[[1747年]][[11月12日]]） - [[島津吉貴]]、第4代[[薩摩藩]]主（* [[1675年]]）

'''October 10 (Old Lunar Calendar)''' is the DAYX day of month MONTHY of the tradional {{ill|Old Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Old Lunar Calendar}}. It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Senshō|ja|先勝}}.
==OVERVIEW== {{Lunar October}} ''October 10 (Old Lunar Calendar)<!--Lunar October10-->きゅうれきじゅうがつとおか）は、[[10月 (旧暦)|Lunar October]]の10日目である。六曜は[[六曜#先勝|先勝]][[Category:先勝]]である。
== Events == * [[永禄]]10年（[[ユリウス暦]][[1567年]][[11月10日]]） - [[東大寺大仏殿の戦い]]において、[[松永久秀]]の奇襲により[[東大寺大仏殿]]が焼け落ちる。 * [[天正]]5年（[[ユリウス暦]][[1577年]][[11月19日]]） - [[信貴山城の戦い]]において、松永久秀が、名器・[[古天明平蜘蛛]]を打ち壊して自害する。 * [[寛永]]6年（[[グレゴリオ暦]][[1629年]][[11月24日]]） - [[徳川家光]]の乳母・ふくが参内し、[[春日局]]の称号を受ける。
== Births == * [[元豊 (宋)|元豊]]5年（[[ユリウス暦]][[1082年]][[11月2日]]） - [[徽宗]]、[[北宋]]の8代皇帝（+ [[1135年]]） * [[建保]]6年（ユリウス暦[[1218年]][[10月30日]]） - [[仲恭天皇]]、85代[[天皇]]（+ [[1234年]]） * [[天保]]元年（グレゴリオ暦[[1830年]][[11月24日]]） - [[清河八郎]]、壬生浪士隊（[[新選組]]の前身）結成（+ [[1863年]]） * [[道光]]15年（グレゴリオ暦[[1835年]][[11月29日]]） - [[慈禧太后]]（西太后）、[[清]]朝末期の独裁者・[[咸豊帝]]の側室（+ [[1908年]]） * [[天保]]13年（グレゴリオ暦[[1842年]][[11月12日]]） - [[大山厳]]、陸軍元帥（+ [[1916年]]）
== Deaths == * [[白雉]]5年（ユリウス暦[[654年]][[11月24日]]） - [[孝徳天皇]]、36代天皇 * [[天正]]5年（グレゴリオ暦[[1577年]][[11月19日]]） - [[松永久秀]]、[[武士]]（* [[1510年]]） * [[宝永]]4年（グレゴリオ暦[[1707年]][[11月3日]]） - [[宇都宮遯庵]]、[[儒学者]]（* [[1633年]]） * [[享保]]4年（グレゴリオ暦[[1719年]][[11月21日]]） - [[山本常朝]]、[[武士]]（* [[1659年]]） * [[延享]]4年（グレゴリオ暦[[1747年]][[11月12日]]） - [[島津吉貴]]、第4代[[薩摩藩]]主（* [[1675年]]）

--> == Events == * [[永禄]]10年（[[ユリウス暦]][[1567年]][[11月10日]]） - [[東大寺大仏殿の戦い]]において、[[松永久秀]]の奇襲により[[東大寺大仏殿]]が焼け落ちる。 * [[天正]]5年（[[ユリウス暦]][[1577年]][[11月19日]]） - [[信貴山城の戦い]]において、松永久秀が、名器・[[古天明平蜘蛛]]を打ち壊して自害する。 * [[寛永]]6年（[[グレゴリオ暦]][[1629年]][[11月24日]]） - [[徳川家光]]の乳母・ふくが参内し、[[春日局]]の称号を受ける。
== Births == * [[元豊 (宋)|元豊]]5年（[[ユリウス暦]][[1082年]][[11月2日]]） - [[徽宗]]、[[北宋]]の8代皇帝（+ [[1135年]]） * [[建保]]6年（ユリウス暦[[1218年]][[10月30日]]） - [[仲恭天皇]]、85代[[天皇]]（+ [[1234年]]） * [[天保]]元年（グレゴリオ暦[[1830年]][[11月24日]]） - [[清河八郎]]、壬生浪士隊（[[新選組]]の前身）結成（+ [[1863年]]） * [[道光]]15年（グレゴリオ暦[[1835年]][[11月29日]]） - [[慈禧太后]]（西太后）、[[清]]朝末期の独裁者・[[咸豊帝]]の側室（+ [[1908年]]） * [[天保]]13年（グレゴリオ暦[[1842年]][[11月12日]]） - [[大山厳]]、陸軍元帥（+ [[1916年]]）
== Deaths == * [[白雉]]5年（ユリウス暦[[654年]][[11月24日]]） - [[孝徳天皇]]、36代天皇 * [[天正]]5年（グレゴリオ暦[[1577年]][[11月19日]]） - [[松永久秀]]、[[武士]]（* [[1510年]]） * [[宝永]]4年（グレゴリオ暦[[1707年]][[11月3日]]） - [[宇都宮遯庵]]、[[儒学者]]（* [[1633年]]） * [[享保]]4年（グレゴリオ暦[[1719年]][[11月21日]]） - [[山本常朝]]、[[武士]]（* [[1659年]]） * [[延享]]4年（グレゴリオ暦[[1747年]][[11月12日]]） - [[島津吉貴]]、第4代[[薩摩藩]]主（* [[1675年]]）
== Commemorations == [[十日夜]]（とおかんや）
== See Also == {{旧暦360日|10|9|10|11|9|10|11|10|1010}}
[[Category:Lunar Calendar Days]] [[ja:10月10日 (旧暦)]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:Lunar Calendar Days]] [[Category:Lunar October]] {{citation needed}}
{{citation needed}} {{Japanese Traditional Lunar Months}} [[Category:先勝]] [[Category:not Butsumetsu]][[sn:October 10 (Old Lunar Calendar)]][[Category:not Butsumetsu]] [[Category:Days 10 of Japanese Lunar months]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:October 10 (Old Lunar Calendar)]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:new pages]]

<!--== {{Lunar October}} ''October 10 (Old Lunar Calendar)<!--Lunar October10れきじゅうがつとおか）は、[[10月 (旧暦)|Lunar October]]の10日目である。六曜は[[六曜#先勝|先勝]][[Category:先勝]]である。

== Deaths == * [[白雉]]5年（ユリウス暦[[654年]][[11月24日]]） - [[孝徳天皇]]、36代天皇 * [[天正]]5年（グレゴリオ暦[[1577年]][[11月19日]]） - [[松永久秀]]、[[武士]]（* [[1510年]]） * [[宝永]]4年（グレゴリオ暦[[1707年]][[11月3日]]） - [[宇都宮遯庵]]、[[儒学者]]（* [[1633年]]） * [[享保]]4年（グレゴリオ暦[[1719年]][[11月21日]]） - [[山本常朝]]、[[武士]]（* [[1659年]]） * [[延享]]4年（グレゴリオ暦[[1747年]][[11月12日]]） - [[島津吉貴]]、第4代[[薩摩藩]]主（* [[1675年]]）

revision.text:
[[sn:October 10 (Old Lunar Calendar)]][[ko:음력 10월 10일]] [[cdo:10 nguŏk 10 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:10月10日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 10월 10일]] [[zh-min-nan:10 goe̍h 10 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十月初十]] [[zh:十月初十]] [[en:draft:October 10 (Old Lunar Calendar)]]{{Lunar October}} '''October 10''' is the 10th day of month {{ill|October (Old Lunar Calendar)|ja|10月 (旧暦)|lt=Kannazuki|1=Kannazuki}} the 10th month of the traditional {{ill|Old Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Old Lunar Calendar}}. It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Senshō|ja|先勝}}.
== Events == * {{ill|Eiroku|ja|永禄}} 10th year ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]]{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1567|ja|1567年}} {{ill|November 10|ja|11月10日}}) – In the {{ill|Todai-ji Daibutsuden Battle|ja|東大寺大仏殿の戦い}}, due to a surprise attack by {{ill|Matsunaga Hisahide|ja|松永久秀}}, the {{ill|Todai-ji Daibutsuden|ja|東大寺大仏殿}} burned down. * {{ill|Tenshō|ja|天正}} 5th year ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]]{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1577|ja|1577年}} {{ill|November 19|ja|11月19日}}) – In the {{ill|Shigisan Castle Battle|ja|信貴山城の戦い}}, {{ill|Matsunaga Hisahide|ja|松永久秀}} shattered the famed weapon {{ill|Kotenyō Heipingumo|ja|古天明平蜘蛛}} and subsequently committed suicide. * {{ill|Kanei|ja|寛永}} 6th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1629|ja|1629年}} {{ill|November 24|ja|11月24日}}) – Fuku, the wet nurse of {{ill|Tokugawa Iemitsu|ja|徳川家光}}, entered the palace and received the title of {{ill|Kasuga no Tsubone|ja|春日局}}.
== Births == * {{ill|Genpō|ja|元豊 (宋)}} 5th year ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]]{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1082|ja|1082年}} {{ill|November 2|ja|11月2日}}) – {{ill|Huizong|ja|徽宗}}, the 8th emperor of the {{ill|Northern Song|ja|北宋}} (died {{ill|1135|ja|1135年}}). * {{ill|Kenpo|ja|建保}} 6th year ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]]{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1218|ja|1218年}} {{ill|October 30|ja|10月30日}}) – {{ill|Emperor Chūkō|ja|仲恭天皇}}, the 85th {{ill|Emperor|ja|天皇}} (died {{ill|1234|ja|1234年}}). * {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保}} 1st year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1830|ja|1830年}} {{ill|November 24|ja|11月24日}}) – {{ill|Seikawa Hachirō|ja|清河八郎}}, founder of the Mibu rōshitai (the precursor to the {{ill|Shinsengumi|ja|新選組}}) (died {{ill|1863|ja|1863年}}). * {{ill|Dōkō|ja|道光}} 15th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1835|ja|1835年}} {{ill|November 29|ja|11月29日}}) – {{ill|Empress Dowager Cixi|ja|慈禧太后}} (Western Empress Dowager), consort of {{ill|Emperor Xianfeng|ja|咸豊帝}} and a de facto dictator of the late {{ill|Qing Dynasty|ja|清}} (died {{ill|1908|ja|1908年}}). * {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保}} 13th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1842|ja|1842年}} {{ill|November 12|ja|11月12日}}) – {{ill|Ōyama Gen|ja|大山厳}}, Marshal of the Army (died {{ill|1916|ja|1916年}}).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Hakuchi|ja|白雉}} 5th year ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]]{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|654|ja|654年}} {{ill|November 24|ja|11月24日}}) – {{ill|Emperor Kōtoku|ja|孝徳天皇}}, the 36th Emperor. * {{ill|Tenshō|ja|天正}} 5th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1577|ja|1577年}} {{ill|November 19|ja|11月19日}}) – {{ill|Matsunaga Hisahide|ja|松永久秀}}, a {{ill|samurai|ja|武士}} (born {{ill|1510|ja|1510年}}). * {{ill|Hōei|ja|宝永}} 4th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1707|ja|1707年}} {{ill|November 3|ja|11月3日}}) – {{ill|Utsunomiya Tonan|ja|宇都宮遯庵}}, a Confucian scholar (born {{ill|1633|ja|1633年}}). * {{ill|Kyōhō|ja|享保}} 4th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1719|ja|1719年}} {{ill|November 21|ja|11月21日}}) – {{ill|Yamamoto Tsuna|ja|山本常朝}}, a {{ill|samurai|ja|武士}} (born {{ill|1659|ja|1659年}}). * {{ill|Enkyō|ja|延享}} 4th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1747|ja|1747年}} {{ill|November 12|ja|11月12日}}) – {{ill|Shimazu Yoshitaka|ja|島津吉貴}}, the 4th lord of the {{ill|Satsuma Domain|ja|薩摩藩}} (born {{ill|1675|ja|1675年}}).
== Commemorations == {{ill|Tokan'ya|ja|十日夜}} (とおかんや)
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|10|9|10|11|9|10|11|10|1010}}

[[Category:New]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:October 10 (Old Lunar Calendar)]][[ko:음력 10월 10일]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:ctober 10 (Old Lunar Calendar)]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:October 10 (Old Lunar Calendar)]][[ko:음력 10월 10일]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:October 10 (Old Lunar Calendar)]][[ko:음력 10월 10일]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:U]][[Category: Lunar Calendar Days]][[Category: Lunar Calendar Days]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:October 10 (Old Lunar Calendar)]][[ko:음력 10월 10일]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:U]][[Category: Lunar Calendar Days]] [[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:October 10 (Old Lunar Calendar)]][[ko:음력 10월 10일]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:October 10 (Old Lunar Calendar)]][[ko:음력 10월 10일]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:October 10 (Old Lunar Calendar)]][[ko:음력 10월 10일]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:October 10 (Old Lunar Calendar)]][[ko:음력 10월 10일]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:Lunar_Calendar_Days]][[sn:October 10 (Old Lunar Calendar)]][[Category:Lunar_Calendar_Days]] ==References== {{reflist}} {{Japanese Traditional Lunar Months}}

[[sn:October 10 (Old Lunar Calendar)]][[ko:음력 10월 10일]] [[cdo:10 nguŏk 10 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:10月10日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 10월 10일]] [[zh-min-nan:10 goe̍h 10 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十月初十]] [[zh:十月初十]] [[en:draft:October 10 (Old Lunar Calendar)]]{{Lunar October}} '''October 10''' is the 10th day of month {{ill|October (Old Lunar Calendar)|ja|10月 (旧暦)|lt=Kannazuki|1=Kannazuki}} the 10th month of the traditional {{ill|Old Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Old Lunar Calendar}}. It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Senshō|ja|先勝}}.
== Events == * {{ill|Eiroku|ja|永禄}} 10th year ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]]{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1567|ja|1567年}} {{ill|November 10|ja|11月10日}}) – In the {{ill|Todai-ji Daibutsuden Battle|ja|東大寺大仏殿の戦い}}, due to a surprise attack by {{ill|Matsunaga Hisahide|ja|松永久秀}}, the {{ill|Todai-ji Daibutsuden|ja|東大寺大仏殿}} burned down. * {{ill|Tenshō|ja|天正}} 5th year ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]]{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1577|ja|1577年}} {{ill|November 19|ja|11月19日}}) – In the {{ill|Shigisan Castle Battle|ja|信貴山城の戦い}}, {{ill|Matsunaga Hisahide|ja|松永久秀}} shattered the famed weapon {{ill|Kotenyō Heipingumo|ja|古天明平蜘蛛}} and subsequently committed suicide. * {{ill|Kanei|ja|寛永}} 6th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1629|ja|1629年}} {{ill|November 24|ja|11月24日}}) – Fuku, the wet nurse of {{ill|Tokugawa Iemitsu|ja|徳川家光}}, entered the palace and received the title of {{ill|Kasuga no Tsubone|ja|春日局}}.
== Births == * {{ill|Genpō|ja|元豊 (宋)}} 5th year ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]]{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1082|ja|1082年}} {{ill|November 2|ja|11月2日}}) – {{ill|Huizong|ja|徽宗}}, the 8th emperor of the {{ill|Northern Song|ja|北宋}} (died {{ill|1135|ja|1135年}}). * {{ill|Kenpo|ja|建保}} 6th year ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]]{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1218|ja|1218年}} {{ill|October 30|ja|10月30日}}) – {{ill|Emperor Chūkō|ja|仲恭天皇}}, the 85th {{ill|Emperor|ja|天皇}} (died {{ill|1234|ja|1234年}}). * {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保}} 1st year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1830|ja|1830年}} {{ill|November 24|ja|11月24日}}) – {{ill|Seikawa Hachirō|ja|清河八郎}}, founder of the Mibu rōshitai (the precursor to the {{ill|Shinsengumi|ja|新選組}}) (died {{ill|1863|ja|1863年}}). * {{ill|Dōkō|ja|道光}} 15th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1835|ja|1835年}} {{ill|November 29|ja|11月29日}}) – {{ill|Empress Dowager Cixi|ja|慈禧太后}} (Western Empress Dowager), consort of {{ill|Emperor Xianfeng|ja|咸豊帝}} and a de facto dictator of the late {{ill|Qing Dynasty|ja|清}} (died {{ill|1908|ja|1908年}}). * {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保}} 13th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1842|ja|1842年}} {{ill|November 12|ja|11月12日}}) – {{ill|Ōyama Gen|ja|大山厳}}, Marshal of the Army (died {{ill|1916|ja|1916年}}).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Hakuchi|ja|白雉}} 5th year ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]]{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|654|ja|654年}} {{ill|November 24|ja|11月24日}}) – {{ill|Emperor Kōtoku|ja|孝徳天皇}}, the 36th Emperor. * {{ill|Tenshō|ja|天正}} 5th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1577|ja|1577年}} {{ill|November 19|ja|11月19日}}) – {{ill|Matsunaga Hisahide|ja|松永久秀}}, a {{ill|samurai|ja|武士}} (born {{ill|1510|ja|1510年}}). * {{ill|Hōei|ja|宝永}} 4th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1707|ja|1707年}} {{ill|November 3|ja|11月3日}}) – {{ill|Utsunomiya Tonan|ja|宇都宮遯庵}}, a Confucian scholar (born {{ill|1633|ja|1633年}}). * {{ill|Kyōhō|ja|享保}} 4th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1719|ja|1719年}} {{ill|November 21|ja|11月21日}}) – {{ill|Yamamoto Tsuna|ja|山本常朝}}, a {{ill|samurai|ja|武士}} (born {{ill|1659|ja|1659年}}). * {{ill|Enkyō|ja|延享}} 4th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1747|ja|1747年}} {{ill|November 12|ja|11月12日}}) – {{ill|Shimazu Yoshitaka|ja|島津吉貴}}, the 4th lord of the {{ill|Satsuma Domain|ja|薩摩藩}} (born {{ill|1675|ja|1675年}}).
== Commemorations == {{ill|Tokan'ya|ja|十日夜}} (とおかんや)

== Births == * {{ill|Genpō|ja|元豊 (宋)}} 5th year ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]]{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1082|ja|1082年}} {{ill|November 2|ja|11月2日}}) – {{ill|Huizong|ja|徽宗}}, the 8th emperor of the {{ill|Northern Song|ja|北宋}} (died {{ill|1135|ja|1135年}}). * {{ill|Kenpo|ja|建保}} 6th year ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]]{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1218|ja|1218年}} {{ill|October 30|ja|10月30日}}) – {{ill|Emperor Chūkō|ja|仲恭天皇}}, the 85th {{ill|Emperor|ja|天皇}} (died {{ill|1234|ja|1234年}}). * {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保}} 1st year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1830|ja|1830年}} {{ill|November 24|ja|11月24日}}) – {{ill|Seikawa Hachirō|ja|清河八郎}}, founder of the Mibu rōshitai (the precursor to the {{ill|Shinsengumi|ja|新選組}}) (died {{ill|1863|ja|1863年}}). * {{ill|Dōkō|ja|道光}} 15th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1835|ja|1835年}} {{ill|November 29|ja|11月29日}}) – {{ill|Empress Dowager Cixi|ja|慈禧太后}} (Western Empress Dowager), consort of {{ill|Emperor Xianfeng|ja|咸豊帝}} and a de facto dictator of the late {{ill|Qing Dynasty|ja|清}} (died {{ill|1908|ja|1908年}}). * {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保}} 13th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1842|ja|1842年}} {{ill|November 12|ja|11月12日}}) – {{ill|Ōyama Gen|ja|大山厳}}, Marshal of the Army (died {{ill|1916|ja|1916年}}).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Hakuchi|ja|白雉}} 5th year ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]]{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|654|ja|654年}} {{ill|November 24|ja|11月24日}}) – {{ill|Emperor Kōtoku|ja|孝徳天皇}}, the 36th Emperor. * {{ill|Tenshō|ja|天正}} 5th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1577|ja|1577年}} {{ill|November 19|ja|11月19日}}) – {{ill|Matsunaga Hisahide|ja|松永久秀}}, a {{ill|samurai|ja|武士}} (born {{ill|1510|ja|1510年}}). * {{ill|Hōei|ja|宝永}} 4th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1707|ja|1707年}} {{ill|November 3|ja|11月3日}}) – {{ill|Utsunomiya Tonan|ja|宇都宮遯庵}}, a Confucian scholar (born {{ill|1633|ja|1633年}}). * {{ill|Kyōhō|ja|享保}} 4th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1719|ja|1719年}} {{ill|November 21|ja|11月21日}}) – {{ill|Yamamoto Tsuna|ja|山本常朝}}, a {{ill|samurai|ja|武士}} (born {{ill|1659|ja|1659年}}). * {{ill|Enkyō|ja|延享}} 4th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1747|ja|1747年}} {{ill|November 12|ja|11月12日}}) – {{ill|Shimazu Yoshitaka|ja|島津吉貴}}, the 4th lord of the {{ill|Satsuma Domain|ja|薩摩藩}} (born {{ill|1675|ja|1675年}}).

[[sn:October 10 (Old Lunar Calendar)]] [[ko:음력 10월 10일]] [[cdo:10 nguŏk 10 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:10月10日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 10월 10일]] [[zh-min-nan:10 goe̍h 10 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十月初十]] [[zh:十月初十]] [[en:draft:October 10 (Old Lunar Calendar)]] {{Lunar October}} '''October 10''' is the 10th day of month {{ill|October (Old Lunar Calendar)|ja|10月 (旧暦)|lt=Kannazuki|1=Kannazuki}} the 10th month of the traditional {{ill|Old Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Old Lunar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Senshō|ja|先勝}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Eiroku|ja|永禄}} 10th year ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]] {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1567|ja|1567年}} {{ill|November 10|ja|11月10日}} ) – In the {{ill|Todai-ji Daibutsuden Battle|ja|東大寺大仏殿の戦い}} , due to a surprise attack by {{ill|Matsunaga Hisahide|ja|松永久秀}} , the {{ill|Todai-ji Daibutsuden|ja|東大寺大仏殿}} burned down. * {{ill|Tenshō|ja|天正}} 5th year ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]] {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1577|ja|1577年}} {{ill|November 19|ja|11月19日}} ) – In the {{ill|Shigisan Castle Battle|ja|信貴山城の戦い}} , {{ill|Matsunaga Hisahide|ja|松永久秀}} shattered the famed weapon {{ill|Kotenyō Heipingumo|ja|古天明平蜘蛛}} and subsequently committed suicide. * {{ill|Kanei|ja|寛永}} 6th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1629|ja|1629年}} {{ill|November 24|ja|11月24日}} ) – Fuku, the wet nurse of {{ill|Tokugawa Iemitsu|ja|徳川家光}} , entered the palace and received the title of {{ill|Kasuga no Tsubone|ja|春日局}} .
== Births == * {{ill|Genpō|ja|元豊 (宋)}} 5th year ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]] {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1082|ja|1082年}} {{ill|November 2|ja|11月2日}} ) – {{ill|Huizong|ja|徽宗}} , the 8th emperor of the {{ill|Northern Song|ja|北宋}} (died {{ill|1135|ja|1135年}} ). * {{ill|Kenpo|ja|建保}} 6th year ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]] {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1218|ja|1218年}} {{ill|October 30|ja|10月30日}} ) – {{ill|Emperor Chūkō|ja|仲恭天皇}} , the 85th {{ill|Emperor|ja|天皇}} (died {{ill|1234|ja|1234年}} ). * {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保}} 1st year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1830|ja|1830年}} {{ill|November 24|ja|11月24日}} ) – {{ill|Seikawa Hachirō|ja|清河八郎}} , founder of the Mibu rōshitai (the precursor to the {{ill|Shinsengumi|ja|新選組}} ) (died {{ill|1863|ja|1863年}} ). * {{ill|Dōkō|ja|道光}} 15th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1835|ja|1835年}} {{ill|November 29|ja|11月29日}} ) – {{ill|Empress Dowager Cixi|ja|慈禧太后}} (Western Empress Dowager), consort of {{ill|Emperor Xianfeng|ja|咸豊帝}} and a de facto dictator of the late {{ill|Qing Dynasty|ja|清}} (died {{ill|1908|ja|1908年}} ). * {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保}} 13th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1842|ja|1842年}} {{ill|November 12|ja|11月12日}} ) – {{ill|Ōyama Gen|ja|大山厳}} , Marshal of the Army (died {{ill|1916|ja|1916年}} ).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Hakuchi|ja|白雉}} 5th year ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]] {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|654|ja|654年}} {{ill|November 24|ja|11月24日}} ) – {{ill|Emperor Kōtoku|ja|孝徳天皇}} , the 36th Emperor. * {{ill|Tenshō|ja|天正}} 5th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1577|ja|1577年}} {{ill|November 19|ja|11月19日}} ) – {{ill|Matsunaga Hisahide|ja|松永久秀}} , a {{ill|samurai|ja|武士}} (born {{ill|1510|ja|1510年}} ). * {{ill|Hōei|ja|宝永}} 4th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1707|ja|1707年}} {{ill|November 3|ja|11月3日}} ) – {{ill|Utsunomiya Tonan|ja|宇都宮遯庵}} , a Confucian scholar (born {{ill|1633|ja|1633年}} ). * {{ill|Kyōhō|ja|享保}} 4th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1719|ja|1719年}} {{ill|November 21|ja|11月21日}} ) – {{ill|Yamamoto Tsuna|ja|山本常朝}} , a {{ill|samurai|ja|武士}} (born {{ill|1659|ja|1659年}} ). * {{ill|Enkyō|ja|延享}} 4th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1747|ja|1747年}} {{ill|November 12|ja|11月12日}} ) – {{ill|Shimazu Yoshitaka|ja|島津吉貴}} , the 4th lord of the {{ill|Satsuma Domain|ja|薩摩藩}} (born {{ill|1675|ja|1675年}} ).
== Commemorations == {{ill|Tokan'ya|ja|十日夜}} (とおかんや)

== Births == * {{ill|Genpō|ja|元豊 (宋)}} 5th year ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]] {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1082|ja|1082年}} {{ill|November 2|ja|11月2日}} ) – {{ill|Huizong|ja|徽宗}} , the 8th emperor of the {{ill|Northern Song|ja|北宋}} (died {{ill|1135|ja|1135年}} ). * {{ill|Kenpo|ja|建保}} 6th year ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]] {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1218|ja|1218年}} {{ill|October 30|ja|10月30日}} ) – {{ill|Emperor Chūkō|ja|仲恭天皇}} , the 85th {{ill|Emperor|ja|天皇}} (died {{ill|1234|ja|1234年}} ). * {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保}} 1st year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1830|ja|1830年}} {{ill|November 24|ja|11月24日}} ) – {{ill|Seikawa Hachirō|ja|清河八郎}} , founder of the Mibu rōshitai (the precursor to the {{ill|Shinsengumi|ja|新選組}} ) (died {{ill|1863|ja|1863年}} ). * {{ill|Dōkō|ja|道光}} 15th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1835|ja|1835年}} {{ill|November 29|ja|11月29日}} ) – {{ill|Empress Dowager Cixi|ja|慈禧太后}} (Western Empress Dowager), consort of {{ill|Emperor Xianfeng|ja|咸豊帝}} and a de facto dictator of the late {{ill|Qing Dynasty|ja|清}} (died {{ill|1908|ja|1908年}} ). * {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保}} 13th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1842|ja|1842年}} {{ill|November 12|ja|11月12日}} ) – {{ill|Ōyama Gen|ja|大山厳}} , Marshal of the Army (died {{ill|1916|ja|1916年}} ).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Hakuchi|ja|白雉}} 5th year ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]] {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|654|ja|654年}} {{ill|November 24|ja|11月24日}} ) – {{ill|Emperor Kōtoku|ja|孝徳天皇}} , the 36th Emperor. * {{ill|Tenshō|ja|天正}} 5th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1577|ja|1577年}} {{ill|November 19|ja|11月19日}} ) – {{ill|Matsunaga Hisahide|ja|松永久秀}} , a {{ill|samurai|ja|武士}} (born {{ill|1510|ja|1510年}} ). * {{ill|Hōei|ja|宝永}} 4th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1707|ja|1707年}} {{ill|November 3|ja|11月3日}} ) – {{ill|Utsunomiya Tonan|ja|宇都宮遯庵}} , a Confucian scholar (born {{ill|1633|ja|1633年}} ). * {{ill|Kyōhō|ja|享保}} 4th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1719|ja|1719年}} {{ill|November 21|ja|11月21日}} ) – {{ill|Yamamoto Tsuna|ja|山本常朝}} , a {{ill|samurai|ja|武士}} (born {{ill|1659|ja|1659年}} ). * {{ill|Enkyō|ja|延享}} 4th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1747|ja|1747年}} {{ill|November 12|ja|11月12日}} ) – {{ill|Shimazu Yoshitaka|ja|島津吉貴}} , the 4th lord of the {{ill|Satsuma Domain|ja|薩摩藩}} (born {{ill|1675|ja|1675年}} ).

[[sn:October 10 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 10월 10일]] [[cdo:10 nguŏk 10 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:10月10日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 10월 10일]] [[zh-min-nan:10 goe̍h 10 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十月初十]] [[zh:十月初十]] [[en:draft:October 10 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunar October}} '''October 10''' is the 10th day of month {{ill|October (Lunisolar)|ja|10月 (旧暦)|lt=Kannazuki|1=Kannazuki}} the 10th month of the traditional {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Lunisolar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Senshō|ja|先勝}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Eiroku|ja|永禄}} 10th year ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]] {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1567|ja|1567年}} {{ill|November 10|ja|11月10日}} ) – In the {{ill|Todai-ji Daibutsuden Battle|ja|東大寺大仏殿の戦い}} , due to a surprise attack by {{ill|Matsunaga Hisahide|ja|松永久秀}} , the {{ill|Todai-ji Daibutsuden|ja|東大寺大仏殿}} burned down. * {{ill|Tenshō|ja|天正}} 5th year ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]] {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1577|ja|1577年}} {{ill|November 19|ja|11月19日}} ) – In the {{ill|Shigisan Castle Battle|ja|信貴山城の戦い}} , {{ill|Matsunaga Hisahide|ja|松永久秀}} shattered the famed weapon {{ill|Kotenyō Heipingumo|ja|古天明平蜘蛛}} and subsequently committed suicide. * {{ill|Kanei|ja|寛永}} 6th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1629|ja|1629年}} {{ill|November 24|ja|11月24日}} ) – Fuku, the wet nurse of {{ill|Tokugawa Iemitsu|ja|徳川家光}} , entered the palace and received the title of {{ill|Kasuga no Tsubone|ja|春日局}} .
== Births == * {{ill|Genpō|ja|元豊 (宋)}} 5th year ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]] {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1082|ja|1082年}} {{ill|November 2|ja|11月2日}} ) – {{ill|Huizong|ja|徽宗}} , the 8th emperor of the {{ill|Northern Song|ja|北宋}} (died {{ill|1135|ja|1135年}} ). * {{ill|Kenpo|ja|建保}} 6th year ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]] {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1218|ja|1218年}} {{ill|October 30|ja|10月30日}} ) – {{ill|Emperor Chūkō|ja|仲恭天皇}} , the 85th {{ill|Emperor|ja|天皇}} (died {{ill|1234|ja|1234年}} ). * {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保}} 1st year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1830|ja|1830年}} {{ill|November 24|ja|11月24日}} ) – {{ill|Seikawa Hachirō|ja|清河八郎}} , founder of the Mibu rōshitai (the precursor to the {{ill|Shinsengumi|ja|新選組}} ) (died {{ill|1863|ja|1863年}} ). * {{ill|Dōkō|ja|道光}} 15th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1835|ja|1835年}} {{ill|November 29|ja|11月29日}} ) – {{ill|Empress Dowager Cixi|ja|慈禧太后}} (Western Empress Dowager), consort of {{ill|Emperor Xianfeng|ja|咸豊帝}} and a de facto dictator of the late {{ill|Qing Dynasty|ja|清}} (died {{ill|1908|ja|1908年}} ). * {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保}} 13th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1842|ja|1842年}} {{ill|November 12|ja|11月12日}} ) – {{ill|Ōyama Gen|ja|大山厳}} , Marshal of the Army (died {{ill|1916|ja|1916年}} ).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Hakuchi|ja|白雉}} 5th year ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]] {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|654|ja|654年}} {{ill|November 24|ja|11月24日}} ) – {{ill|Emperor Kōtoku|ja|孝徳天皇}} , the 36th Emperor. * {{ill|Tenshō|ja|天正}} 5th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1577|ja|1577年}} {{ill|November 19|ja|11月19日}} ) – {{ill|Matsunaga Hisahide|ja|松永久秀}} , a {{ill|samurai|ja|武士}} (born {{ill|1510|ja|1510年}} ). * {{ill|Hōei|ja|宝永}} 4th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1707|ja|1707年}} {{ill|November 3|ja|11月3日}} ) – {{ill|Utsunomiya Tonan|ja|宇都宮遯庵}} , a Confucian scholar (born {{ill|1633|ja|1633年}} ). * {{ill|Kyōhō|ja|享保}} 4th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1719|ja|1719年}} {{ill|November 21|ja|11月21日}} ) – {{ill|Yamamoto Tsuna|ja|山本常朝}} , a {{ill|samurai|ja|武士}} (born {{ill|1659|ja|1659年}} ). * {{ill|Enkyō|ja|延享}} 4th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1747|ja|1747年}} {{ill|November 12|ja|11月12日}} ) – {{ill|Shimazu Yoshitaka|ja|島津吉貴}} , the 4th lord of the {{ill|Satsuma Domain|ja|薩摩藩}} (born {{ill|1675|ja|1675年}} ).
== Commemorations == {{ill|Tokan'ya|ja|十日夜}} (とおかんや)
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|10|9|10|11|9|10|11|10|1010}}

[[sn:October 10 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 10월 10일]] [[cdo:10 nguŏk 10 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:10月10日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 10월 10일]] [[zh-min-nan:10 goe̍h 10 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十月初十]] [[zh:十月初十]] [[en:draft:October 10 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunar October}} '''October 10''' is the 10th day of month {{ill|October (Lunisolar)|ja|10月 (旧暦)|lt=Kannazuki|1=Kannazuki}} the 10th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Senshō|ja|先勝}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Eiroku|ja|永禄}} 10th year ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]] {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1567|ja|1567年}} {{ill|November 10|ja|11月10日}} ) – In the {{ill|Todai-ji Daibutsuden Battle|ja|東大寺大仏殿の戦い}} , due to a surprise attack by {{ill|Matsunaga Hisahide|ja|松永久秀}} , the {{ill|Todai-ji Daibutsuden|ja|東大寺大仏殿}} burned down. * {{ill|Tenshō|ja|天正}} 5th year ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]] {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1577|ja|1577年}} {{ill|November 19|ja|11月19日}} ) – In the {{ill|Shigisan Castle Battle|ja|信貴山城の戦い}} , {{ill|Matsunaga Hisahide|ja|松永久秀}} shattered the famed weapon {{ill|Kotenyō Heipingumo|ja|古天明平蜘蛛}} and subsequently committed suicide. * {{ill|Kanei|ja|寛永}} 6th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1629|ja|1629年}} {{ill|November 24|ja|11月24日}} ) – Fuku, the wet nurse of {{ill|Tokugawa Iemitsu|ja|徳川家光}} , entered the palace and received the title of {{ill|Kasuga no Tsubone|ja|春日局}} .
== Births == * {{ill|Genpō|ja|元豊 (宋)}} 5th year ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]] {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1082|ja|1082年}} {{ill|November 2|ja|11月2日}} ) – {{ill|Huizong|ja|徽宗}} , the 8th emperor of the {{ill|Northern Song|ja|北宋}} (died {{ill|1135|ja|1135年}} ). * {{ill|Kenpo|ja|建保}} 6th year ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]] {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1218|ja|1218年}} {{ill|October 30|ja|10月30日}} ) – {{ill|Emperor Chūkō|ja|仲恭天皇}} , the 85th {{ill|Emperor|ja|天皇}} (died {{ill|1234|ja|1234年}} ). * {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保}} 1st year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1830|ja|1830年}} {{ill|November 24|ja|11月24日}} ) – {{ill|Seikawa Hachirō|ja|清河八郎}} , founder of the Mibu rōshitai (the precursor to the {{ill|Shinsengumi|ja|新選組}} ) (died {{ill|1863|ja|1863年}} ). * {{ill|Dōkō|ja|道光}} 15th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1835|ja|1835年}} {{ill|November 29|ja|11月29日}} ) – {{ill|Empress Dowager Cixi|ja|慈禧太后}} (Western Empress Dowager), consort of {{ill|Emperor Xianfeng|ja|咸豊帝}} and a de facto dictator of the late {{ill|Qing Dynasty|ja|清}} (died {{ill|1908|ja|1908年}} ). * {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保}} 13th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1842|ja|1842年}} {{ill|November 12|ja|11月12日}} ) – {{ill|Ōyama Gen|ja|大山厳}} , Marshal of the Army (died {{ill|1916|ja|1916年}} ).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Hakuchi|ja|白雉}} 5th year ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]] {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|654|ja|654年}} {{ill|November 24|ja|11月24日}} ) – {{ill|Emperor Kōtoku|ja|孝徳天皇}} , the 36th Emperor. * {{ill|Tenshō|ja|天正}} 5th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1577|ja|1577年}} {{ill|November 19|ja|11月19日}} ) – {{ill|Matsunaga Hisahide|ja|松永久秀}} , a {{ill|samurai|ja|武士}} (born {{ill|1510|ja|1510年}} ). * {{ill|Hōei|ja|宝永}} 4th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1707|ja|1707年}} {{ill|November 3|ja|11月3日}} ) – {{ill|Utsunomiya Tonan|ja|宇都宮遯庵}} , a Confucian scholar (born {{ill|1633|ja|1633年}} ). * {{ill|Kyōhō|ja|享保}} 4th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1719|ja|1719年}} {{ill|November 21|ja|11月21日}} ) – {{ill|Yamamoto Tsuna|ja|山本常朝}} , a {{ill|samurai|ja|武士}} (born {{ill|1659|ja|1659年}} ). * {{ill|Enkyō|ja|延享}} 4th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1747|ja|1747年}} {{ill|November 12|ja|11月12日}} ) – {{ill|Shimazu Yoshitaka|ja|島津吉貴}} , the 4th lord of the {{ill|Satsuma Domain|ja|薩摩藩}} (born {{ill|1675|ja|1675年}} ).
== Commemorations == {{ill|Tokan'ya|ja|十日夜}} (とおかんや)
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|10|9|10|11|9|10|11|10|1010}}

== Deaths == * {{ill|Hakuchi|ja|白雉}} 5th year ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]] {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|654|ja|654年}} {{ill|November 24|ja|11月24日}} ) – {{ill|Emperor Kōtoku|ja|孝徳天皇}} , the 36th Emperor. * {{ill|Tenshō|ja|天正}} 5th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1577|ja|1577年}} {{ill|November 19|ja|11月19日}} ) – {{ill|Matsunaga Hisahide|ja|松永久秀}} , a {{ill|samurai|ja|武士}} (born {{ill|1510|ja|1510年}} ). * {{ill|Hōei|ja|宝永}} 4th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1707|ja|1707年}} {{ill|November 3|ja|11月3日}} ) – {{ill|Utsunomiya Tonan|ja|宇都宮遯庵}} , a Confucian scholar (born {{ill|1633|ja|1633年}} ). * {{ill|Kyōhō|ja|享保}} 4th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1719|ja|1719年}} {{ill|November 21|ja|11月21日}} ) – {{ill|Yamamoto Tsuna|ja|山本常朝}} , a {{ill|samurai|ja|武士}} (born {{ill|1659|ja|1659年}} ). * {{ill|Enkyō|ja|延享}} 4th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1747|ja|1747年}} {{ill|November 12|ja|11月12日}} ) – {{ill|Shimazu Yoshitaka|ja|島津吉貴}} , the 4th lord of the {{ill|Satsuma Domain|ja|薩摩藩}} (born {{ill|1675|ja|1675年}} ).
== Commemorations == {{ill|Tokan'ya|ja|十日夜}} (とおかんや)
== See Also ==

[[sn:October 10 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 10월 10일]] [[cdo:10 nguŏk 10 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:10月10日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 10월 10일]] [[zh-min-nan:10 goe̍h 10 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十月初十]] [[zh:十月初十]] [[en:draft:October 10 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunar October}} '''October 10''' is the 10th day of month {{ill|October (Lunisolar)|ja|10月 (旧暦)|lt=Kannazuki|1=Kannazuki}} the 10th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Senshō|ja|先勝}} .

[[sn:October 10 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 10월 10일]] [[cdo:10 nguŏk 10 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:10月10日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 10월 10일]] [[zh-min-nan:10 goe̍h 10 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十月初十]] [[zh:十月初十]] [[en:draft:October 10 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunar October}} '''October 10''' is the 10th day of month {{ill|October (Lunisolar)|ja|10月 (旧暦)|lt=Kannazuki|1=Kannazuki}} the 10th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Senshō|ja|先勝}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Eiroku|ja|永禄}} 10th year ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]] {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1567|ja|1567年}} {{ill|November 10|ja|11月10日}} ) – In the {{ill|Todai-ji Daibutsuden Battle|ja|東大寺大仏殿の戦い}} , due to a surprise attack by {{ill|Matsunaga Hisahide|ja|松永久秀}} , the {{ill|Todai-ji Daibutsuden|ja|東大寺大仏殿}} burned down. * {{ill|Tenshō|ja|天正}} 5th year ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]] {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1577|ja|1577年}} {{ill|November 19|ja|11月19日}} ) – In the {{ill|Shigisan Castle Battle|ja|信貴山城の戦い}} , {{ill|Matsunaga Hisahide|ja|松永久秀}} shattered the famed weapon {{ill|Kotenyō Heipingumo|ja|古天明平蜘蛛}} and subsequently committed suicide. * {{ill|Kanei|ja|寛永}} 6th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1629|ja|1629年}} {{ill|November 24|ja|11月24日}} ) – Fuku, the wet nurse of {{ill|Tokugawa Iemitsu|ja|徳川家光}} , entered the palace and received the title of {{ill|Kasuga no Tsubone|ja|春日局}} .
== Births == * {{ill|Genpō|ja|元豊 (宋)}} 5th year ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]] {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1082|ja|1082年}} {{ill|November 2|ja|11月2日}} ) – {{ill|Huizong|ja|徽宗}} , the 8th emperor of the {{ill|Northern Song|ja|北宋}} (died {{ill|1135|ja|1135年}} ). * {{ill|Kenpo|ja|建保}} 6th year ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]] {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1218|ja|1218年}} {{ill|October 30|ja|10月30日}} ) – {{ill|Emperor Chūkō|ja|仲恭天皇}} , the 85th {{ill|Emperor|ja|天皇}} (died {{ill|1234|ja|1234年}} ). * {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保}} 1st year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1830|ja|1830年}} {{ill|November 24|ja|11月24日}} ) – {{ill|Seikawa Hachirō|ja|清河八郎}} , founder of the Mibu rōshitai (the precursor to the {{ill|Shinsengumi|ja|新選組}} ) (died {{ill|1863|ja|1863年}} ). * {{ill|Dōkō|ja|道光}} 15th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1835|ja|1835年}} {{ill|November 29|ja|11月29日}} ) – {{ill|Empress Dowager Cixi|ja|慈禧太后}} (Western Empress Dowager), consort of {{ill|Emperor Xianfeng|ja|咸豊帝}} and a de facto dictator of the late {{ill|Qing Dynasty|ja|清}} (died {{ill|1908|ja|1908年}} ). * {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保}} 13th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1842|ja|1842年}} {{ill|November 12|ja|11月12日}} ) – {{ill|Ōyama Gen|ja|大山厳}} , Marshal of the Army (died {{ill|1916|ja|1916年}} ).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Hakuchi|ja|白雉}} 5th year ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]] {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|654|ja|654年}} {{ill|November 24|ja|11月24日}} ) – {{ill|Emperor Kōtoku|ja|孝徳天皇}} , the 36th Emperor. * {{ill|Tenshō|ja|天正}} 5th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1577|ja|1577年}} {{ill|November 19|ja|11月19日}} ) – {{ill|Matsunaga Hisahide|ja|松永久秀}} , a {{ill|samurai|ja|Samurai}} (born {{ill|1510|ja|1510年}} ). * {{ill|Hōei|ja|宝永}} 4th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1707|ja|1707年}} {{ill|November 3|ja|11月3日}} ) – {{ill|Utsunomiya Tonan|ja|宇都宮遯庵}} , a Confucian scholar (born {{ill|1633|ja|1633年}} ). * {{ill|Kyōhō|ja|享保}} 4th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1719|ja|1719年}} {{ill|November 21|ja|11月21日}} ) – {{ill|Yamamoto Tsuna|ja|山本常朝}} , a {{ill|samurai|ja|Samurai}} (born {{ill|1659|ja|1659年}} ). * {{ill|Enkyō|ja|Enkyō}} 4th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1747|ja|1747年}} {{ill|November 12|ja|11月12日}} ) – {{ill|Shimazu Yoshitaka|ja|島津吉貴}} , the 4th lord of the {{ill|Satsuma Domain|ja|薩摩藩}} (born {{ill|1675|ja|1675年}} ).
== Commemorations == {{ill|Tokan'ya|ja|十日夜}} (とおかんや)

[[sn:October 10 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 10월 10일]] [[cdo:10 nguŏk 10 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:10月10日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 10월 10일]] [[zh-min-nan:10 goe̍h 10 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十月初十]] [[zh:十月初十]] [[en:draft:October 10 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunar October}} '''October 10''' is the 10th day of month {{ill|October (Lunisolar)|ja|10月 (旧暦)|lt=Kannazuki|1=Kannazuki}} the 10th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Senshō|ja|先勝}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Eiroku|ja|永禄}} 10th year ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]] {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1567|ja|1567年}} {{ill|November 10|ja|11月10日}} ) – In the {{ill|Todai-ji Daibutsuden Battle|ja|東大寺大仏殿の戦い}} , due to a surprise attack by {{ill|Matsunaga Hisahide|ja|松永久秀}} , the {{ill|Todai-ji Daibutsuden|ja|東大寺大仏殿}} burned down. * {{ill|Tenshō|ja|天正}} 5th year ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]] {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1577|ja|1577年}} {{ill|November 19|ja|11月19日}} ) – In the {{ill|Shigisan Castle Battle|ja|信貴山城の戦い}} , {{ill|Matsunaga Hisahide|ja|松永久秀}} shattered the famed weapon {{ill|Kotenyō Heipingumo|ja|古天明平蜘蛛}} and subsequently committed suicide. * {{ill|Kanei|ja|寛永}} 6th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1629|ja|1629年}} {{ill|November 24|ja|11月24日}} ) – Fuku, the wet nurse of {{ill|Tokugawa Iemitsu|ja|徳川家光}} , entered the palace and received the title of {{ill|Kasuga no Tsubone|ja|春日局}} .
== Births == * {{ill|Genpō|ja|元豊 (宋)}} 5th year ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]] {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1082|ja|1082年}} {{ill|November 2|ja|11月2日}} ) – {{ill|Huizong|ja|徽宗}} , the 8th emperor of the {{ill|Northern Song|ja|北宋}} (died {{ill|1135|ja|1135年}} ). * {{ill|Kenpo|ja|建保}} 6th year ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]] {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1218|ja|1218年}} {{ill|October 30|ja|10月30日}} ) – {{ill|Emperor Chūkō|ja|仲恭天皇}} , the 85th {{ill|Emperor|ja|天皇}} (died {{ill|1234|ja|1234年}} ). * {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保}} 1st year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1830|ja|1830年}} {{ill|November 24|ja|11月24日}} ) – {{ill|Seikawa Hachirō|ja|清河八郎}} , founder of the Mibu rōshitai (the precursor to the {{ill|Shinsengumi|ja|新選組}} ) (died {{ill|1863|ja|1863年}} ). * {{ill|Dōkō|ja|道光}} 15th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1835|ja|1835年}} {{ill|November 29|ja|11月29日}} ) – {{ill|Empress Dowager Cixi|ja|慈禧太后}} (Western Empress Dowager), consort of {{ill|Emperor Xianfeng|ja|咸豊帝}} and a de facto dictator of the late {{ill|Qing Dynasty|ja|清}} (died {{ill|1908|ja|1908年}} ). * {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保}} 13th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1842|ja|1842年}} {{ill|November 12|ja|11月12日}} ) – {{ill|Ōyama Gen|ja|大山厳}} , Marshal of the Army (died {{ill|1916|ja|1916年}} ).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Hakuchi|ja|白雉}} 5th year ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]] {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|654|ja|654年}} {{ill|November 24|ja|11月24日}} ) – {{ill|Emperor Kōtoku|ja|孝徳天皇}} , the 36th Emperor. * {{ill|Tenshō|ja|天正}} 5th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1577|ja|1577年}} {{ill|November 19|ja|11月19日}} ) – {{ill|Matsunaga Hisahide|ja|松永久秀}} , a {{ill|samurai|ja|Samurai}} (born {{ill|1510|ja|1510年}} ). * {{ill|Hōei|ja|宝永}} 4th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1707|ja|1707年}} {{ill|November 3|ja|11月3日}} ) – {{ill|Utsunomiya Tonan|ja|宇都宮遯庵}} , a Confucian scholar (born {{ill|1633|ja|1633年}} ). * {{ill|Kyōhō|ja|享保}} 4th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1719|ja|1719年}} {{ill|November 21|ja|11月21日}} ) – {{ill|Yamamoto Tsuna|ja|山本常朝}} , a {{ill|samurai|ja|Samurai}} (born {{ill|1659|ja|1659年}} ). * {{ill|Enkyō|ja|Enkyō}} 4th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1747|ja|1747年}} {{ill|November 12|ja|11月12日}} ) – {{ill|Shimazu Yoshitaka|ja|島津吉貴}} , the 4th lord of the {{ill|Satsuma Domain|ja|薩摩藩}} (born {{ill|1675|ja|1675年}} ).
== Commemorations == {{ill|Tokan'ya|ja|十日夜}} (とおかんや)
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|10|9|10|11|9|10|11|10|1010}}

== Deaths == * {{ill|Hakuchi|ja|白雉}} 5th year ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]] {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|654|ja|654年}} {{ill|November 24|ja|11月24日}} ) – {{ill|Emperor Kōtoku|ja|孝徳天皇}} , the 36th Emperor. * {{ill|Tenshō|ja|天正}} 5th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1577|ja|1577年}} {{ill|November 19|ja|11月19日}} ) – {{ill|Matsunaga Hisahide|ja|松永久秀}} , a {{ill|samurai|ja|Samurai}} (born {{ill|1510|ja|1510年}} ). * {{ill|Hōei|ja|宝永}} 4th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1707|ja|1707年}} {{ill|November 3|ja|11月3日}} ) – {{ill|Utsunomiya Tonan|ja|宇都宮遯庵}} , a Confucian scholar (born {{ill|1633|ja|1633年}} ). * {{ill|Kyōhō|ja|享保}} 4th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1719|ja|1719年}} {{ill|November 21|ja|11月21日}} ) – {{ill|Yamamoto Tsuna|ja|山本常朝}} , a {{ill|samurai|ja|Samurai}} (born {{ill|1659|ja|1659年}} ). * {{ill|Enkyō|ja|Enkyō}} 4th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1747|ja|1747年}} {{ill|November 12|ja|11月12日}} ) – {{ill|Shimazu Yoshitaka|ja|島津吉貴}} , the 4th lord of the {{ill|Satsuma Domain|ja|薩摩藩}} (born {{ill|1675|ja|1675年}} ).
== Commemorations == {{ill|Tokan'ya|ja|十日夜}} (とおかんや) == See Also ==

[[sn:October 10 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 10월 10일]] [[cdo:10 nguŏk 10 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:10月10日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 10월 10일]] [[zh-min-nan:10 goe̍h 10 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十月初十]] [[zh:十月初十]] [[en:draft:October 10 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunar October}} '''October 10''' is the 10th day of month {{ill|October (Lunisolar)|ja|10月 (旧暦)|lt=Kannazuki|1=Kannazuki}} the 10th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Senshō|ja|先勝}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Eiroku|ja|永禄}} 10th year ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]] {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1567|ja|1567年}} {{ill|November 10|ja|11月10日}} ) – In the {{ill|Todai-ji Daibutsuden Battle|ja|東大寺大仏殿の戦い}} , due to a surprise attack by {{ill|Matsunaga Hisahide|ja|松永久秀}} , the {{ill|Todai-ji Daibutsuden|ja|東大寺大仏殿}} burned down. * {{ill|Tenshō|ja|天正}} 5th year ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]] {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1577|ja|1577年}} {{ill|November 19|ja|11月19日}} ) – In the {{ill|Shigisan Castle Battle|ja|信貴山城の戦い}} , {{ill|Matsunaga Hisahide|ja|松永久秀}} shattered the famed weapon {{ill|Kotenyō Heipingumo|ja|古天明平蜘蛛}} and subsequently committed suicide. * {{ill|Kanei|ja|寛永}} 6th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1629|ja|1629年}} {{ill|November 24|ja|11月24日}} ) – Fuku, the wet nurse of {{ill|Tokugawa Iemitsu|ja|徳川家光}} , entered the palace and received the title of {{ill|Kasuga no Tsubone|ja|春日局}} .
== Births == * {{ill|Genpō|ja|元豊 (宋)}} 5th year ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]] {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1082|ja|1082年}} {{ill|November 2|ja|11月2日}} ) – {{ill|Huizong|ja|徽宗}} , the 8th emperor of the {{ill|Northern Song|ja|北宋}} (died {{ill|1135|ja|1135年}} ). * {{ill|Kenpo|ja|建保}} 6th year ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]] {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1218|ja|1218年}} {{ill|October 30|ja|10月30日}} ) – {{ill|Emperor Chūkō|ja|仲恭天皇}} , the 85th {{ill|Emperor|ja|天皇}} (died {{ill|1234|ja|1234年}} ). * {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保}} 1st year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1830|ja|1830年}} {{ill|November 24|ja|11月24日}} ) – {{ill|Seikawa Hachirō|ja|清河八郎}} , founder of the Mibu rōshitai (the precursor to the {{ill|Shinsengumi|ja|新選組}} ) (died {{ill|1863|ja|1863年}} ). * {{ill|Dōkō|ja|道光}} 15th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1835|ja|1835年}} {{ill|November 29|ja|11月29日}} ) – {{ill|Empress Dowager Cixi|ja|慈禧太后}} (Western Empress Dowager), consort of {{ill|Emperor Xianfeng|ja|咸豊帝}} and a de facto dictator of the late {{ill|Qing Dynasty|ja|清}} (died {{ill|1908|ja|1908年}} ). * {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保}} 13th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1842|ja|1842年}} {{ill|November 12|ja|11月12日}} ) – {{ill|Ōyama Gen|ja|大山厳}} , Marshal of the Army (died {{ill|1916|ja|1916年}} ).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Hakuchi|ja|白雉}} 5th year ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]] {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|654|ja|654年}} {{ill|November 24|ja|11月24日}} ) – {{ill|Emperor Kōtoku|ja|孝徳天皇}} , the 36th Emperor. * {{ill|Tenshō|ja|天正}} 5th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1577|ja|1577年}} {{ill|November 19|ja|11月19日}} ) – {{ill|Matsunaga Hisahide|ja|松永久秀}} , a {{ill|samurai|ja|Samurai}} (born {{ill|1510|ja|1510年}} ). * {{ill|Hōei|ja|宝永}} 4th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1707|ja|1707年}} {{ill|November 3|ja|11月3日}} ) – {{ill|Utsunomiya Tonan|ja|宇都宮遯庵}} , a Confucian scholar (born {{ill|1633|ja|1633年}} ). * {{ill|Kyōhō|ja|享保}} 4th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1719|ja|1719年}} {{ill|November 21|ja|11月21日}} ) – {{ill|Yamamoto Tsuna|ja|山本常朝}} , a {{ill|samurai|ja|Samurai}} (born {{ill|1659|ja|1659年}} ). * {{ill|Enkyō|ja|Enkyō}} 4th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1747|ja|1747年}} {{ill|November 12|ja|11月12日}} ) – {{ill|Shimazu Yoshitaka|ja|島津吉貴}} , the 4th lord of the {{ill|Satsuma Domain|ja|薩摩藩}} (born {{ill|1675|ja|1675年}} ).

revision.text:
[[sn:October 10 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 10월 10일]] [[cdo:10 nguŏk 10 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:10月10日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 10월 10일]] [[zh-min-nan:10 goe̍h 10 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十月初十]] [[zh:十月初十]] [[en:draft:October 10 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunar October}} '''October 10''' is the 10th day of month {{ill|October (Lunisolar)|ja|10月 (旧暦)|lt=Kannazuki|1=Kannazuki}} the 10th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Senshō|ja|先勝}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Eiroku|ja|永禄}} 10th year ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]] {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1567|ja|1567年}} {{ill|November 10|ja|11月10日}} ) – In the {{ill|Todai-ji Daibutsuden Battle|ja|東大寺大仏殿の戦い}} , due to a surprise attack by {{ill|Matsunaga Hisahide|ja|松永久秀}} , the {{ill|Todai-ji Daibutsuden|ja|東大寺大仏殿}} burned down. * {{ill|Tenshō|ja|天正}} 5th year ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]] {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1577|ja|1577年}} {{ill|November 19|ja|11月19日}} ) – In the {{ill|Shigisan Castle Battle|ja|信貴山城の戦い}} , {{ill|Matsunaga Hisahide|ja|松永久秀}} shattered the famed weapon {{ill|Kotenyō Heipingumo|ja|古天明平蜘蛛}} and subsequently committed suicide. * {{ill|Kanei|ja|寛永}} 6th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1629|ja|1629年}} {{ill|November 24|ja|11月24日}} ) – Fuku, the wet nurse of {{ill|Tokugawa Iemitsu|ja|徳川家光}} , entered the palace and received the title of {{ill|Kasuga no Tsubone|ja|春日局}} .
== Births == * {{ill|Genpō|ja|元豊 (宋)}} 5th year ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]] {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1082|ja|1082年}} {{ill|November 2|ja|11月2日}} ) – {{ill|Huizong|ja|徽宗}} , the 8th emperor of the {{ill|Northern Song|ja|北宋}} (died {{ill|1135|ja|1135年}} ). * {{ill|Kenpo|ja|建保}} 6th year ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]] {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1218|ja|1218年}} {{ill|October 30|ja|10月30日}} ) – {{ill|Emperor Chūkō|ja|仲恭天皇}} , the 85th {{ill|Emperor|ja|天皇}} (died {{ill|1234|ja|1234年}} ). * {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保}} 1st year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1830|ja|1830年}} {{ill|November 24|ja|11月24日}} ) – {{ill|Seikawa Hachirō|ja|清河八郎}} , founder of the Mibu rōshitai (the precursor to the {{ill|Shinsengumi|ja|新選組}} ) (died {{ill|1863|ja|1863年}} ). * {{ill|Dōkō|ja|道光}} 15th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1835|ja|1835年}} {{ill|November 29|ja|11月29日}} ) – {{ill|Empress Dowager Cixi|ja|慈禧太后}} (Western Empress Dowager), consort of {{ill|Emperor Xianfeng|ja|咸豊帝}} and a de facto dictator of the late {{ill|Qing Dynasty|ja|清}} (died {{ill|1908|ja|1908年}} ). * {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保}} 13th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1842|ja|1842年}} {{ill|November 12|ja|11月12日}} ) – {{ill|Ōyama Gen|ja|大山厳}} , Marshal of the Army (died {{ill|1916|ja|1916年}} ).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Hakuchi|ja|白雉}} 5th year ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]] {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|654|ja|654年}} {{ill|November 24|ja|11月24日}} ) – {{ill|Emperor Kōtoku|ja|孝徳天皇}} , the 36th Emperor. * {{ill|Tenshō|ja|天正}} 5th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1577|ja|1577年}} {{ill|November 19|ja|11月19日}} ) – {{ill|Matsunaga Hisahide|ja|松永久秀}} , a {{ill|samurai|ja|Samurai}} (born {{ill|1510|ja|1510年}} ). * {{ill|Hōei|ja|宝永}} 4th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1707|ja|1707年}} {{ill|November 3|ja|11月3日}} ) – {{ill|Utsunomiya Tonan|ja|宇都宮遯庵}} , a Confucian scholar (born {{ill|1633|ja|1633年}} ). * {{ill|Kyōhō|ja|享保}} 4th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1719|ja|1719年}} {{ill|November 21|ja|11月21日}} ) – {{ill|Yamamoto Tsuna|ja|山本常朝}} , a {{ill|samurai|ja|Samurai}} (born {{ill|1659|ja|1659年}} ). * {{ill|Enkyō|ja|Enkyō}} 4th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1747|ja|1747年}} {{ill|November 12|ja|11月12日}} ) – {{ill|Shimazu Yoshitaka|ja|島津吉貴}} , the 4th lord of the {{ill|Satsuma Domain|ja|薩摩藩}} (born {{ill|1675|ja|1675年}} ).
== Commemorations == {{ill|Tokan'ya|ja|十日夜}} (とおかんや) == See Also ==

It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Senshō|ja|先勝}} .

[[sn:October 10 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 10월 10일]] [[cdo:10 nguŏk 10 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:10月10日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 10월 10일]] [[zh-min-nan:10 goe̍h 10 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十月初十]] [[zh:十月初十]] [[en:draft:October 10 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunar October}} '''October 10''' is the 10th day of month {{ill|October (Lunisolar)|ja|10月 (旧暦)|lt=Kannazuki|1=Kannazuki}} the 10th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Senshō|ja|先勝}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Eiroku|ja|永禄}} 10th year ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]] {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1567|ja|1567年}} {{ill|November 10|ja|11月10日}} ) – In the {{ill|Todai-ji Daibutsuden Battle|ja|東大寺大仏殿の戦い}} , due to a surprise attack by {{ill|Matsunaga Hisahide|ja|松永久秀}} , the {{ill|Todai-ji Daibutsuden|ja|東大寺大仏殿}} burned down. * {{ill|Tenshō|ja|天正}} 5th year ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]] {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1577|ja|1577年}} {{ill|November 19|ja|11月19日}} ) – In the {{ill|Shigisan Castle Battle|ja|信貴山城の戦い}} , {{ill|Matsunaga Hisahide|ja|松永久秀}} shattered the famed weapon {{ill|Kotenyō Heipingumo|ja|古天明平蜘蛛}} and subsequently committed suicide. * {{ill|Kanei|ja|寛永}} 6th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1629|ja|1629年}} {{ill|November 24|ja|11月24日}} ) – Fuku, the wet nurse of {{ill|Tokugawa Iemitsu|ja|徳川家光}} , entered the palace and received the title of {{ill|Kasuga no Tsubone|ja|春日局}} .
== Births == * {{ill|Genpō|ja|元豊 (宋)}} 5th year ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]] {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1082|ja|1082nd year }} {{ill|November 2|ja|11月2日}} ) – {{ill|Huizong|ja|徽宗}} , the 8th emperor of the {{ill|Northern Song|ja|北宋}} (died {{ill|1135|ja|1135年}} ). * {{ill|Kenpo|ja|建保}} 6th year ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]] {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1218|ja|1218年}} {{ill|October 30|ja|10月30日}} ) – {{ill|Emperor Chūkō|ja|仲恭天皇}} , the 85th {{ill|Emperor|ja|天皇}} (died {{ill|1234|ja|1234年}} ). * {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保}} 1st year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1830|ja|1830年}} {{ill|November 24|ja|11月24日}} ) – {{ill|Seikawa Hachirō|ja|清河八郎}} , founder of the Mibu rōshitai (the precursor to the {{ill|Shinsengumi|ja|新選組}} ) (died {{ill|1863|ja|1863rd year }} ). * {{ill|Dōkō|ja|道光}} 15th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1835|ja|1835年}} {{ill|November 29|ja|11月29日}} ) – {{ill|Empress Dowager Cixi|ja|慈禧太后}} (Western Empress Dowager), consort of {{ill|Emperor Xianfeng|ja|咸豊帝}} and a de facto dictator of the late {{ill|Qing Dynasty|ja|清}} (died {{ill|1908|ja|1908年}} ). * {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保}} 13th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1842|ja|1842nd year }} {{ill|November 12|ja|11月12日}} ) – {{ill|Ōyama Gen|ja|大山厳}} , Marshal of the Army (died {{ill|1916|ja|1916年}} ).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Hakuchi|ja|白雉}} 5th year ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]] {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|654|ja|654年}} {{ill|November 24|ja|11月24日}} ) – {{ill|Emperor Kōtoku|ja|孝徳天皇}} , the 36th Emperor. * {{ill|Tenshō|ja|天正}} 5th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1577|ja|1577年}} {{ill|November 19|ja|11月19日}} ) – {{ill|Matsunaga Hisahide|ja|松永久秀}} , a {{ill|samurai|ja|Samurai}} (born {{ill|1510|ja|1510年}} ). * {{ill|Hōei|ja|宝永}} 4th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1707|ja|1707年}} {{ill|November 3|ja|11月3日}} ) – {{ill|Utsunomiya Tonan|ja|宇都宮遯庵}} , a Confucian scholar (born {{ill|1633|ja|1633rd year }} ). * {{ill|Kyōhō|ja|享保}} 4th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1719|ja|1719年}} {{ill|November 21|ja|11月21日}} ) – {{ill|Yamamoto Tsuna|ja|山本常朝}} , a {{ill|samurai|ja|Samurai}} (born {{ill|1659|ja|1659年}} ). * {{ill|Enkyō|ja|Enkyō}} 4th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1747|ja|1747年}} {{ill|November 12|ja|11月12日}} ) – {{ill|Shimazu Yoshitaka|ja|島津吉貴}} , the 4th lord of the {{ill|Satsuma Domain|ja|薩摩藩}} (born {{ill|1675|ja|1675年}} ).
== Commemorations == {{ill|Tokan'ya|ja|十日夜}} (とおかんや) == See Also ==

== Events == * {{ill|Eiroku|ja|永禄}} 10th year ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]] {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1567|ja|1567年}} {{ill|November 10|ja|11月10日}} ) – In the {{ill|Todai-ji Daibutsuden Battle|ja|東大寺大仏殿の戦い}} , due to a surprise attack by {{ill|Matsunaga Hisahide|ja|松永久秀}} , the {{ill|Todai-ji Daibutsuden|ja|東大寺大仏殿}} burned down. * {{ill|Tenshō|ja|天正}} 5th year ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]] {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1577|ja|1577年}} {{ill|November 19|ja|11月19日}} ) – In the {{ill|Shigisan Castle Battle|ja|信貴山城の戦い}} , {{ill|Matsunaga Hisahide|ja|松永久秀}} shattered the famed weapon {{ill|Kotenyō Heipingumo|ja|古天明平蜘蛛}} and subsequently committed suicide. * {{ill|Kanei|ja|寛永}} 6th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1629|ja|1629年}} {{ill|November 24|ja|11月24日}} ) – Fuku, the wet nurse of {{ill|Tokugawa Iemitsu|ja|徳川家光}} , entered the palace and received the title of {{ill|Kasuga no Tsubone|ja|春日局}} .
== Births == * {{ill|Genpō|ja|元豊 (宋)}} 5th year ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]] {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1082|ja|1082nd year }} {{ill|November 2|ja|11月2日}} ) – {{ill|Huizong|ja|徽宗}} , the 8th emperor of the {{ill|Northern Song|ja|北宋}} (died {{ill|1135|ja|1135th year }} ). * {{ill|Kenpo|ja|建保}} 6th year ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]] {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1218|ja|1218年}} {{ill|October 30|ja|10月30日}} ) – {{ill|Emperor Chūkō|ja|仲恭天皇}} , the 85th {{ill|Emperor|ja|天皇}} (died {{ill|1234|ja|1234th year }} ). * {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保}} 1st year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1830|ja|1830年}} {{ill|November 24|ja|11月24日}} ) – {{ill|Seikawa Hachirō|ja|清河八郎}} , founder of the Mibu rōshitai (the precursor to the {{ill|Shinsengumi|ja|新選組}} ) (died {{ill|1863|ja|1863rd year }} ). * {{ill|Dōkō|ja|道光}} 15th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1835|ja|1835th year }} {{ill|November 29|ja|11月29日}} ) – {{ill|Empress Dowager Cixi|ja|慈禧太后}} (Western Empress Dowager), consort of {{ill|Emperor Xianfeng|ja|咸豊帝}} and a de facto dictator of the late {{ill|Qing Dynasty|ja|清}} (died {{ill|1908|ja|1908年}} ). * {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保}} 13th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1842|ja|1842nd year }} {{ill|November 12|ja|11月12日}} ) – {{ill|Ōyama Gen|ja|大山厳}} , Marshal of the Army (died {{ill|1916|ja|1916年}} ).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Hakuchi|ja|白雉}} 5th year ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]] {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|654|ja|654th year }} {{ill|November 24|ja|11月24日}} ) – {{ill|Emperor Kōtoku|ja|孝徳天皇}} , the 36th Emperor. * {{ill|Tenshō|ja|天正}} 5th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1577|ja|1577年}} {{ill|November 19|ja|11月19日}} ) – {{ill|Matsunaga Hisahide|ja|松永久秀}} , a {{ill|samurai|ja|Samurai}} (born {{ill|1510|ja|1510年}} ). * {{ill|Hōei|ja|宝永}} 4th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1707|ja|1707年}} {{ill|November 3|ja|11月3日}} ) – {{ill|Utsunomiya Tonan|ja|宇都宮遯庵}} , a Confucian scholar (born {{ill|1633|ja|1633rd year }} ). * {{ill|Kyōhō|ja|享保}} 4th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1719|ja|1719年}} {{ill|November 21|ja|11月21日}} ) – {{ill|Yamamoto Tsuna|ja|山本常朝}} , a {{ill|samurai|ja|Samurai}} (born {{ill|1659|ja|1659年}} ). * {{ill|Enkyō|ja|Enkyō}} 4th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1747|ja|1747年}} {{ill|November 12|ja|11月12日}} ) – {{ill|Shimazu Yoshitaka|ja|島津吉貴}} , the 4th lord of the {{ill|Satsuma Domain|ja|薩摩藩}} (born {{ill|1675|ja|1675th year }} ).

== Deaths == * {{ill|Hakuchi|ja|白雉}} 5th year ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]] {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|654|ja|654th year }} {{ill|November 24|ja|11月24日}} ) – {{ill|Emperor Kōtoku|ja|孝徳天皇}} , the 36th Emperor. * {{ill|Tenshō|ja|天正}} 5th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1577|ja|1577th year }} {{ill|November 19|ja|11月19日}} ) – {{ill|Matsunaga Hisahide|ja|松永久秀}} , a {{ill|samurai|ja|Samurai}} (born {{ill|1510|ja|1510年}} ). * {{ill|Hōei|ja|宝永}} 4th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1707|ja|1707th year }} {{ill|November 3|ja|11月3日}} ) – {{ill|Utsunomiya Tonan|ja|宇都宮遯庵}} , a Confucian scholar (born {{ill|1633|ja|1633rd year }} ). * {{ill|Kyōhō|ja|享保}} 4th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1719|ja|1719年}} {{ill|November 21|ja|11月21日}} ) – {{ill|Yamamoto Tsuna|ja|山本常朝}} , a {{ill|samurai|ja|Samurai}} (born {{ill|1659|ja|1659年}} ). * {{ill|Enkyō|ja|Enkyō}} 4th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1747|ja|1747th year }} {{ill|November 12|ja|11月12日}} ) – {{ill|Shimazu Yoshitaka|ja|島津吉貴}} , the 4th lord of the {{ill|Satsuma Domain|ja|薩摩藩}} (born {{ill|1675|ja|1675th year }} ).

[[sn:October 10 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 10월 10일]] [[cdo:10 nguŏk 10 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:10月10日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 10월 10일]] [[zh-min-nan:10 goe̍h 10 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十月初十]] [[zh:十月初十]] [[en:draft:October 10 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunar October}} '''October 10''' is the 10th day of month {{ill|October (Lunisolar)|ja|10月 (旧暦)|lt=Kannazuki|1=Kannazuki}} the 10th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Senshō|ja|先勝}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Eiroku|ja|永禄}} 10th year ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]] {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1567|ja|1567th year }} {{ill|November 10|ja|11月10日}} ) – In the {{ill|Todai-ji Daibutsuden Battle|ja|東大寺大仏殿の戦い}} , due to a surprise attack by {{ill|Matsunaga Hisahide|ja|松永久秀}} , the {{ill|Todai-ji Daibutsuden|ja|東大寺大仏殿}} burned down. * {{ill|Tenshō|ja|天正}} 5th year ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]] {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1577|ja|1577th year }} {{ill|November 19|ja|11月19日}} ) – In the {{ill|Shigisan Castle Battle|ja|信貴山城の戦い}} , {{ill|Matsunaga Hisahide|ja|松永久秀}} shattered the famed weapon {{ill|Kotenyō Heipingumo|ja|古天明平蜘蛛}} and subsequently committed suicide. * {{ill|Kanei|ja|寛永}} 6th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1629|ja|1629th year }} {{ill|November 24|ja|11月24日}} ) – Fuku, the wet nurse of {{ill|Tokugawa Iemitsu|ja|徳川家光}} , entered the palace and received the title of {{ill|Kasuga no Tsubone|ja|春日局}} .
== Births == * {{ill|Genpō|ja|元豊 (宋)}} 5th year ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]] {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1082|ja|1082nd year }} {{ill|November 2|ja|11月2日}} ) – {{ill|Huizong|ja|徽宗}} , the 8th emperor of the {{ill|Northern Song|ja|北宋}} (died {{ill|1135|ja|1135th year }} ). * {{ill|Kenpo|ja|建保}} 6th year ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]] {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1218|ja|1218th year }} {{ill|October 30|ja|10月30日}} ) – {{ill|Emperor Chūkō|ja|仲恭天皇}} , the 85th {{ill|Emperor|ja|天皇}} (died {{ill|1234|ja|1234th year }} ). * {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保}} 1st year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1830|ja|1830th year }} {{ill|November 24|ja|11月24日}} ) – {{ill|Seikawa Hachirō|ja|清河八郎}} , founder of the Mibu rōshitai (the precursor to the {{ill|Shinsengumi|ja|新選組}} ) (died {{ill|1863|ja|1863rd year }} ). * {{ill|Dōkō|ja|道光}} 15th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1835|ja|1835th year }} {{ill|November 29|ja|11月29日}} ) – {{ill|Empress Dowager Cixi|ja|慈禧太后}} (Western Empress Dowager), consort of {{ill|Emperor Xianfeng|ja|咸豊帝}} and a de facto dictator of the late {{ill|Qing Dynasty|ja|清}} (died {{ill|1908|ja|1908th year }} ). * {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保}} 13th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1842|ja|1842nd year }} {{ill|November 12|ja|11月12日}} ) – {{ill|Ōyama Gen|ja|大山厳}} , Marshal of the Army (died {{ill|1916|ja|1916th year }} ).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Hakuchi|ja|白雉}} 5th year ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]] {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|654|ja|654th year }} {{ill|November 24|ja|11月24日}} ) – {{ill|Emperor Kōtoku|ja|孝徳天皇}} , the 36th Emperor. * {{ill|Tenshō|ja|天正}} 5th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1577|ja|1577th year }} {{ill|November 19|ja|11月19日}} ) – {{ill|Matsunaga Hisahide|ja|松永久秀}} , a {{ill|samurai|ja|Samurai}} (born {{ill|1510|ja|1510th year }} ). * {{ill|Hōei|ja|宝永}} 4th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1707|ja|1707th year }} {{ill|November 3|ja|11月3日}} ) – {{ill|Utsunomiya Tonan|ja|宇都宮遯庵}} , a Confucian scholar (born {{ill|1633|ja|1633rd year }} ). * {{ill|Kyōhō|ja|享保}} 4th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1719|ja|1719th year }} {{ill|November 21|ja|11月21日}} ) – {{ill|Yamamoto Tsuna|ja|山本常朝}} , a {{ill|samurai|ja|Samurai}} (born {{ill|1659|ja|1659th year }} ). * {{ill|Enkyō|ja|Enkyō}} 4th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1747|ja|1747th year }} {{ill|November 12|ja|11月12日}} ) – {{ill|Shimazu Yoshitaka|ja|島津吉貴}} , the 4th lord of the {{ill|Satsuma Domain|ja|薩摩藩}} (born {{ill|1675|ja|1675th year }} ).

revision.comment: Text replacement - "|天正}}" to "|天正|1=Tenshō (Momoyama period)|lt=Tenshō Era}}"
revision.text:
[[sn:October 10 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 10월 10일]] [[cdo:10 nguŏk 10 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:10月10日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 10월 10일]] [[zh-min-nan:10 goe̍h 10 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十月初十]] [[zh:十月初十]] [[en:draft:October 10 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunar October}} '''October 10''' is the 10th day of month {{ill|October (Lunisolar)|ja|10月 (旧暦)|lt=Kannazuki|1=Kannazuki}} the 10th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Senshō|ja|先勝}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Eiroku|ja|永禄}} 10th year ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]] {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1567|ja|1567th year }} {{ill|November 10|ja|11月10日}} ) – In the {{ill|Todai-ji Daibutsuden Battle|ja|東大寺大仏殿の戦い}} , due to a surprise attack by {{ill|Matsunaga Hisahide|ja|松永久秀}} , the {{ill|Todai-ji Daibutsuden|ja|東大寺大仏殿}} burned down. * {{ill|Tenshō|ja|天正|1=Tenshō (Momoyama period)|lt=Tenshō Era}} 5th year ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]] {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1577|ja|1577th year }} {{ill|November 19|ja|11月19日}} ) – In the {{ill|Shigisan Castle Battle|ja|信貴山城の戦い}} , {{ill|Matsunaga Hisahide|ja|松永久秀}} shattered the famed weapon {{ill|Kotenyō Heipingumo|ja|古天明平蜘蛛}} and subsequently committed suicide. * {{ill|Kanei|ja|寛永}} 6th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1629|ja|1629th year }} {{ill|November 24|ja|11月24日}} ) – Fuku, the wet nurse of {{ill|Tokugawa Iemitsu|ja|徳川家光}} , entered the palace and received the title of {{ill|Kasuga no Tsubone|ja|春日局}} .
== Births == * {{ill|Genpō|ja|元豊 (宋)}} 5th year ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]] {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1082|ja|1082nd year }} {{ill|November 2|ja|11月2日}} ) – {{ill|Huizong|ja|徽宗}} , the 8th emperor of the {{ill|Northern Song|ja|北宋}} (died {{ill|1135|ja|1135th year }} ). * {{ill|Kenpo|ja|建保}} 6th year ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]] {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1218|ja|1218th year }} {{ill|October 30|ja|10月30日}} ) – {{ill|Emperor Chūkō|ja|仲恭天皇}} , the 85th {{ill|Emperor|ja|天皇}} (died {{ill|1234|ja|1234th year }} ). * {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保}} 1st year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1830|ja|1830th year }} {{ill|November 24|ja|11月24日}} ) – {{ill|Seikawa Hachirō|ja|清河八郎}} , founder of the Mibu rōshitai (the precursor to the {{ill|Shinsengumi|ja|新選組}} ) (died {{ill|1863|ja|1863rd year }} ). * {{ill|Dōkō|ja|道光}} 15th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1835|ja|1835th year }} {{ill|November 29|ja|11月29日}} ) – {{ill|Empress Dowager Cixi|ja|慈禧太后}} (Western Empress Dowager), consort of {{ill|Emperor Xianfeng|ja|咸豊帝}} and a de facto dictator of the late {{ill|Qing Dynasty|ja|清}} (died {{ill|1908|ja|1908th year }} ). * {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保}} 13th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1842|ja|1842nd year }} {{ill|November 12|ja|11月12日}} ) – {{ill|Ōyama Gen|ja|大山厳}} , Marshal of the Army (died {{ill|1916|ja|1916th year }} ).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Hakuchi|ja|白雉}} 5th year ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]] {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|654|ja|654th year }} {{ill|November 24|ja|11月24日}} ) – {{ill|Emperor Kōtoku|ja|孝徳天皇}} , the 36th Emperor. * {{ill|Tenshō|ja|天正|1=Tenshō (Momoyama period)|lt=Tenshō Era}} 5th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1577|ja|1577th year }} {{ill|November 19|ja|11月19日}} ) – {{ill|Matsunaga Hisahide|ja|松永久秀}} , a {{ill|samurai|ja|Samurai}} (born {{ill|1510|ja|1510th year }} ). * {{ill|Hōei|ja|宝永}} 4th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1707|ja|1707th year }} {{ill|November 3|ja|11月3日}} ) – {{ill|Utsunomiya Tonan|ja|宇都宮遯庵}} , a Confucian scholar (born {{ill|1633|ja|1633rd year }} ). * {{ill|Kyōhō|ja|享保}} 4th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1719|ja|1719th year }} {{ill|November 21|ja|11月21日}} ) – {{ill|Yamamoto Tsuna|ja|山本常朝}} , a {{ill|samurai|ja|Samurai}} (born {{ill|1659|ja|1659th year }} ). * {{ill|Enkyō|ja|Enkyō}} 4th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1747|ja|1747th year }} {{ill|November 12|ja|11月12日}} ) – {{ill|Shimazu Yoshitaka|ja|島津吉貴}} , the 4th lord of the {{ill|Satsuma Domain|ja|薩摩藩}} (born {{ill|1675|ja|1675th year }} ).
== Commemorations == {{ill|Tokan'ya|ja|十日夜}} (とおかんや) == See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|10|9|10|11|9|10|11|10|1010}}

It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Senshō|ja|先勝}} .

[[sn:October 10 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 10월 10일]] [[cdo:10 nguŏk 10 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:10月10日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 10월 10일]] [[zh-min-nan:10 goe̍h 10 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十月初十]] [[zh:十月初十]] [[en:draft:October 10 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunar October}} '''October 10''' is the 10th day of month {{ill|October (Lunisolar)|ja|10月 (旧暦)|lt=Kannazuki|1=Kannazuki}} the 10th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Senshō|ja|先勝}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Eiroku|ja|永禄}} 10th year ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]] {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1567|ja|1567th year }} {{ill|November 10|ja|11月10日}} ) – In the {{ill|Todai-ji Daibutsuden Battle|ja|東大寺大仏殿の戦い}} , due to a surprise attack by {{ill|Matsunaga Hisahide|ja|松永久秀}} , the {{ill|Todai-ji Daibutsuden|ja|東大寺大仏殿}} burned down. * {{ill|Tenshō|ja|天正|1=Tenshō (Momoyama period)|lt=Tenshō Era}} 5th year ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]] {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1577|ja|1577th year }} {{ill|November 19|ja|11月19日}} ) – In the {{ill|Shigisan Castle Battle|ja|信貴山城の戦い}} , {{ill|Matsunaga Hisahide|ja|松永久秀}} shattered the famed weapon {{ill|Kotenyō Heipingumo|ja|古天明平蜘蛛}} and subsequently committed suicide. * {{ill|Kanei|ja|寛永}} 6th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1629|ja|1629th year }} {{ill|November 24|ja|11月24日}} ) – Fuku, the wet nurse of {{ill|Tokugawa Iemitsu|ja|徳川家光}} , entered the palace and received the title of {{ill|Kasuga no Tsubone|ja|春日局}} .
== Births == * {{ill|Genpō|ja|元豊 (宋)}} 5th year ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]] {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1082|ja|1082nd year }} {{ill|November 2|ja|11月2日}} ) – {{ill|Huizong|ja|徽宗}} , the 8th emperor of the {{ill|Northern Song|ja|北宋}} (died {{ill|1135|ja|1135th year }} ). * {{ill|Kenpo|ja|建保}} 6th year ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]] {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1218|ja|1218th year }} {{ill|October 30|ja|10月30日}} ) – {{ill|Emperor Chūkō|ja|仲恭天皇}} , the 85th {{ill|Emperor|ja|天皇}} (died {{ill|1234|ja|1234th year }} ). * {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保}} 1st year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1830|ja|1830th year }} {{ill|November 24|ja|11月24日}} ) – {{ill|Seikawa Hachirō|ja|清河八郎}} , founder of the Mibu rōshitai (the precursor to the {{ill|Shinsengumi|ja|新選組}} ) (died {{ill|1863|ja|1863rd year }} ). * {{ill|Dōkō|ja|道光}} 15th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1835|ja|1835th year }} {{ill|November 29|ja|11月29日}} ) – {{ill|Empress Dowager Cixi|ja|慈禧太后}} (Western Empress Dowager), consort of {{ill|Emperor Xianfeng|ja|咸豊帝}} and a de facto dictator of the late {{ill|Qing Dynasty|ja|清}} (died {{ill|1908|ja|1908th year }} ). * {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保}} 13th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1842|ja|1842nd year }} {{ill|November 12|ja|11月12日}} ) – {{ill|Ōyama Gen|ja|大山厳}} , Marshal of the Army (died {{ill|1916|ja|1916th year }} ).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Hakuchi|ja|白雉}} 5th year ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]] {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|654|ja|654th year }} {{ill|November 24|ja|11月24日}} ) – {{ill|Emperor Kōtoku|ja|孝徳天皇}} , the 36th Emperor. * {{ill|Tenshō|ja|天正|1=Tenshō (Momoyama period)|lt=Tenshō Era}} 5th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1577|ja|1577th year }} {{ill|November 19|ja|11月19日}} ) – {{ill|Matsunaga Hisahide|ja|松永久秀}} , a {{ill|samurai|ja|Samurai}} (born {{ill|1510|ja|1510th year }} ). * {{ill|Hōei|ja|宝永}} 4th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1707|ja|1707th year }} {{ill|November 3|ja|11月3日}} ) – {{ill|Utsunomiya Tonan|ja|宇都宮遯庵}} , a Confucian scholar (born {{ill|1633|ja|1633rd year }} ). * {{ill|Kyōhō|ja|享保}} 4th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1719|ja|1719th year }} {{ill|November 21|ja|11月21日}} ) – {{ill|Yamamoto Tsuna|ja|山本常朝}} , a {{ill|samurai|ja|Samurai}} (born {{ill|1659|ja|1659th year }} ). * {{ill|Enkyō|ja|Enkyō}} 4th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1747|ja|1747th year }} {{ill|November 12|ja|11月12日}} ) – {{ill|Shimazu Yoshitaka|ja|島津吉貴}} , the 4th lord of the {{ill|Satsuma Domain|ja|薩摩藩}} (born {{ill|1675|ja|1675th year }} ).
== Commemorations == {{ill|Tokan'ya|ja|十日夜}} (とおかんや)

== Deaths == * {{ill|Hakuchi|ja|白雉}} 5th year ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]] {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|654|ja|654th year }} {{ill|November 24|ja|11月24日}} ) – {{ill|Emperor Kōtoku|ja|孝徳天皇}} , the 36th Emperor. * {{ill|Tenshō|ja|天正|1=Tenshō (Momoyama period)|lt=Tenshō Era}} 5th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1577|ja|1577th year }} {{ill|November 19|ja|11月19日}} ) – {{ill|Matsunaga Hisahide|ja|松永久秀}} , a {{ill|samurai|ja|Samurai}} (born {{ill|1510|ja|1510th year }} ). * {{ill|Hōei|ja|宝永}} 4th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1707|ja|1707th year }} {{ill|November 3|ja|11月3日}} ) – {{ill|Utsunomiya Tonan|ja|宇都宮遯庵}} , a Confucian scholar (born {{ill|1633|ja|1633rd year }} ). * {{ill|Kyōhō|ja|享保}} 4th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1719|ja|1719th year }} {{ill|November 21|ja|11月21日}} ) – {{ill|Yamamoto Tsuna|ja|山本常朝}} , a {{ill|samurai|ja|Samurai}} (born {{ill|1659|ja|1659th year }} ). * {{ill|Enkyō|ja|Enkyō}} 4th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1747|ja|1747th year }} {{ill|November 12|ja|11月12日}} ) – {{ill|Shimazu Yoshitaka|ja|島津吉貴}} , the 4th lord of the {{ill|Satsuma Domain|ja|薩摩藩}} (born {{ill|1675|ja|1675th year }} ).
== Commemorations == {{ill|Tokan'ya|ja|十日夜}} (とおかんや)
