revision.text:
[[sn:October 10 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 10월 10일]] [[cdo:10 nguŏk 10 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:10月10日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 10월 10일]] [[zh-min-nan:10 goe̍h 10 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十月初十]] [[zh:十月初十]] [[en:draft:October 10 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunisolar October}} '''October 10''' is the 10th day of month {{ill|October (Lunisolar)|ja|10月 (旧暦)|lt=Kannazuki|1=Kannazuki}} the 10th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Senshō|ja|先勝}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Eiroku|ja|永禄}} 10th year ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]] {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1567|ja|1567th year }} {{ill|November 10|ja|11月10日}} ) – In the {{ill|Todai-ji Daibutsuden Battle|ja|東大寺大仏殿の戦い}} , due to a surprise attack by {{ill|Matsunaga Hisahide|ja|松永久秀}} , the {{ill|Todai-ji Daibutsuden|ja|東大寺大仏殿}} burned down. * {{ill|Tenshō|ja|天正|1=Tenshō (Momoyama period)|lt=Tenshō Era}} 5th year ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]] {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1577|ja|1577th year }} {{ill|November 19|ja|11月19日}} ) – In the {{ill|Shigisan Castle Battle|ja|信貴山城の戦い}} , {{ill|Matsunaga Hisahide|ja|松永久秀}} shattered the famed weapon {{ill|Kotenyō Heipingumo|ja|古天明平蜘蛛}} and subsequently committed suicide. * {{ill|Kanei|ja|寛永}} 6th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1629|ja|1629th year }} {{ill|November 24|ja|11月24日}} ) – Fuku, the wet nurse of {{ill|Tokugawa Iemitsu|ja|徳川家光}} , entered the palace and received the title of {{ill|Kasuga no Tsubone|ja|春日局}} .
== Births == * {{ill|Genpō|ja|元豊 (宋)}} 5th year ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]] {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1082|ja|1082nd year }} {{ill|November 2|ja|11月2日}} ) – {{ill|Huizong|ja|徽宗}} , the 8th emperor of the {{ill|Northern Song|ja|北宋}} (died {{ill|1135|ja|1135th year }} ). * {{ill|Kenpo|ja|建保}} 6th year ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]] {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1218|ja|1218th year }} {{ill|October 30|ja|10月30日}} ) – {{ill|Emperor Chūkō|ja|仲恭天皇}} , the 85th {{ill|Emperor|ja|天皇}} (died {{ill|1234|ja|1234th year }} ). * {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保}} 1st year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1830|ja|1830th year }} {{ill|November 24|ja|11月24日}} ) – {{ill|Seikawa Hachirō|ja|清河八郎}} , founder of the Mibu rōshitai (the precursor to the {{ill|Shinsengumi|ja|新選組}} ) (died {{ill|1863|ja|1863rd year }} ). * {{ill|Dōkō|ja|道光}} 15th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1835|ja|1835th year }} {{ill|November 29|ja|11月29日}} ) – {{ill|Empress Dowager Cixi|ja|慈禧太后}} (Western Empress Dowager), consort of {{ill|Emperor Xianfeng|ja|咸豊帝}} and a de facto dictator of the late {{ill|Qing Dynasty|ja|清}} (died {{ill|1908|ja|1908th year }} ). * {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保}} 13th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1842|ja|1842nd year }} {{ill|November 12|ja|11月12日}} ) – {{ill|Ōyama Gen|ja|大山厳}} , Marshal of the Army (died {{ill|1916|ja|1916th year }} ).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Hakuchi|ja|白雉}} 5th year ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]] {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|654|ja|654th year }} {{ill|November 24|ja|11月24日}} ) – {{ill|Emperor Kōtoku|ja|孝徳天皇}} , the 36th Emperor. * {{ill|Tenshō|ja|天正|1=Tenshō (Momoyama period)|lt=Tenshō Era}} 5th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1577|ja|1577th year }} {{ill|November 19|ja|11月19日}} ) – {{ill|Matsunaga Hisahide|ja|松永久秀}} , a {{ill|samurai|ja|Samurai}} (born {{ill|1510|ja|1510th year }} ). * {{ill|Hōei|ja|宝永}} 4th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1707|ja|1707th year }} {{ill|November 3|ja|11月3日}} ) – {{ill|Utsunomiya Tonan|ja|宇都宮遯庵}} , a Confucian scholar (born {{ill|1633|ja|1633rd year }} ). * {{ill|Kyōhō|ja|享保}} 4th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1719|ja|1719th year }} {{ill|November 21|ja|11月21日}} ) – {{ill|Yamamoto Tsuna|ja|山本常朝}} , a {{ill|samurai|ja|Samurai}} (born {{ill|1659|ja|1659th year }} ). * {{ill|Enkyō|ja|Enkyō}} 4th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1747|ja|1747th year }} {{ill|November 12|ja|11月12日}} ) – {{ill|Shimazu Yoshitaka|ja|島津吉貴}} , the 4th lord of the {{ill|Satsuma Domain|ja|薩摩藩}} (born {{ill|1675|ja|1675th year }} ).
== Commemorations == {{ill|Tokan'ya|ja|十日夜}} (とおかんや)
== See Also ==

It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Senshō|ja|先勝}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Eiroku|ja|永禄}} 10th year ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]] {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1567|ja|1567th year }} {{ill|November 10|ja|11月10日}} ) – In the {{ill|Todai-ji Daibutsuden Battle|ja|東大寺大仏殿の戦い}} , due to a surprise attack by {{ill|Matsunaga Hisahide|ja|松永久秀}} , the {{ill|Todai-ji Daibutsuden|ja|東大寺大仏殿}} burned down. * {{ill|Tenshō|ja|天正|1=Tenshō (Momoyama period)|lt=Tenshō Era}} 5th year ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]] {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1577|ja|1577th year }} {{ill|November 19|ja|11月19日}} ) – In the {{ill|Shigisan Castle Battle|ja|信貴山城の戦い}} , {{ill|Matsunaga Hisahide|ja|松永久秀}} shattered the famed weapon {{ill|Kotenyō Heipingumo|ja|古天明平蜘蛛}} and subsequently committed suicide. * {{ill|Kanei|ja|寛永}} 6th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1629|ja|1629th year }} {{ill|November 24|ja|11月24日}} ) – Fuku, the wet nurse of {{ill|Tokugawa Iemitsu|ja|徳川家光}} , entered the palace and received the title of {{ill|Kasuga no Tsubone|ja|春日局}} .
== Births == * {{ill|Genpō|ja|元豊 (宋)}} 5th year ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]] {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1082|ja|1082nd year }} {{ill|November 2|ja|11月2日}} ) – {{ill|Huizong|ja|徽宗}} , the 8th emperor of the {{ill|Northern Song|ja|北宋}} (died {{ill|1135|ja|1135th year }} ). * {{ill|Kenpo|ja|建保}} 6th year ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]] {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1218|ja|1218th year }} {{ill|October 30|ja|10月30日}} ) – {{ill|Emperor Chūkō|ja|仲恭天皇}} , the 85th {{ill|Emperor|ja|天皇}} (died {{ill|1234|ja|1234th year }} ). * {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保}} 1st year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1830|ja|1830th year }} {{ill|November 24|ja|11月24日}} ) – {{ill|Seikawa Hachirō|ja|清河八郎}} , founder of the Mibu rōshitai (the precursor to the {{ill|Shinsengumi|ja|新選組}} ) (died {{ill|1863|ja|1863rd year }} ). * {{ill|Dōkō|ja|道光}} 15th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1835|ja|1835th year }} {{ill|November 29|ja|11月29日}} ) – {{ill|Empress Dowager Cixi|ja|慈禧太后}} (Western Empress Dowager), consort of {{ill|Emperor Xianfeng|ja|咸豊帝}} and a de facto dictator of the late {{ill|Qing Dynasty|ja|清}} (died {{ill|1908|ja|1908th year }} ). * {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保}} 13th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1842|ja|1842nd year }} {{ill|November 12|ja|11月12日}} ) – {{ill|Ōyama Gen|ja|大山厳}} , Marshal of the Army (died {{ill|1916|ja|1916th year }} ).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Hakuchi|ja|白雉}} 5th year ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]] {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|654|ja|654th year }} {{ill|November 24|ja|11月24日}} ) – {{ill|Emperor Kōtoku|ja|孝徳天皇}} , the 36th Emperor. * {{ill|Tenshō|ja|天正|1=Tenshō (Momoyama period)|lt=Tenshō Era}} 5th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1577|ja|1577th year }} {{ill|November 19|ja|11月19日}} ) – {{ill|Matsunaga Hisahide|ja|松永久秀}} , a {{ill|samurai|ja|Samurai}} (born {{ill|1510|ja|1510th year }} ). * {{ill|Hōei|ja|宝永}} 4th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1707|ja|1707th year }} {{ill|November 3|ja|11月3日}} ) – {{ill|Utsunomiya Tonan|ja|宇都宮遯庵}} , a Confucian scholar (born {{ill|1633|ja|1633rd year }} ). * {{ill|Kyōhō|ja|享保}} 4th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1719|ja|1719th year }} {{ill|November 21|ja|11月21日}} ) – {{ill|Yamamoto Tsuna|ja|山本常朝}} , a {{ill|samurai|ja|Samurai}} (born {{ill|1659|ja|1659th year }} ). * {{ill|Enkyō|ja|Enkyō}} 4th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1747|ja|1747th year }} {{ill|November 12|ja|11月12日}} ) – {{ill|Shimazu Yoshitaka|ja|島津吉貴}} , the 4th lord of the {{ill|Satsuma Domain|ja|薩摩藩}} (born {{ill|1675|ja|1675th year }} ).
== Commemorations == {{ill|Tokan'ya|ja|十日夜}} (とおかんや)

== Events == * {{ill|Eiroku|ja|永禄}} 10th year ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]] {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1567|ja|1567th year }} {{ill|November 10|ja|11月10日}} ) – In the {{ill|Todai-ji Daibutsuden Battle|ja|東大寺大仏殿の戦い}} , due to a surprise attack by {{ill|Matsunaga Hisahide|ja|松永久秀}} , the {{ill|Todai-ji Daibutsuden|ja|東大寺大仏殿}} burned down. * {{ill|Tenshō|ja|天正|1=Tenshō (Momoyama period)|lt=Tenshō Era}} 5th year ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]] {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1577|ja|1577th year }} {{ill|November 19|ja|11月19日}} ) – In the {{ill|Shigisan Castle Battle|ja|信貴山城の戦い}} , {{ill|Matsunaga Hisahide|ja|松永久秀}} shattered the famed weapon {{ill|Kotenyō Heipingumo|ja|古天明平蜘蛛}} and subsequently committed suicide. * {{ill|Kanei|ja|寛永}} 6th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1629|ja|1629th year }} {{ill|November 24|ja|11月24日}} ) – Fuku, the wet nurse of {{ill|Tokugawa Iemitsu|ja|徳川家光}} , entered the palace and received the title of {{ill|Kasuga no Tsubone|ja|春日局}} .

== Deaths == * {{ill|Hakuchi|ja|白雉}} 5th year ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]] {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|654|ja|654th year }} {{ill|November 24|ja|11月24日}} ) – {{ill|Emperor Kōtoku|ja|孝徳天皇}} , the 36th Emperor. * {{ill|Tenshō|ja|天正|1=Tenshō (Momoyama period)|lt=Tenshō Era}} 5th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1577|ja|1577th year }} {{ill|November 19|ja|11月19日}} ) – {{ill|Matsunaga Hisahide|ja|松永久秀}} , a {{ill|samurai|ja|Samurai}} (born {{ill|1510|ja|1510th year }} ). * {{ill|Hōei|ja|宝永}} 4th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1707|ja|1707th year }} {{ill|November 3|ja|11月3日}} ) – {{ill|Utsunomiya Tonan|ja|宇都宮遯庵}} , a Confucian scholar (born {{ill|1633|ja|1633rd year }} ). * {{ill|Kyōhō|ja|享保}} 4th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1719|ja|1719th year }} {{ill|November 21|ja|11月21日}} ) – {{ill|Yamamoto Tsuna|ja|山本常朝}} , a {{ill|samurai|ja|Samurai}} (born {{ill|1659|ja|1659th year }} ). * {{ill|Enkyō|ja|Enkyō}} 4th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1747|ja|1747th year }} {{ill|November 12|ja|11月12日}} ) – {{ill|Shimazu Yoshitaka|ja|島津吉貴}} , the 4th lord of the {{ill|Satsuma Domain|ja|薩摩藩}} (born {{ill|1675|ja|1675th year }} ).
== Commemorations == {{ill|Tokan'ya|ja|十日夜}} (とおかんや)

It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Senshō|ja|先勝}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Eiroku|ja|永禄}} 10th year ( {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1567|ja|1567th year }} {{ill|November 10|ja|11月10日}} ) – In the {{ill|Todai-ji Daibutsuden Battle|ja|東大寺大仏殿の戦い}} , due to a surprise attack by {{ill|Matsunaga Hisahide|ja|松永久秀}} , the {{ill|Todai-ji Daibutsuden|ja|東大寺大仏殿}} burned down. * {{ill|Tenshō|ja|天正|1=Tenshō (Momoyama period)|lt=Tenshō Era}} 5th year ( {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1577|ja|1577th year }} {{ill|November 19|ja|11月19日}} ) – In the {{ill|Shigisan Castle Battle|ja|信貴山城の戦い}} , {{ill|Matsunaga Hisahide|ja|松永久秀}} shattered the famed weapon {{ill|Kotenyō Heipingumo|ja|古天明平蜘蛛}} and subsequently committed suicide. * {{ill|Kanei|ja|寛永}} 6th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1629|ja|1629th year }} {{ill|November 24|ja|11月24日}} ) – Fuku, the wet nurse of {{ill|Tokugawa Iemitsu|ja|徳川家光}} , entered the palace and received the title of {{ill|Kasuga no Tsubone|ja|春日局}} .
== Births == * {{ill|Genpō|ja|元豊 (宋)}} 5th year ( {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1082|ja|1082nd year }} {{ill|November 2|ja|11月2日}} ) – {{ill|Huizong|ja|徽宗}} , the 8th emperor of the {{ill|Northern Song|ja|北宋}} (died {{ill|1135|ja|1135th year }} ). * {{ill|Kenpo|ja|建保}} 6th year ( {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1218|ja|1218th year }} {{ill|October 30|ja|10月30日}} ) – {{ill|Emperor Chūkō|ja|仲恭天皇}} , the 85th {{ill|Emperor|ja|天皇}} (died {{ill|1234|ja|1234th year }} ). * {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保}} 1st year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1830|ja|1830th year }} {{ill|November 24|ja|11月24日}} ) – {{ill|Seikawa Hachirō|ja|清河八郎}} , founder of the Mibu rōshitai (the precursor to the {{ill|Shinsengumi|ja|新選組}} ) (died {{ill|1863|ja|1863rd year }} ). * {{ill|Dōkō|ja|道光}} 15th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1835|ja|1835th year }} {{ill|November 29|ja|11月29日}} ) – {{ill|Empress Dowager Cixi|ja|慈禧太后}} (Western Empress Dowager), consort of {{ill|Emperor Xianfeng|ja|咸豊帝}} and a de facto dictator of the late {{ill|Qing Dynasty|ja|清}} (died {{ill|1908|ja|1908th year }} ). * {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保}} 13th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1842|ja|1842nd year }} {{ill|November 12|ja|11月12日}} ) – {{ill|Ōyama Gen|ja|大山厳}} , Marshal of the Army (died {{ill|1916|ja|1916th year }} ).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Hakuchi|ja|白雉}} 5th year ( {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|654|ja|654th year }} {{ill|November 24|ja|11月24日}} ) – {{ill|Emperor Kōtoku|ja|孝徳天皇}} , the 36th Emperor. * {{ill|Tenshō|ja|天正|1=Tenshō (Momoyama period)|lt=Tenshō Era}} 5th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1577|ja|1577th year }} {{ill|November 19|ja|11月19日}} ) – {{ill|Matsunaga Hisahide|ja|松永久秀}} , a {{ill|samurai|ja|Samurai}} (born {{ill|1510|ja|1510th year }} ). * {{ill|Hōei|ja|宝永}} 4th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1707|ja|1707th year }} {{ill|November 3|ja|11月3日}} ) – {{ill|Utsunomiya Tonan|ja|宇都宮遯庵}} , a Confucian scholar (born {{ill|1633|ja|1633rd year }} ). * {{ill|Kyōhō|ja|享保}} 4th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1719|ja|1719th year }} {{ill|November 21|ja|11月21日}} ) – {{ill|Yamamoto Tsuna|ja|山本常朝}} , a {{ill|samurai|ja|Samurai}} (born {{ill|1659|ja|1659th year }} ). * {{ill|Enkyō|ja|Enkyō}} 4th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1747|ja|1747th year }} {{ill|November 12|ja|11月12日}} ) – {{ill|Shimazu Yoshitaka|ja|島津吉貴}} , the 4th lord of the {{ill|Satsuma Domain|ja|薩摩藩}} (born {{ill|1675|ja|1675th year }} ).
== Commemorations == {{ill|Tokan'ya|ja|十日夜}} (とおかんや)
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|10|9|10|11|9|10|11|10|1010}}

It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=draft}} day is {{ill|Senshō|ja|先勝|12=draft}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Eiroku|ja|永禄|12=draft}} 10th year ( {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft}} {{ill|1567|ja|1567th year|12=draft}} {{ill|November 10|ja|11月10日|12=draft}} ) – In the {{ill|Todai-ji Daibutsuden Battle|ja|東大寺大仏殿の戦い|12=draft}} , due to a surprise attack by {{ill|Matsunaga Hisahide|ja|松永久秀|12=draft}} , the {{ill|Todai-ji Daibutsuden|ja|東大寺大仏殿|12=draft}} burned down. * {{ill|Tenshō|ja|天正|1=Tenshō (Momoyama period)|lt=Tenshō Era|12=draft}} 5th year ( {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft}} {{ill|1577|ja|1577th year|12=draft}} {{ill|November 19|ja|11月19日|12=draft}} ) – In the {{ill|Shigisan Castle Battle|ja|信貴山城の戦い|12=draft}} , {{ill|Matsunaga Hisahide|ja|松永久秀|12=draft}} shattered the famed weapon {{ill|Kotenyō Heipingumo|ja|古天明平蜘蛛|12=draft}} and subsequently committed suicide. * {{ill|Kanei|ja|寛永|12=draft}} 6th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft}} {{ill|1629|ja|1629th year|12=draft}} {{ill|November 24|ja|11月24日|12=draft}} ) – Fuku, the wet nurse of {{ill|Tokugawa Iemitsu|ja|徳川家光|12=draft}} , entered the palace and received the title of {{ill|Kasuga no Tsubone|ja|春日局|12=draft}} .
== Births == * {{ill|Genpō|ja|元豊 (宋)|12=draft}} 5th year ( {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft}} {{ill|1082|ja|1082nd year|12=draft}} {{ill|November 2|ja|11月2日|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Huizong|ja|徽宗|12=draft}} , the 8th emperor of the {{ill|Northern Song|ja|北宋|12=draft}} (died {{ill|1135|ja|1135th year|12=draft}} ). * {{ill|Kenpo|ja|建保|12=draft}} 6th year ( {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft}} {{ill|1218|ja|1218th year|12=draft}} {{ill|October 30|ja|10月30日|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Emperor Chūkō|ja|仲恭天皇|12=draft}} , the 85th {{ill|Emperor|ja|天皇|12=draft}} (died {{ill|1234|ja|1234th year|12=draft}} ). * {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保|12=draft}} 1st year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft}} {{ill|1830|ja|1830th year|12=draft}} {{ill|November 24|ja|11月24日|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Seikawa Hachirō|ja|清河八郎|12=draft}} , founder of the Mibu rōshitai (the precursor to the {{ill|Shinsengumi|ja|新選組|12=draft}} ) (died {{ill|1863|ja|1863rd year|12=draft}} ). * {{ill|Dōkō|ja|道光|12=draft}} 15th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft}} {{ill|1835|ja|1835th year|12=draft}} {{ill|November 29|ja|11月29日|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Empress Dowager Cixi|ja|慈禧太后|12=draft}} (Western Empress Dowager), consort of {{ill|Emperor Xianfeng|ja|咸豊帝|12=draft}} and a de facto dictator of the late {{ill|Qing Dynasty|ja|清|12=draft}} (died {{ill|1908|ja|1908th year|12=draft}} ). * {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保|12=draft}} 13th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft}} {{ill|1842|ja|1842nd year|12=draft}} {{ill|November 12|ja|11月12日|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Ōyama Gen|ja|大山厳|12=draft}} , Marshal of the Army (died {{ill|1916|ja|1916th year|12=draft}} ).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Hakuchi|ja|白雉|12=draft}} 5th year ( {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft}} {{ill|654|ja|654th year|12=draft}} {{ill|November 24|ja|11月24日|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Emperor Kōtoku|ja|孝徳天皇|12=draft}} , the 36th Emperor. * {{ill|Tenshō|ja|天正|1=Tenshō (Momoyama period)|lt=Tenshō Era|12=draft}} 5th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft}} {{ill|1577|ja|1577th year|12=draft}} {{ill|November 19|ja|11月19日|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Matsunaga Hisahide|ja|松永久秀|12=draft}} , a {{ill|samurai|ja|Samurai|12=draft}} (born {{ill|1510|ja|1510th year|12=draft}} ). * {{ill|Hōei|ja|宝永|12=draft}} 4th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft}} {{ill|1707|ja|1707th year|12=draft}} {{ill|November 3|ja|11月3日|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Utsunomiya Tonan|ja|宇都宮遯庵|12=draft}} , a Confucian scholar (born {{ill|1633|ja|1633rd year|12=draft}} ). * {{ill|Kyōhō|ja|享保|12=draft}} 4th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft}} {{ill|1719|ja|1719th year|12=draft}} {{ill|November 21|ja|11月21日|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Yamamoto Tsuna|ja|山本常朝|12=draft}} , a {{ill|samurai|ja|Samurai|12=draft}} (born {{ill|1659|ja|1659th year|12=draft}} ). * {{ill|Enkyō|ja|Enkyō|12=draft}} 4th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft}} {{ill|1747|ja|1747th year|12=draft}} {{ill|November 12|ja|11月12日|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Shimazu Yoshitaka|ja|島津吉貴|12=draft}} , the 4th lord of the {{ill|Satsuma Domain|ja|薩摩藩|12=draft}} (born {{ill|1675|ja|1675th year|12=draft}} ).
== Commemorations == {{ill|Tokan'ya|ja|十日夜|12=draft}} (とおかんや)
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|10|9|10|11|9|10|11|10|1010}}

[[cdo:10 nguŏk 10 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:10 goe̍h 10 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十月初十]] {{Lunisolar October}} '''October 10''' is the 10th day of month {{ill|October (Lunisolar)|ja|10月 (旧暦)|lt=Kannazuki|1=Kannazuki|12=draft|12=draft}} the 10th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=draft|12=draft}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=draft|12=draft}} day is {{ill|Senshō|ja|先勝|12=draft|12=draft}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Eiroku|ja|永禄|12=draft|12=draft}} 10th year ( {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1567|ja|1567th year|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|November 10|ja|11月10日|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – In the {{ill|Todai-ji Daibutsuden Battle|ja|東大寺大仏殿の戦い|12=draft|12=draft}} , due to a surprise attack by {{ill|Matsunaga Hisahide|ja|松永久秀|12=draft|12=draft}} , the {{ill|Todai-ji Daibutsuden|ja|東大寺大仏殿|12=draft|12=draft}} burned down. * {{ill|Tenshō|ja|天正|1=Tenshō (Momoyama period)|lt=Tenshō Era|12=draft|12=draft}} 5th year ( {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1577|ja|1577th year|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|November 19|ja|11月19日|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – In the {{ill|Shigisan Castle Battle|ja|信貴山城の戦い|12=draft|12=draft}} , {{ill|Matsunaga Hisahide|ja|松永久秀|12=draft|12=draft}} shattered the famed weapon {{ill|Kotenyō Heipingumo|ja|古天明平蜘蛛|12=draft|12=draft}} and subsequently committed suicide. * {{ill|Kanei|ja|寛永|12=draft|12=draft}} 6th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1629|ja|1629th year|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|November 24|ja|11月24日|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – Fuku, the wet nurse of {{ill|Tokugawa Iemitsu|ja|徳川家光|12=draft|12=draft}} , entered the palace and received the title of {{ill|Kasuga no Tsubone|ja|春日局|12=draft|12=draft}} .
== Births == * {{ill|Genpō|ja|元豊 (宋)|12=draft|12=draft}} 5th year ( {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1082|ja|1082nd year|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|November 2|ja|11月2日|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Huizong|ja|徽宗|12=draft|12=draft}} , the 8th emperor of the {{ill|Northern Song|ja|北宋|12=draft|12=draft}} (died {{ill|1135|ja|1135th year|12=draft|12=draft}} ). * {{ill|Kenpo|ja|建保|12=draft|12=draft}} 6th year ( {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1218|ja|1218th year|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|October 30|ja|10月30日|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Emperor Chūkō|ja|仲恭天皇|12=draft|12=draft}} , the 85th {{ill|Emperor|ja|天皇|12=draft|12=draft}} (died {{ill|1234|ja|1234th year|12=draft|12=draft}} ). * {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保|12=draft|12=draft}} 1st year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1830|ja|1830th year|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|November 24|ja|11月24日|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Seikawa Hachirō|ja|清河八郎|12=draft|12=draft}} , founder of the Mibu rōshitai (the precursor to the {{ill|Shinsengumi|ja|新選組|12=draft|12=draft}} ) (died {{ill|1863|ja|1863rd year|12=draft|12=draft}} ). * {{ill|Dōkō|ja|道光|12=draft|12=draft}} 15th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1835|ja|1835th year|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|November 29|ja|11月29日|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Empress Dowager Cixi|ja|慈禧太后|12=draft|12=draft}} (Western Empress Dowager), consort of {{ill|Emperor Xianfeng|ja|咸豊帝|12=draft|12=draft}} and a de facto dictator of the late {{ill|Qing Dynasty|ja|清|12=draft|12=draft}} (died {{ill|1908|ja|1908th year|12=draft|12=draft}} ). * {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保|12=draft|12=draft}} 13th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1842|ja|1842nd year|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|November 12|ja|11月12日|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Ōyama Gen|ja|大山厳|12=draft|12=draft}} , Marshal of the Army (died {{ill|1916|ja|1916th year|12=draft|12=draft}} ).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Hakuchi|ja|白雉|12=draft|12=draft}} 5th year ( {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|654|ja|654th year|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|November 24|ja|11月24日|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Emperor Kōtoku|ja|孝徳天皇|12=draft|12=draft}} , the 36th Emperor. * {{ill|Tenshō|ja|天正|1=Tenshō (Momoyama period)|lt=Tenshō Era|12=draft|12=draft}} 5th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1577|ja|1577th year|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|November 19|ja|11月19日|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Matsunaga Hisahide|ja|松永久秀|12=draft|12=draft}} , a {{ill|samurai|ja|Samurai|12=draft|12=draft}} (born {{ill|1510|ja|1510th year|12=draft|12=draft}} ). * {{ill|Hōei|ja|宝永|12=draft|12=draft}} 4th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1707|ja|1707th year|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|November 3|ja|11月3日|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Utsunomiya Tonan|ja|宇都宮遯庵|12=draft|12=draft}} , a Confucian scholar (born {{ill|1633|ja|1633rd year|12=draft|12=draft}} ). * {{ill|Kyōhō|ja|享保|12=draft|12=draft}} 4th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1719|ja|1719th year|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|November 21|ja|11月21日|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Yamamoto Tsuna|ja|山本常朝|12=draft|12=draft}} , a {{ill|samurai|ja|Samurai|12=draft|12=draft}} (born {{ill|1659|ja|1659th year|12=draft|12=draft}} ). * {{ill|Enkyō|ja|Enkyō|12=draft|12=draft}} 4th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1747|ja|1747th year|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|November 12|ja|11月12日|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Shimazu Yoshitaka|ja|島津吉貴|12=draft|12=draft}} , the 4th lord of the {{ill|Satsuma Domain|ja|薩摩藩|12=draft|12=draft}} (born {{ill|1675|ja|1675th year|12=draft|12=draft}} ).
== Commemorations == {{ill|Tokan'ya|ja|十日夜|12=draft|12=draft}} (とおかんや)
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|10|9|10|11|9|10|11|10|1010}}

It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=draft|12=draft}} day is {{ill|Senshō|ja|先勝|12=draft|12=draft}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Eiroku|ja|永禄|12=draft|12=draft}} 10th year ( {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1567|ja|1567th year|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|November 10|ja|11月10日|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – In the {{ill|Todai-ji Daibutsuden Battle|ja|東大寺大仏殿の戦い|12=draft|12=draft}} , due to a surprise attack by {{ill|Matsunaga Hisahide|ja|松永久秀|12=draft|12=draft}} , the {{ill|Todai-ji Daibutsuden|ja|東大寺大仏殿|12=draft|12=draft}} burned down. * {{ill|Tenshō|ja|天正|1=Tenshō (Momoyama period)|lt=Tenshō Era|12=draft|12=draft}} 5th year ( {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1577|ja|1577th year|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|November 19|ja|11月19日|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – In the {{ill|Shigisan Castle Battle|ja|信貴山城の戦い|12=draft|12=draft}} , {{ill|Matsunaga Hisahide|ja|松永久秀|12=draft|12=draft}} shattered the famed weapon {{ill|Kotenyō Heipingumo|ja|古天明平蜘蛛|12=draft|12=draft}} and subsequently committed suicide. * {{ill|Kanei|ja|寛永|12=draft|12=draft}} 6th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1629|ja|1629th year|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|November 24|ja|11月24日|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – Fuku, the wet nurse of {{ill|Tokugawa Iemitsu|ja|徳川家光|12=draft|12=draft}} , entered the palace and received the title of {{ill|Kasuga no Tsubone|ja|春日局|12=draft|12=draft}} .
== Births == * {{ill|Genpō|ja|元豊 (宋)|12=draft|12=draft}} 5th year ( {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1082|ja|1082nd year|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|November 2|ja|11月2日|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Huizong|ja|徽宗|12=draft|12=draft}} , the 8th emperor of the {{ill|Northern Song|ja|北宋|12=draft|12=draft}} (died {{ill|1135|ja|1135th year|12=draft|12=draft}} ). * {{ill|Kenpo|ja|建保|12=draft|12=draft}} 6th year ( {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1218|ja|1218th year|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|October 30|ja|10月30日|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Emperor Chūkō|ja|仲恭天皇|12=draft|12=draft}} , the 85th {{ill|Emperor|ja|天皇|12=draft|12=draft}} (died {{ill|1234|ja|1234th year|12=draft|12=draft}} ). * {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保|12=draft|12=draft}} 1st year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1830|ja|1830th year|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|November 24|ja|11月24日|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Seikawa Hachirō|ja|清河八郎|12=draft|12=draft}} , founder of the Mibu rōshitai (the precursor to the {{ill|Shinsengumi|ja|新選組|12=draft|12=draft}} ) (died {{ill|1863|ja|1863rd year|12=draft|12=draft}} ). * {{ill|Dōkō|ja|道光|12=draft|12=draft}} 15th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1835|ja|1835th year|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|November 29|ja|11月29日|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Empress Dowager Cixi|ja|慈禧太后|12=draft|12=draft}} (Western Empress Dowager), consort of {{ill|Emperor Xianfeng|ja|咸豊帝|12=draft|12=draft}} and a de facto dictator of the late {{ill|Qing Dynasty|ja|清|12=draft|12=draft}} (died {{ill|1908|ja|1908th year|12=draft|12=draft}} ). * {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保|12=draft|12=draft}} 13th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1842|ja|1842nd year|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|November 12|ja|11月12日|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Ōyama Gen|ja|大山厳|12=draft|12=draft}} , Marshal of the Army (died {{ill|1916|ja|1916th year|12=draft|12=draft}} ).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Hakuchi|ja|白雉|12=draft|12=draft}} 5th year ( {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|654|ja|654th year|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|November 24|ja|11月24日|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Emperor Kōtoku|ja|孝徳天皇|12=draft|12=draft}} , the 36th Emperor. * {{ill|Tenshō|ja|天正|1=Tenshō (Momoyama period)|lt=Tenshō Era|12=draft|12=draft}} 5th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1577|ja|1577th year|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|November 19|ja|11月19日|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Matsunaga Hisahide|ja|松永久秀|12=draft|12=draft}} , a {{ill|samurai|ja|Samurai|12=draft|12=draft}} (born {{ill|1510|ja|1510th year|12=draft|12=draft}} ). * {{ill|Hōei|ja|宝永|12=draft|12=draft}} 4th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1707|ja|1707th year|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|November 3|ja|11月3日|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Utsunomiya Tonan|ja|宇都宮遯庵|12=draft|12=draft}} , a Confucian scholar (born {{ill|1633|ja|1633rd year|12=draft|12=draft}} ). * {{ill|Kyōhō|ja|享保|12=draft|12=draft}} 4th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1719|ja|1719th year|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|November 21|ja|11月21日|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Yamamoto Tsuna|ja|山本常朝|12=draft|12=draft}} , a {{ill|samurai|ja|Samurai|12=draft|12=draft}} (born {{ill|1659|ja|1659th year|12=draft|12=draft}} ). * {{ill|Enkyō|ja|Enkyō|12=draft|12=draft}} 4th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1747|ja|1747th year|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|November 12|ja|11月12日|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Shimazu Yoshitaka|ja|島津吉貴|12=draft|12=draft}} , the 4th lord of the {{ill|Satsuma Domain|ja|薩摩藩|12=draft|12=draft}} (born {{ill|1675|ja|1675th year|12=draft|12=draft}} ).
== Commemorations == {{ill|Tokan'ya|ja|十日夜|12=draft|12=draft}} (とおかんや)
== See Also ==

[[cdo:10 nguŏk 10 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:10 goe̍h 10 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十月初十]] {{Lunisolar October}} '''October 10''' is the 10th day of month {{ill|October (Lunisolar)|ja|10月 (旧暦)|lt=Kannazuki|1=Kannazuki|12=draft|12=draft}} the 10th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=draft|12=draft}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=draft|12=draft}} day is {{ill|Senshō|ja|先勝|12=draft|12=draft}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Eiroku|ja|永禄|12=draft|12=draft}} 10th year ( {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1567|ja|1567th year|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|November 10|ja|11月10日|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – In the {{ill|Todai-ji Daibutsuden Battle|ja|東大寺大仏殿の戦い|12=draft|12=draft}} , due to a surprise attack by {{ill|Matsunaga Hisahide|ja|松永久秀|12=draft|12=draft}} , the {{ill|Todai-ji Daibutsuden|ja|東大寺大仏殿|12=draft|12=draft}} burned down. * {{ill|Tenshō|ja|天正|1=Tenshō (Momoyama period)|lt=Tenshō Era|12=draft|12=draft}} 5th year ( {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1577|ja|1577th year|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|November 19|ja|11月19日|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – In the {{ill|Shigisan Castle Battle|ja|信貴山城の戦い|12=draft|12=draft}} , {{ill|Matsunaga Hisahide|ja|松永久秀|12=draft|12=draft}} shattered the famed weapon {{ill|Kotenyō Heipingumo|ja|古天明平蜘蛛|12=draft|12=draft}} and subsequently committed suicide. * {{ill|Kanei|ja|寛永|12=draft|12=draft}} 6th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1629|ja|1629th year|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|November 24|ja|11月24日|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – Fuku, the wet nurse of {{ill|Tokugawa Iemitsu|ja|徳川家光|12=draft|12=draft}} , entered the palace and received the title of {{ill|Kasuga no Tsubone|ja|春日局|12=draft|12=draft}} .
== Births == * {{ill|Genpō|ja|元豊 (宋)|12=draft|12=draft}} 5th year ( {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1082|ja|1082nd year|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|November 2|ja|11月2日|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Huizong|ja|徽宗|12=draft|12=draft}} , the 8th emperor of the {{ill|Northern Song|ja|北宋|12=draft|12=draft}} (died {{ill|1135|ja|1135th year|12=draft|12=draft}} ). * {{ill|Kenpo|ja|建保|12=draft|12=draft}} 6th year ( {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1218|ja|1218th year|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|October 30|ja|10月30日|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Emperor Chūkō|ja|仲恭天皇|12=draft|12=draft}} , the 85th {{ill|Emperor|ja|天皇|12=draft|12=draft}} (died {{ill|1234|ja|1234th year|12=draft|12=draft}} ). * {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保|12=draft|12=draft}} 1st year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1830|ja|1830th year|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|November 24|ja|11月24日|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Seikawa Hachirō|ja|清河八郎|12=draft|12=draft}} , founder of the Mibu rōshitai (the precursor to the {{ill|Shinsengumi|ja|新選組|12=draft|12=draft}} ) (died {{ill|1863|ja|1863rd year|12=draft|12=draft}} ). * {{ill|Dōkō|ja|道光|12=draft|12=draft}} 15th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1835|ja|1835th year|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|November 29|ja|11月29日|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Empress Dowager Cixi|ja|慈禧太后|12=draft|12=draft}} (Western Empress Dowager), consort of {{ill|Emperor Xianfeng|ja|咸豊帝|12=draft|12=draft}} and a de facto dictator of the late {{ill|Qing Dynasty|ja|清|12=draft|12=draft}} (died {{ill|1908|ja|1908th year|12=draft|12=draft}} ). * {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保|12=draft|12=draft}} 13th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1842|ja|1842nd year|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|November 12|ja|11月12日|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Ōyama Gen|ja|大山厳|12=draft|12=draft}} , Marshal of the Army (died {{ill|1916|ja|1916th year|12=draft|12=draft}} ).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Hakuchi|ja|白雉|12=draft|12=draft}} 5th year ( {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|654|ja|654th year|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|November 24|ja|11月24日|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Emperor Kōtoku|ja|孝徳天皇|12=draft|12=draft}} , the 36th Emperor. * {{ill|Tenshō|ja|天正|1=Tenshō (Momoyama period)|lt=Tenshō Era|12=draft|12=draft}} 5th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1577|ja|1577th year|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|November 19|ja|11月19日|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Matsunaga Hisahide|ja|松永久秀|12=draft|12=draft}} , a {{ill|samurai|ja|Samurai|12=draft|12=draft}} (born {{ill|1510|ja|1510th year|12=draft|12=draft}} ). * {{ill|Hōei|ja|宝永|12=draft|12=draft}} 4th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1707|ja|1707th year|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|November 3|ja|11月3日|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Utsunomiya Tonan|ja|宇都宮遯庵|12=draft|12=draft}} , a Confucian scholar (born {{ill|1633|ja|1633rd year|12=draft|12=draft}} ). * {{ill|Kyōhō|ja|享保|12=draft|12=draft}} 4th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1719|ja|1719th year|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|November 21|ja|11月21日|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Yamamoto Tsuna|ja|山本常朝|12=draft|12=draft}} , a {{ill|samurai|ja|Samurai|12=draft|12=draft}} (born {{ill|1659|ja|1659th year|12=draft|12=draft}} ). * {{ill|Enkyō|ja|Enkyō|12=draft|12=draft}} 4th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1747|ja|1747th year|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|November 12|ja|11月12日|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Shimazu Yoshitaka|ja|島津吉貴|12=draft|12=draft}} , the 4th lord of the {{ill|Satsuma Domain|ja|薩摩藩|12=draft|12=draft}} (born {{ill|1675|ja|1675th year|12=draft|12=draft}} ).

== Deaths == * {{ill|Hakuchi|ja|白雉|12=draft|12=draft}} 5th year ( {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|654|ja|654th year|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|November 24|ja|11月24日|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Emperor Kōtoku|ja|孝徳天皇|12=draft|12=draft}} , the 36th Emperor. * {{ill|Tenshō|ja|天正|1=Tenshō (Momoyama period)|lt=Tenshō Era|12=draft|12=draft}} 5th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1577|ja|1577th year|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|November 19|ja|11月19日|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Matsunaga Hisahide|ja|松永久秀|12=draft|12=draft}} , a {{ill|samurai|ja|Samurai|12=draft|12=draft}} (born {{ill|1510|ja|1510th year|12=draft|12=draft}} ). * {{ill|Hōei|ja|宝永|12=draft|12=draft}} 4th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1707|ja|1707th year|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|November 3|ja|11月3日|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Utsunomiya Tonan|ja|宇都宮遯庵|12=draft|12=draft}} , a Confucian scholar (born {{ill|1633|ja|1633rd year|12=draft|12=draft}} ). * {{ill|Kyōhō|ja|享保|12=draft|12=draft}} 4th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1719|ja|1719th year|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|November 21|ja|11月21日|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Yamamoto Tsuna|ja|山本常朝|12=draft|12=draft}} , a {{ill|samurai|ja|Samurai|12=draft|12=draft}} (born {{ill|1659|ja|1659th year|12=draft|12=draft}} ). * {{ill|Enkyō|ja|Enkyō|12=draft|12=draft}} 4th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1747|ja|1747th year|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|November 12|ja|11月12日|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Shimazu Yoshitaka|ja|島津吉貴|12=draft|12=draft}} , the 4th lord of the {{ill|Satsuma Domain|ja|薩摩藩|12=draft|12=draft}} (born {{ill|1675|ja|1675th year|12=draft|12=draft}} ).
== Commemorations == {{ill|Tokan'ya|ja|十日夜|12=draft|12=draft}} (とおかんや)

== Deaths == * {{ill|Hakuchi|ja|白雉|12=draft|12=draft}} 5th year ( {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|654|ja|654th year|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|November 24|ja|11月24日|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Emperor Kōtoku|ja|孝徳天皇|12=draft|12=draft}} , the 36th Emperor. * {{ill|Tenshō|ja|天正|1=Tenshō (Momoyama period)|lt=Tenshō Era|12=draft|12=draft}} 5th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1577|ja|1577th year|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|November 19|ja|11月19日|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Matsunaga Hisahide|ja|松永久秀|12=draft|12=draft}} , a {{ill|samurai|ja|Samurai|12=draft|12=draft}} (born {{ill|1510|ja|1510th year|12=draft|12=draft}} ). * {{ill|Hōei|ja|宝永|12=draft|12=draft}} 4th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1707|ja|1707th year|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|November 3|ja|11月3日|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Utsunomiya Tonan|ja|宇都宮遯庵|12=draft|12=draft}} , a Confucian scholar (born {{ill|1633|ja|1633rd year|12=draft|12=draft}} ). * {{ill|Kyōhō|ja|享保|12=draft|12=draft}} 4th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1719|ja|1719th year|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|November 21|ja|11月21日|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Yamamoto Tsuna|ja|山本常朝|12=draft|12=draft}} , a {{ill|samurai|ja|Samurai|12=draft|12=draft}} (born {{ill|1659|ja|1659th year|12=draft|12=draft}} ). * {{ill|Enkyō|ja|Enkyō|12=draft|12=draft}} 4th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1747|ja|1747th year|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|November 12|ja|11月12日|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Shimazu Yoshitaka|ja|島津吉貴|12=draft|12=draft}} , the 4th lord of the {{ill|Satsuma Domain|ja|薩摩藩|12=draft|12=draft}} (born {{ill|1675|ja|1675th year|12=draft|12=draft}} ).
== Commemorations == {{ill|Tokan'ya|ja|十日夜|12=draft|12=draft}} (とおかんや)

revision.text:
{{Not to be confused with|October 10|qq=October 10}}[[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]]<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=十月初十|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 10월 10일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar October|qq=}} '''October 10''' is the 10th day of month {{ill|October (Lunisolar)|ja|10月 (旧暦)|lt=October (Kannazuki)|1=Kannazuki|2=ja|3=10月 (旧暦)|1=Kannazuki|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/October (Lunisolar)|13=User:Immanuelle/Kannazuki|qq=|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} the 10th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Senshō|ja|先勝|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senshō|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜}} .
== Events == * [[:en:Eiroku|Eiroku]] 10th year ( [[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1567|1567]] [[:en:November 10|November 10]] ) – In the {{ill|Todai-ji Daibutsuden Battle|ja|東大寺大仏殿の戦い|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Todai-ji Daibutsuden Battle|qq=}} , due to a surprise attack by [[:en:Matsunaga Hisahide|Matsunaga Hisahide]] , the {{ill|Todai-ji Daibutsuden|ja|東大寺大仏殿|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Todai-ji Daibutsuden|qq=}} burned down. * [[:en:Tenshō (Momoyama period)|Tenshō Era]] 5th year ( [[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1577|1577]] [[:en:November 19|November 19]] ) – In the [[:en:Siege of Shigisan|Shigisan Castle Battle]] , [[:en:Matsunaga Hisahide|Matsunaga Hisahide]] shattered the famed weapon {{ill|Kotenyō Heipingumo|ja|古天明平蜘蛛|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kotenyō Heipingumo|qq=}} and subsequently committed suicide. * [[:en:Kan'ei|Kanei]] 6th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1629|1629]] [[:en:November 24|November 24]] ) – Fuku, the wet nurse of [[:en:Tokugawa Iemitsu|Tokugawa Iemitsu]] , entered the palace and received the title of [[:en:Lady Kasuga|Kasuga no Tsubone]] .
== Births == * {{ill|Genpō|ja|元豊 (宋)|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Genpō|qq=}} 5th year ( [[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1082|1082]] [[:en:November 2|November 2]] ) – [[:en:Emperor Huizong of Song|Huizong]] , the 8th emperor of the {{ill|Northern Song|ja|北宋|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Northern Song|qq=|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} (died [[:en:1135|1135]] ). * [[:en:Kempo (era)|Kenpo]] 6th year ( [[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1218|1218]] [[:en:October 30|October 30]] ) – [[:en:Emperor Chūkyō|Emperor Chūkō]] , the 85th [[:en:Emperor of Japan|Emperor]] (died [[:en:1234|1234]] ). * [[:en:Tenpō|Tenpō]] 1st year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1830|1830]] [[:en:November 24|November 24]] ) – {{ill|Seikawa Hachirō|ja|清河八郎|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Seikawa Hachirō|qq=}} , founder of the Mibu rōshitai (the precursor to the [[:en:Shinsengumi|Shinsengumi]] ) (died [[:en:1863|1863]] ). * {{ill|Dōkō|ja|道光|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Dōkō|qq=}} 15th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1835|1835]] [[:en:November 29|November 29]] ) – {{ill|Empress Dowager Cixi|ja|慈禧太后|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Empress Dowager Cixi|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 西太后}} (Western Empress Dowager), consort of [[:en:Xianfeng Emperor|Emperor Xianfeng]] and a de facto dictator of the late [[:en:Qing dynasty|Qing Dynasty]] (died [[:en:1908|1908]] ). * [[:en:Tenpō|Tenpō]] 13th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1842|1842]] [[:en:November 12|November 12]] ) – {{ill|Ōyama Gen|ja|大山厳|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōyama Gen|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 大山巌}} , Marshal of the Army (died [[:en:1916|1916]] ).
== Deaths == * [[:en:Hakuchi (era)|Hakuchi]] 5th year ( [[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:654|654]] [[:en:November 24|November 24]] ) – [[:en:Emperor Kōtoku|Emperor Kōtoku]] , the 36th Emperor. * [[:en:Tenshō (Momoyama period)|Tenshō Era]] 5th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1577|1577]] [[:en:November 19|November 19]] ) – [[:en:Matsunaga Hisahide|Matsunaga Hisahide]] , a {{ill|samurai|ja|Samurai|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/samurai|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to サムライ}} (born [[:en:1510|1510]] ). * [[:en:Hōei|Hōei]] 4th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1707|1707]] [[:en:November 3|November 3]] ) – {{ill|Utsunomiya Tonan|ja|宇都宮遯庵|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Utsunomiya Tonan|qq=}} , a Confucian scholar (born [[:en:1633|1633]] ). * [[:en:Kyōhō|Kyōhō]] 4th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1719|1719]] [[:en:November 21|November 21]] ) – [[:en:Yamamoto Tsunetomo|Yamamoto Tsuna]] , a {{ill|samurai|ja|Samurai|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/samurai|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to サムライ}} (born [[:en:1659|1659]] ). * {{ill|Enkyō|ja|Enkyō|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Enkyō|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} 4th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1747|1747]] [[:en:November 12|November 12]] ) – {{ill|Shimazu Yoshitaka|ja|島津吉貴|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shimazu Yoshitaka|qq=}} , the 4th lord of the [[:en:Satsuma Domain|Satsuma Domain]] (born [[:en:1675|1675]] ).
== Commemorations == {{ill|Tokan'ya|ja|十日夜|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tokan'ya|qq=}} (とおかんや)

Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. == Events == * [[:en:Eiroku|Eiroku]] 10th year ( [[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1567|1567]] [[:en:November 10|November 10]] ) – In the {{ill|Todai-ji Daibutsuden Battle|ja|東大寺大仏殿の戦い|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Todai-ji Daibutsuden Battle|qq=}} , due to a surprise attack by [[:en:Matsunaga Hisahide|Matsunaga Hisahide]] , the {{ill|Todai-ji Daibutsuden|ja|東大寺大仏殿|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Todai-ji Daibutsuden|qq=}} burned down. * [[:en:Tenshō (Momoyama period)|Tenshō Era]] 5th year ( [[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1577|1577]] [[:en:November 19|November 19]] ) – In the [[:en:Siege of Shigisan|Shigisan Castle Battle]] , [[:en:Matsunaga Hisahide|Matsunaga Hisahide]] shattered the famed weapon {{ill|Kotenyō Heipingumo|ja|古天明平蜘蛛|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kotenyō Heipingumo|qq=}} and subsequently committed suicide. * [[:en:Kan'ei|Kanei]] 6th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1629|1629]] [[:en:November 24|November 24]] ) – Fuku, the wet nurse of [[:en:Tokugawa Iemitsu|Tokugawa Iemitsu]] , entered the palace and received the title of [[:en:Lady Kasuga|Kasuga no Tsubone]] .

It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Senshō|ja|先勝|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}{{efn|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senshō|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}} .
== Events == * [[:en:Eiroku|Eiroku]] 10th year ( [[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1567|1567]] [[:en:November 10|November 10]] ) – In the {{ill|Todai-ji Daibutsuden Battle|ja|東大寺大仏殿の戦い|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Todai-ji Daibutsuden Battle|qq=|1=Battle of Tōdai-ji Daibutsuden|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11526465}} , due to a surprise attack by [[:en:Matsunaga Hisahide|Matsunaga Hisahide]] , the {{ill|Todai-ji Daibutsuden|ja|東大寺大仏殿|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Todai-ji Daibutsuden|qq=|1=Great Buddha Hall|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q3012032}} burned down. * [[:en:Tenshō (Momoyama period)|Tenshō Era]] 5th year ( [[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1577|1577]] [[:en:November 19|November 19]] ) – In the [[:en:Siege of Shigisan|Shigisan Castle Battle]] , [[:en:Matsunaga Hisahide|Matsunaga Hisahide]] shattered the famed weapon {{ill|Kotenyō Heipingumo|ja|古天明平蜘蛛|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kotenyō Heipingumo|qq=|1=Kotenmyō Hiragumo|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11411022}} and subsequently committed suicide. * [[:en:Kan'ei|Kanei]] 6th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1629|1629]] [[:en:November 24|November 24]] ) – Fuku, the wet nurse of [[:en:Tokugawa Iemitsu|Tokugawa Iemitsu]] , entered the palace and received the title of [[:en:Lady Kasuga|Kasuga no Tsubone]] .
== Births == * {{ill|Genpō|ja|元豊 (宋)|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Genpō|qq=|1=Yuanfeng|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10889531}} 5th year ( [[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1082|1082]] [[:en:November 2|November 2]] ) – [[:en:Emperor Huizong of Song|Huizong]] , the 8th emperor of the {{ill|Northern Song|ja|北宋|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Northern Song|qq=|comment=changed title based on wikidata|1=Northern Song dynasty|WD=Q319460}} (died [[:en:1135|1135]] ). * [[:en:Kempo (era)|Kenpo]] 6th year ( [[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1218|1218]] [[:en:October 30|October 30]] ) – [[:en:Emperor Chūkyō|Emperor Chūkō]] , the 85th [[:en:Emperor of Japan|Emperor]] (died [[:en:1234|1234]] ). * [[:en:Tenpō|Tenpō]] 1st year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1830|1830]] [[:en:November 24|November 24]] ) – {{ill|Seikawa Hachirō|ja|清河八郎|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Seikawa Hachirō|qq=|1=Kiyokawa Hachirō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q129812}} , founder of the Mibu rōshitai (the precursor to the [[:en:Shinsengumi|Shinsengumi]] ) (died [[:en:1863|1863]] ). * {{ill|Dōkō|ja|道光|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Dōkō|qq=|1=Daoguang Era|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1133186}} 15th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1835|1835]] [[:en:November 29|November 29]] ) – {{ill|Empress Dowager Cixi|ja|慈禧太后|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Empress Dowager Cixi|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 西太后|1=Empress Dowager Cixi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q47842}} (Western Empress Dowager), consort of [[:en:Xianfeng Emperor|Emperor Xianfeng]] and a de facto dictator of the late [[:en:Qing dynasty|Qing Dynasty]] (died [[:en:1908|1908]] ). * [[:en:Tenpō|Tenpō]] 13th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1842|1842]] [[:en:November 12|November 12]] ) – {{ill|Ōyama Gen|ja|大山厳|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōyama Gen|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 大山巌|1=Ōyama Iwao|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q359819}} , Marshal of the Army (died [[:en:1916|1916]] ).
== Deaths == * [[:en:Hakuchi (era)|Hakuchi]] 5th year ( [[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:654|654]] [[:en:November 24|November 24]] ) – [[:en:Emperor Kōtoku|Emperor Kōtoku]] , the 36th Emperor. * [[:en:Tenshō (Momoyama period)|Tenshō Era]] 5th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1577|1577]] [[:en:November 19|November 19]] ) – [[:en:Matsunaga Hisahide|Matsunaga Hisahide]] , a {{ill|samurai|ja|Samurai|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/samurai|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to サムライ|1=Samurai|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q529624}} (born [[:en:1510|1510]] ). * [[:en:Hōei|Hōei]] 4th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1707|1707]] [[:en:November 3|November 3]] ) – {{ill|Utsunomiya Tonan|ja|宇都宮遯庵|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Utsunomiya Tonan|qq=|1=Utsunomiya Ton'an|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q6561283}} , a Confucian scholar (born [[:en:1633|1633]] ). * [[:en:Kyōhō|Kyōhō]] 4th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1719|1719]] [[:en:November 21|November 21]] ) – [[:en:Yamamoto Tsunetomo|Yamamoto Tsuna]] , a {{ill|samurai|ja|Samurai|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/samurai|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to サムライ|1=Samurai|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q529624}} (born [[:en:1659|1659]] ). * {{ill|Enkyō|ja|Enkyō|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Enkyō|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} 4th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1747|1747]] [[:en:November 12|November 12]] ) – {{ill|Shimazu Yoshitaka|ja|島津吉貴|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shimazu Yoshitaka|qq=|1=Shimazu Yoshitaka|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11246537}} , the 4th lord of the [[:en:Satsuma Domain|Satsuma Domain]] (born [[:en:1675|1675]] ).

It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Senshū|qid=Q96759839}}{{efn|ja|先勝|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}{{efn|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senshō|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}} .
== Events == * [[:en:Eiroku|Eiroku]] 10th year ( [[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1567|1567]] [[:en:November 10|November 10]] ) – In the {{ill|Todai-ji Daibutsuden Battle|ja|東大寺大仏殿の戦い|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Todai-ji Daibutsuden Battle|qq=|1=Battle of Tōdai-ji Daibutsuden|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11526465}} , due to a surprise attack by [[:en:Matsunaga Hisahide|Matsunaga Hisahide]] , the {{ill|Todai-ji Daibutsuden|ja|東大寺大仏殿|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Todai-ji Daibutsuden|qq=|1=Great Buddha Hall|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q3012032}} burned down. * [[:en:Tenshō (Momoyama period)|Tenshō Era]] 5th year ( [[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1577|1577]] [[:en:November 19|November 19]] ) – In the [[:en:Siege of Shigisan|Shigisan Castle Battle]] , [[:en:Matsunaga Hisahide|Matsunaga Hisahide]] shattered the famed weapon {{ill|Kotenyō Heipingumo|ja|古天明平蜘蛛|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kotenyō Heipingumo|qq=|1=Kotenmyō Hiragumo|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11411022}} and subsequently committed suicide. * [[:en:Kan'ei|Kanei]] 6th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1629|1629]] [[:en:November 24|November 24]] ) – Fuku, the wet nurse of [[:en:Tokugawa Iemitsu|Tokugawa Iemitsu]] , entered the palace and received the title of [[:en:Lady Kasuga|Kasuga no Tsubone]] .

calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1082|1082]] [[:en:November 2|November 2]] ) – [[:en:Emperor Huizong of Song|Huizong]] , the 8th emperor of the {{ill|Northern (era)|Kenpo]] 6th year ( [[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1218|1218]] [[:en:October 30|October 30]] ) – [[:en:Emperor Chūkyō|Emperor Chūkō]] , the 85th [[:en:Emperor of Japan|Emperor]] (died [[:en:1234|1234]] ). * [[:en:Tenpō|Tenpō]] 1st year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1830|1830]] [[:en:November 24|November 24]] ) – {{ill|Seikawa Hachirō|ja|清河八郎|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Seikawa Hachirō|qq=|1=Kiyokawa Hachirō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q129812}} , founder of the Mibu rōshitai (the precursor to the [[:en:Shinsengumi|Shinsengumi]] ) (died [[:en:1863|1863]] ). * {{ill|Dōkō|ja|道光|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Dōkō|qq=|1=Daoguang Era|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1133186}} 15th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1835|1835]] [[:en:November 29|November 29]] ) – {{ill|Empress Dowager (Western Empress Dowager), consort of [[:en:Xianfeng Emperor|Emperor Xianfeng]] and a de facto dictator of the late [[:en:Qing dynasty|Qing Dynasty]] (died [[:en:1908|1908]] ). * [[:en:Tenpō|Tenpō]] == Deaths == * [[:en:Hakuchi (era)|Hakuchi]] 5th year ( [[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:654|654]] [[:en:November 24|November 24]] ) – [[:en:Emperor Kōtoku|Emperor Kōtoku]] , the 36th Emperor. * [[:en:Tenshō (Momoyama period)|Tenshō Era]] 5th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1577|1577]] [[:en:November 19|November 19]] ) – [[:en:Matsunaga Hisahide|Matsunaga Hisahide]] , a {{ill|samurai|ja|Samurai|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/samurai|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to サムライ|1=Samurai|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q529624}} (born [[:en:1510|1510]] ). * [[:en:Hōei|Hōei]] 4th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1707|1707]] [[:en:November 3|November 3]] ) – {{ill|Utsunomiya Tonan|ja|宇都宮遯庵|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Utsunomiya Tonan|qq=|1=Utsunomiya Ton'an|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q6561283}} , a Confucian scholar (born [[:en:1633|1633]] ). * [[:en:Kyōhō|Kyōhō]] 4th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1719|1719]] [[:en:November 21|November 21]] ) – [[:en:Yamamoto Tsunetomo|Yamamoto Tsuna]] , a {{ill|samurai|ja|Samurai|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/samurai|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to サムライ|1=Samurai|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q529624}} (born [[:en:1659|1659]] ). * {{ill|Enkyō|1=Enkyō (Edo period)|2=ja|3=延享|lt=Enkyō|ja|Enkyō|1=Enkyō (Edo period)|2=ja|3=延享|lt=Enkyō|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Enkyō|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} 4th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1747|1747]] [[:en:November 12|November 12]] ) – {{ill|Shimazu Yoshitaka|ja|島津吉貴|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shimazu Yoshitaka|qq=|1=Shimazu Yoshitaka|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11246537}} , the 4th lord of the [[:en:Satsuma Domain|Satsuma Domain]] (born [[:en:1675|1675]] ).

== Events == * [[:en:Eiroku|Eiroku]] 10th year ( [[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1567|1567]] [[:en:November 10|November 10]] ) – In the {{ill|Todai-ji Daibutsuden Battle|ja|東大寺大仏殿の戦い|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Todai-ji Daibutsuden Battle|qq=|1=Battle of Tōdai-ji Daibutsuden|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11526465}} , due to a surprise attack by [[:en:Matsunaga Hisahide|Matsunaga Hisahide]] , the {{ill|Todai-ji Daibutsuden|ja|東大寺大仏殿|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Todai-ji Daibutsuden|qq=|1=Great Buddha Hall|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q3012032}} burned down. * [[:en:Tenshō (Momoyama period)|Tenshō Era]] 5th year ( [[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1577|1577]] [[:en:November 19|November 19]] ) – In the [[:en:Siege of Shigisan|Shigisan Castle Battle]] , [[:en:Matsunaga Hisahide|Matsunaga Hisahide]] shattered the famed weapon {{ill|Kotenyō Heipingumo|ja|古天明平蜘蛛|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kotenyō Heipingumo|qq=|1=Kotenmyō Hiragumo|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11411022}} and subsequently committed suicide. * [[:en:Kan'ei|Kanei]] 6th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1629|1629]] [[:en:November 24|November 24]] ) – Fuku, the wet nurse of [[:en:Tokugawa Iemitsu|Tokugawa Iemitsu]] , entered the palace and received the title of [[:en:Lady Kasuga|Kasuga no Tsubone]] .
== Births == * {{ill|Genpō|ja|元豊 (宋)|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Genpō|qq=|1=Yuanfeng|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10889531}} 5th year ( [[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1082|1082]] [[:en:November 2|November 2]] ) – [[:en:Emperor Huizong of Song|Huizong]] , the 8th emperor of the {{ill|Northern Song|ja|北宋|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Northern Song|qq=|comment=changed title based on wikidata|1=Northern Song dynasty|WD=Q319460}} (died [[:en:1135|1135]] ). * [[:en:Kempo (era)|Kenpo]] 6th year ( [[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1218|1218]] [[:en:October 30|October 30]] ) – [[:en:Emperor Chūkyō|Emperor Chūkō]] , the 85th [[:en:Emperor of Japan|Emperor]] (died [[:en:1234|1234]] ). * [[:en:Tenpō|Tenpō]] 1st year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1830|1830]] [[:en:November 24|November 24]] ) – {{ill|Seikawa Hachirō|ja|清河八郎|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Seikawa Hachirō|qq=|1=Kiyokawa Hachirō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q129812}} , founder of the Mibu rōshitai (the precursor to the [[:en:Shinsengumi|Shinsengumi]] ) (died [[:en:1863|1863]] ). * {{ill|Dōkō|ja|道光|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Dōkō|qq=|1=Daoguang Era|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1133186}} 15th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1835|1835]] [[:en:November 29|November 29]] ) – {{ill|Empress Dowager Cixi|ja|慈禧太后|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Empress Dowager Cixi|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 西太后|1=Empress Dowager Cixi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q47842}} (Western Empress Dowager), consort of [[:en:Xianfeng Emperor|Emperor Xianfeng]] and a de facto dictator of the late [[:en:Qing dynasty|Qing Dynasty]] (died [[:en:1908|1908]] ). * [[:en:Tenpō|Tenpō]] 13th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1842|1842]] [[:en:November 12|November 12]] ) – {{ill|Ōyama Gen|ja|大山厳|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōyama Gen|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 大山巌|1=Ōyama Iwao|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q359819}} , Marshal of the Army (died [[:en:1916|1916]] ).
== Deaths == * [[:en:Hakuchi (era)|Hakuchi]] 5th year ( [[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:654|654]] [[:en:November 24|November 24]] ) – [[:en:Emperor Kōtoku|Emperor Kōtoku]] , the 36th Emperor. * [[:en:Tenshō (Momoyama period)|Tenshō Era]] 5th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1577|1577]] [[:en:November 19|November 19]] ) – [[:en:Matsunaga Hisahide|Matsunaga Hisahide]] , a {{ill|samurai|ja|Samurai|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/samurai|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to サムライ|1=Samurai|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q529624}} (born [[:en:1510|1510]] ). * [[:en:Hōei|Hōei]] 4th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1707|1707]] [[:en:November 3|November 3]] ) – {{ill|Utsunomiya Tonan|ja|宇都宮遯庵|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Utsunomiya Tonan|qq=|1=Utsunomiya Ton'an|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q6561283}} , a Confucian scholar (born [[:en:1633|1633]] ). * [[:en:Kyōhō|Kyōhō]] 4th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1719|1719]] [[:en:November 21|November 21]] ) – [[:en:Yamamoto Tsunetomo|Yamamoto Tsuna]] , a {{ill|samurai|ja|Samurai|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/samurai|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to サムライ|1=Samurai|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q529624}} (born [[:en:1659|1659]] ). * {{ill|Enkyō|1=Enkyō|2=ja|3=延享|lt=Enkyō|ja|Enkyō|1=Enkyō (Edo period)|2=ja|3=延享|lt=Enkyō|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Enkyō|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1183728}} 4th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1747|1747]] [[:en:November 12|November 12]] ) – {{ill|Shimazu Yoshitaka|ja|島津吉貴|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shimazu Yoshitaka|qq=|1=Shimazu Yoshitaka|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11246537}} , the 4th lord of the [[:en:Satsuma Domain|Satsuma Domain]] (born [[:en:1675|1675]] ).

== Events == * [[:en:Eiroku|Eiroku]] 10th year ( [[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1567|1567]] [[:en:November 10|November 10]] ) – In the {{ill|Todai-ji Daibutsuden Battle|ja|東大寺大仏殿の戦い|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Todai-ji Daibutsuden Battle|qq=|1=Battle of Tōdai-ji Daibutsuden|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11526465}} , due to a surprise attack by [[:en:Matsunaga Hisahide|Matsunaga Hisahide]] , the {{ill|Todai-ji Daibutsuden|ja|東大寺大仏殿|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Todai-ji Daibutsuden|qq=|1=Great Buddha Hall|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q3012032}} burned down. * [[:en:Tenshō (Momoyama period)|Tenshō Era]] 5th year ( [[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1577|1577]] [[:en:November 19|November 19]] ) – In the [[:en:Siege of Shigisan|Shigisan Castle Battle]] , [[:en:Matsunaga Hisahide|Matsunaga Hisahide]] shattered the famed weapon {{ill|Kotenyō Heipingumo|ja|古天明平蜘蛛|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kotenyō Heipingumo|qq=|1=Kotenmyō Hiragumo|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11411022}} and subsequently committed suicide. * [[:en:Kan'ei|Kanei]] 6th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1629|1629]] [[:en:November 24|November 24]] ) – Fuku, the wet nurse of [[:en:Tokugawa Iemitsu|Tokugawa Iemitsu]] , entered the palace and received the title of [[:en:Lady Kasuga|Kasuga no Tsubone]] .

(died [[:en:1234|1234]] ). * [[:en:Tenpō|Tenpō]] 1st year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1830|1830]] [[:en:November 24|November 24]] ) – {{ill|Seikawa == Events == * [[:en:Eiroku|Eiroku]] 10th year ( [[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1567|1567]] [[:en:November 10|November 10]] ) – In the {{ill|Todai-ji Daibutsuden Battle|ja|東大寺大仏殿の戦い|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Todai-ji Daibutsuden Battle|qq=|1=Battle of Tōdai-ji Daibutsuden|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11526465}} , due to a surprise attack by [[:en:Matsunaga Hisahide|Matsunaga Hisahide]] , the {{ill|Todai-ji Daibutsuden|ja|東大寺大仏殿|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Todai-ji Daibutsuden|qq=|1=Great Buddha Hall|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q3012032}} burned down. * [[:en:Tenshō (Momoyama period)|Tenshō Era]] 5th year ( [[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1577|1577]] [[:en:November 19|November 19]] ) – In the [[:en:Siege of Shigisan|Shigisan Castle Battle]] , [[:en:Matsunaga Hisahide|Matsunaga Hisahide]] shattered the famed weapon {{ill|Kotenyō Heipingumo|ja|古天明平蜘蛛|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kotenyō Heipingumo|qq=|1=Kotenmyō Hiragumo|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11411022}} and subsequently committed suicide. * [[:en:Kan'ei|Kanei]] 6th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1629|1629]] [[:en:November 24|November 24]] ) – Fuku, the wet nurse of [[:en:Tokugawa Iemitsu|Tokugawa Iemitsu]] , entered the palace and received the title of [[:en:Lady Kasuga|Kasuga no Tsubone]] .

(died [[:en:1234|1234]] ). * [[:en:Tenpō|Tenpō]] 1st year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1830|1830]] [[:en:November 24|November 24]] ) – {{ill|Seikawa == Events == * [[:en:Eiroku|Eiroku]] 10th year ( [[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1567|1567]] [[:en:November 10|November 10]] ) – In the {{ill|Todai-ji Daibutsuden Battle|ja|東大寺大仏殿の戦い|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Todai-ji Daibutsuden Battle|qq=|1=Battle of Tōdai-ji Daibutsuden|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11526465}} , due to a surprise attack by [[:en:Matsunaga Hisahide|Matsunaga Hisahide]] , the {{ill|Todai-ji Daibutsuden|ja|東大寺大仏殿|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Todai-ji Daibutsuden|qq=|1=Great Buddha Hall|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q3012032}} burned down. * [[:en:Tenshō (Momoyama period)|Tenshō Era]] 5th year ( [[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1577|1577]] [[:en:November 19|November 19]] ) – In the [[:en:Siege of Shigisan|Shigisan Castle Battle]] , [[:en:Matsunaga Hisahide|Matsunaga Hisahide]] shattered the famed weapon {{ill|Kotenyō Heipingumo|ja|古天明平蜘蛛|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kotenyō Heipingumo|qq=|1=Kotenmyō Hiragumo|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11411022}} and subsequently committed suicide. * [[:en:Kan'ei|Kanei]] 6th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1629|1629]] [[:en:November 24|November 24]] ) – Fuku, the wet nurse of [[:en:Tokugawa Iemitsu|Tokugawa Iemitsu]] , entered the palace and received the title of [[:en:Lady Kasuga|Kasuga no Tsubone]] .

== Events == * [[:en:Eiroku|Eiroku]] 10th year ( [[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1567|1567]] [[:en:November 10|November 10]] ) – In the {{ill|Todai-ji Daibutsuden Battle|ja|東大寺大仏殿の戦い|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Todai-ji Daibutsuden Battle|qq=|1=Battle of Tōdai-ji Daibutsuden|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11526465}} , due to a surprise attack by [[:en:Matsunaga Hisahide|Matsunaga Hisahide]] , the {{ill|Todai-ji Daibutsuden|ja|東大寺大仏殿|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Todai-ji Daibutsuden|qq=|1=Great Buddha Hall|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q3012032}} burned down. * [[:en:Tenshō (Momoyama period)|Tenshō Era]] 5th year ( [[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1577|1577]] [[:en:November 19|November 19]] ) – In the [[:en:Siege of Shigisan|Shigisan Castle Battle]] , [[:en:Matsunaga Hisahide|Matsunaga Hisahide]] shattered the famed weapon {{ill|Kotenyō Heipingumo|ja|古天明平蜘蛛|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kotenyō Heipingumo|qq=|1=Kotenmyō Hiragumo|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11411022}} and subsequently committed suicide. * [[:en:Kan'ei|Kanei]] 6th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1629|1629]] [[:en:November 24|November 24]] ) – Fuku, the wet nurse of [[:en:Tokugawa Iemitsu|Tokugawa Iemitsu]] , entered the palace and received the title of [[:en:Lady Kasuga|Kasuga no Tsubone]] .

== Events == * [[:en:Eiroku|Eiroku]] 10th year ( [[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1567|1567]] [[:en:November 10|November 10]] ) – In the {{ill|Todai-ji Daibutsuden Battle|ja|東大寺大仏殿の戦い|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Todai-ji Daibutsuden Battle|1=Battle of Tōdai-ji Daibutsuden|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11526465}} , due to a surprise attack by [[:en:Matsunaga Hisahide|Matsunaga Hisahide]] , the {{ill|Todai-ji Daibutsuden|ja|東大寺大仏殿|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Todai-ji Daibutsuden|1=Great Buddha Hall|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q3012032}} burned down. * [[:en:Tenshō (Momoyama period)|Tenshō Era]] 5th year ( [[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1577|1577]] [[:en:November 19|November 19]] ) – In the [[:en:Siege of Shigisan|Shigisan Castle Battle]] , [[:en:Matsunaga Hisahide|Matsunaga Hisahide]] shattered the famed weapon {{ill|Kotenyō Heipingumo|ja|古天明平蜘蛛|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kotenyō Heipingumo|1=Kotenmyō Hiragumo|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11411022}} and subsequently committed suicide. * [[:en:Kan'ei|Kanei]] 6th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1629|1629]] [[:en:November 24|November 24]] ) – Fuku, the wet nurse of [[:en:Tokugawa Iemitsu|Tokugawa Iemitsu]] , entered the palace and received the title of [[:en:Lady Kasuga|Kasuga no Tsubone]] .
== Births == * {{ill|Genpō|ja|元豊 (宋)|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Genpō|1=Yuanfeng|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10889531}} 5th year ( [[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1082|1082]] [[:en:November 2|November 2]] ) – [[:en:Emperor Huizong of Song|Huizong]] , the 8th emperor of the {{ill|Northern Song|ja|北宋|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Northern Song|comment=changed title based on wikidata|1=Northern Song dynasty|WD=Q319460}} (died [[:en:1135|1135]] ). * [[:en:Kempo (era)|Kenpo]] 6th year ( [[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1218|1218]] [[:en:October 30|October 30]] ) – [[:en:Emperor Chūkyō|Emperor Chūkō]] , the 85th [[:en:Emperor of Japan|Emperor]] (died [[:en:1234|1234]] ). * [[:en:Tenpō|Tenpō]] 1st year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1830|1830]] [[:en:November 24|November 24]] ) – {{ill|Seikawa Hachirō|ja|清河八郎|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Seikawa Hachirō|1=Kiyokawa Hachirō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q129812}} , founder of the Mibu rōshitai (the precursor to the [[:en:Shinsengumi|Shinsengumi]] ) (died [[:en:1863|1863]] ). * {{ill|Dōkō|ja|道光|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Dōkō|1=Daoguang Era|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1133186}} 15th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1835|1835]] [[:en:November 29|November 29]] ) – {{ill|Empress Dowager Cixi|ja|慈禧太后|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Empress Dowager Cixi|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 西太后|1=Empress Dowager Cixi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q47842}} (Western Empress Dowager), consort of [[:en:Xianfeng Emperor|Emperor Xianfeng]] and a de facto dictator of the late [[:en:Qing dynasty|Qing Dynasty]] (died [[:en:1908|1908]] ). * [[:en:Tenpō|Tenpō]] 13th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1842|1842]] [[:en:November 12|November 12]] ) – {{ill|Ōyama Gen|ja|大山厳|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōyama Gen|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 大山巌|1=Ōyama Iwao|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q359819}} , Marshal of the Army (died [[:en:1916|1916]] ).
== Deaths == * [[:en:Hakuchi (era)|Hakuchi]] 5th year ( [[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:654|654]] [[:en:November 24|November 24]] ) – [[:en:Emperor Kōtoku|Emperor Kōtoku]] , the 36th Emperor. * [[:en:Tenshō (Momoyama period)|Tenshō Era]] 5th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1577|1577]] [[:en:November 19|November 19]] ) – [[:en:Matsunaga Hisahide|Matsunaga Hisahide]] , a {{ill|samurai|ja|Samurai|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/samurai|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to サムライ|1=Samurai|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q529624}} (born [[:en:1510|1510]] ). * [[:en:Hōei|Hōei]] 4th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1707|1707]] [[:en:November 3|November 3]] ) – {{ill|Utsunomiya Tonan|ja|宇都宮遯庵|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Utsunomiya Tonan|1=Utsunomiya Ton'an|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q6561283}} , a Confucian scholar (born [[:en:1633|1633]] ). * [[:en:Kyōhō|Kyōhō]] 4th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1719|1719]] [[:en:November 21|November 21]] ) – [[:en:Yamamoto Tsunetomo|Yamamoto Tsuna]] , a {{ill|samurai|ja|Samurai|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/samurai|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to サムライ|1=Samurai|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q529624}} (born [[:en:1659|1659]] ). * {{ill|Enkyō|1=Enkyō|2=ja|3=延享|lt=Enkyō|ja|Enkyō|1=Enkyō (Edo period)|2=ja|3=延享|lt=Enkyō|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Enkyō|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1183728}} 4th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1747|1747]] [[:en:November 12|November 12]] ) – {{ill|Shimazu Yoshitaka|ja|島津吉貴|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shimazu Yoshitaka|1=Shimazu Yoshitaka|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11246537}} , the 4th lord of the [[:en:Satsuma Domain|Satsuma Domain]] (born [[:en:1675|1675]] ).
== Commemorations == {{ill|Tokan'ya|ja|十日夜|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tokan'ya|1=Tōkanya|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9384647}} (とおかんや)

== Births == * {{ill|Genpō|ja|元豊 (宋)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Genpō|1=Yuanfeng|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10889531}} 5th year ( [[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1082|1082]] [[:en:November 2|November 2]] ) – [[:en:Emperor Huizong of Song|Huizong]] , the 8th emperor of the {{ill|Northern Song|ja|北宋|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Northern Song|comment=changed title based on wikidata|1=Northern Song dynasty|WD=Q319460}} (died [[:en:1135|1135]] ). * [[:en:Kempo (era)|Kenpo]] 6th year ( [[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1218|1218]] [[:en:October 30|October 30]] ) – [[:en:Emperor Chūkyō|Emperor Chūkō]] , the 85th [[:en:Emperor of Japan|Emperor]] (died [[:en:1234|1234]] ). * [[:en:Tenpō|Tenpō]] 1st year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1830|1830]] [[:en:November 24|November 24]] ) – {{ill|Seikawa Hachirō|ja|清河八郎|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Seikawa Hachirō|1=Kiyokawa Hachirō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q129812}} , founder of the Mibu rōshitai (the precursor to the [[:en:Shinsengumi|Shinsengumi]] ) (died [[:en:1863|1863]] ). * {{ill|Dōkō|ja|道光|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Dōkō|1=Daoguang Era|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1133186}} 15th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1835|1835]] [[:en:November 29|November 29]] ) – {{ill|Empress Dowager Cixi|ja|慈禧太后|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Empress Dowager Cixi|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 西太后|1=Empress Dowager Cixi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q47842}} (Western Empress Dowager), consort of [[:en:Xianfeng Emperor|Emperor Xianfeng]] and a de facto dictator of the late [[:en:Qing dynasty|Qing Dynasty]] (died [[:en:1908|1908]] ). * [[:en:Tenpō|Tenpō]] 13th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1842|1842]] [[:en:November 12|November 12]] ) – {{ill|Ōyama Gen|ja|大山厳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōyama Gen|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 大山巌|1=Ōyama Iwao|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q359819}} , Marshal of the Army (died [[:en:1916|1916]] ).
== Deaths == * [[:en:Hakuchi (era)|Hakuchi]] 5th year ( [[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:654|654]] [[:en:November 24|November 24]] ) – [[:en:Emperor Kōtoku|Emperor Kōtoku]] , the 36th Emperor. * [[:en:Tenshō (Momoyama period)|Tenshō Era]] 5th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1577|1577]] [[:en:November 19|November 19]] ) – [[:en:Matsunaga Hisahide|Matsunaga Hisahide]] , a {{ill|samurai|ja|Samurai|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/samurai|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to サムライ|1=Samurai|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q529624}} (born [[:en:1510|1510]] ). * [[:en:Hōei|Hōei]] 4th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1707|1707]] [[:en:November 3|November 3]] ) – {{ill|Utsunomiya Tonan|ja|宇都宮遯庵|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Utsunomiya Tonan|1=Utsunomiya Ton'an|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q6561283}} , a Confucian scholar (born [[:en:1633|1633]] ). * [[:en:Kyōhō|Kyōhō]] 4th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1719|1719]] [[:en:November 21|November 21]] ) – [[:en:Yamamoto Tsunetomo|Yamamoto Tsuna]] , a {{ill|samurai|ja|Samurai|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/samurai|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to サムライ|1=Samurai|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q529624}} (born [[:en:1659|1659]] ). * {{ill|Enkyō|1=Enkyō|2=ja|3=延享|lt=Enkyō|ja|Enkyō|1=Enkyō (Edo period)|2=ja|3=延享|lt=Enkyō|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Enkyō|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1183728}} 4th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1747|1747]] [[:en:November 12|November 12]] ) – {{ill|Shimazu Yoshitaka|ja|島津吉貴|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shimazu Yoshitaka|1=Shimazu Yoshitaka|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11246537}} , the 4th lord of the [[:en:Satsuma Domain|Satsuma Domain]] (born [[:en:1675|1675]] ).
== Commemorations == {{ill|Tokan'ya|ja|十日夜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tokan'ya|1=Tōkanya|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9384647}} (とおかんや)
