Hachirō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q129812}} , founder of the Mibu rōshitai (the precursor to the [[:en:Shinsengumi|Shinsengumi]] ) (died [[:en:1863|1863]] ). * {{ill|Dōkō|ja|道光|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Dōkō|1=Daoguang Era|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1133186}} 15th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1835|1835]] [[:en:November 29|November 29]] ) – {{ill|Empress Dowager Cixi|ja|慈禧太后|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Empress Dowager Cixi|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 西太后|1=Empress Dowager Cixi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q47842}} (Western Empress Dowager), consort of [[:en:Xianfeng Emperor|Emperor Xianfeng]] and a de facto dictator of the late [[:en:Qing dynasty|Qing Dynasty]] (died [[:en:1908|1908]] ). * [[:en:Tenpō|Tenpō]] 13th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1842|1842]] [[:en:November 12|November 12]] ) – {{ill|Ōyama Gen|ja|大山厳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōyama Gen|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 大山巌|1=Ōyama Iwao|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q359819}} , Marshal of the Army (died [[:en:1916|1916]] ).
== Deaths == * [[:en:Hakuchi (era)|Hakuchi]] 5th year ( [[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:654|654]] [[:en:November 24|November 24]] ) – [[:en:Emperor Kōtoku|Emperor Kōtoku]] , the 36th Emperor. * [[:en:Tenshō (Momoyama period)|Tenshō Era]] 5th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1577|1577]] [[:en:November 19|November 19]] ) – [[:en:Matsunaga Hisahide|Matsunaga Hisahide]] , a {{ill|samurai|ja|Samurai|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/samurai|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to サムライ|1=Samurai|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q529624}} (born [[:en:1510|1510]] ). * [[:en:Hōei|Hōei]] 4th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1707|1707]] [[:en:November 3|November 3]] ) – {{ill|Utsunomiya Tonan|ja|宇都宮遯庵|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Utsunomiya Tonan|1=Utsunomiya Ton'an|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q6561283}} , a Confucian scholar (born [[:en:1633|1633]] ). * [[:en:Kyōhō|Kyōhō]] 4th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1719|1719]] [[:en:November 21|November 21]] ) – [[:en:Yamamoto Tsunetomo|Yamamoto Tsuna]] , a {{ill|samurai|ja|Samurai|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/samurai|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to サムライ|1=Samurai|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q529624}} (born [[:en:1659|1659]] ). * {{ill|Enkyō|1=Enkyō|2=ja|3=延享|lt=Enkyō|ja|Enkyō|1=Enkyō (Edo period)|2=ja|3=延享|lt=Enkyō|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Enkyō|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1183728}} 4th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1747|1747]] [[:en:November 12|November 12]] ) – {{ill|Shimazu Yoshitaka|ja|島津吉貴|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shimazu Yoshitaka|1=Shimazu Yoshitaka|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11246537}} , the 4th lord of the [[:en:Satsuma Domain|Satsuma Domain]] (born [[:en:1675|1675]] ).
== Commemorations == {{ill|Tokan'ya|ja|十日夜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tokan'ya|1=Tōkanya|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9384647}} (とおかんや)

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:10 nguŏk 10 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:10月10日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 10월 10일]][[zh-min-nan:10 goe̍h 10 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:十月初十]][[zh:十月初十]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q840269]] Wikidata name: 10th day of the 10th month in the Chinese calendar [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:40, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Not to be confused with|October 10|qq=October 10}}[[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]]<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=十月初十|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 10월 10일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar October|qq=}} '''October 10''' is the 10th day of month {{ill|October (Lunisolar)|ja|10月 (旧暦)|lt=October (Kannazuki)|1=Kannazuki|2=ja|3=10月 (旧暦)|1=Kannazuki|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/October (Lunisolar)|13=User:Immanuelle/Kannazuki|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} the 10th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Senshū|WD=Q96759839}}{{efn|ja|先勝|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}{{efn|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senshō|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}} .
== Events == * [[:en:Eiroku|Eiroku]] 10th year ( [[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1567|1567]] [[:en:November 10|November 10]] ) – In the {{ill|Todai-ji Daibutsuden Battle|ja|東大寺大仏殿の戦い|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Todai-ji Daibutsuden Battle|1=Battle of Tōdai-ji Daibutsuden|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11526465}} , due to a surprise attack by [[:en:Matsunaga Hisahide|Matsunaga Hisahide]] , the {{ill|Todai-ji Daibutsuden|ja|東大寺大仏殿|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Todai-ji Daibutsuden|1=Great Buddha Hall|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q3012032}} burned down. * [[:en:Tenshō (Momoyama period)|Tenshō Era]] 5th year ( [[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1577|1577]] [[:en:November 19|November 19]] ) – In the [[:en:Siege of Shigisan|Shigisan Castle Battle]] , [[:en:Matsunaga Hisahide|Matsunaga Hisahide]] shattered the famed weapon {{ill|Kotenyō Heipingumo|ja|古天明平蜘蛛|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kotenyō Heipingumo|1=Kotenmyō Hiragumo|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11411022}} and subsequently committed suicide. * [[:en:Kan'ei|Kanei]] 6th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1629|1629]] [[:en:November 24|November 24]] ) – Fuku, the wet nurse of [[:en:Tokugawa Iemitsu|Tokugawa Iemitsu]] , entered the palace and received the title of [[:en:Lady Kasuga|Kasuga no Tsubone]] .
== Births == * {{ill|Genpō|ja|元豊 (宋)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Genpō|1=Yuanfeng|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10889531}} 5th year ( [[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1082|1082]] [[:en:November 2|November 2]] ) – [[:en:Emperor Huizong of Song|Huizong]] , the 8th emperor of the {{ill|Northern Song|ja|北宋|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Northern Song|comment=changed title based on wikidata|1=Northern Song dynasty|WD=Q319460}} (died [[:en:1135|1135]] ). * [[:en:Kempo (era)|Kenpo]] 6th year ( [[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1218|1218]] [[:en:October 30|October 30]] ) – [[:en:Emperor Chūkyō|Emperor Chūkō]] , the 85th [[:en:Emperor of Japan|Emperor]] (died [[:en:1234|1234]] ). * [[:en:Tenpō|Tenpō]] 1st year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1830|1830]] [[:en:November 24|November 24]] ) – {{ill|Seikawa Hachirō|ja|清河八郎|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Seikawa Hachirō|1=Kiyokawa Hachirō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q129812}} , founder of the Mibu rōshitai (the precursor to the [[:en:Shinsengumi|Shinsengumi]] ) (died [[:en:1863|1863]] ). * {{ill|Dōkō|ja|道光|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Dōkō|1=Daoguang Era|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1133186}} 15th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1835|1835]] [[:en:November 29|November 29]] ) – {{ill|Empress Dowager Cixi|ja|慈禧太后|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Empress Dowager Cixi|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 西太后|1=Empress Dowager Cixi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q47842}} (Western Empress Dowager), consort of [[:en:Xianfeng Emperor|Emperor Xianfeng]] and a de facto dictator of the late [[:en:Qing dynasty|Qing Dynasty]] (died [[:en:1908|1908]] ). * [[:en:Tenpō|Tenpō]] 13th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1842|1842]] [[:en:November 12|November 12]] ) – {{ill|Ōyama Gen|ja|大山厳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōyama Gen|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 大山巌|1=Ōyama Iwao|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q359819}} , Marshal of the Army (died [[:en:1916|1916]] ).
== Deaths == * [[:en:Hakuchi (era)|Hakuchi]] 5th year ( [[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:654|654]] [[:en:November 24|November 24]] ) – [[:en:Emperor Kōtoku|Emperor Kōtoku]] , the 36th Emperor. * [[:en:Tenshō (Momoyama period)|Tenshō Era]] 5th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1577|1577]] [[:en:November 19|November 19]] ) – [[:en:Matsunaga Hisahide|Matsunaga Hisahide]] , a {{ill|samurai|ja|Samurai|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/samurai|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to サムライ|1=Samurai|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q529624}} (born [[:en:1510|1510]] ). * [[:en:Hōei|Hōei]] 4th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1707|1707]] [[:en:November 3|November 3]] ) – {{ill|Utsunomiya Tonan|ja|宇都宮遯庵|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Utsunomiya Tonan|1=Utsunomiya Ton'an|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q6561283}} , a Confucian scholar (born [[:en:1633|1633]] ). * [[:en:Kyōhō|Kyōhō]] 4th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1719|1719]] [[:en:November 21|November 21]] ) – [[:en:Yamamoto Tsunetomo|Yamamoto Tsuna]] , a {{ill|samurai|ja|Samurai|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/samurai|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to サムライ|1=Samurai|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q529624}} (born [[:en:1659|1659]] ). * {{ill|Enkyō|1=Enkyō|2=ja|3=延享|lt=Enkyō|ja|Enkyō|1=Enkyō (Edo period)|2=ja|3=延享|lt=Enkyō|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Enkyō|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1183728}} 4th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1747|1747]] [[:en:November 12|November 12]] ) – {{ill|Shimazu Yoshitaka|ja|島津吉貴|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shimazu Yoshitaka|1=Shimazu Yoshitaka|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11246537}} , the 4th lord of the [[:en:Satsuma Domain|Satsuma Domain]] (born [[:en:1675|1675]] ).

== Events == * [[:en:Eiroku|Eiroku]] 10th year ( [[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1567|1567]] [[:en:November 10|November 10]] ) – In the {{ill|Todai-ji Daibutsuden Battle|ja|東大寺大仏殿の戦い|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Todai-ji Daibutsuden Battle|1=Battle of Tōdai-ji Daibutsuden|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11526465}} , due to a surprise attack by [[:en:Matsunaga Hisahide|Matsunaga Hisahide]] , the {{ill|Todai-ji Daibutsuden|ja|東大寺大仏殿|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Todai-ji Daibutsuden|1=Great Buddha Hall|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q3012032}} burned down. * [[:en:Tenshō (Momoyama period)|Tenshō Era]] 5th year ( [[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1577|1577]] [[:en:November 19|November 19]] ) – In the [[:en:Siege of Shigisan|Shigisan Castle Battle]] , [[:en:Matsunaga Hisahide|Matsunaga Hisahide]] shattered the famed weapon {{ill|Kotenyō Heipingumo|ja|古天明平蜘蛛|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kotenyō Heipingumo|1=Kotenmyō Hiragumo|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11411022}} and subsequently committed suicide. * [[:en:Kan'ei|Kanei]] 6th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1629|1629]] [[:en:November 24|November 24]] ) – Fuku, the wet nurse of [[:en:Tokugawa Iemitsu|Tokugawa Iemitsu]] , entered the palace and received the title of [[:en:Lady Kasuga|Kasuga no Tsubone]] .

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:10 nguŏk 10 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:10月10日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 10월 10일]][[zh-min-nan:10 goe̍h 10 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:十月初十]][[zh:十月初十]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q840269]] Wikidata name: 10th day of the 10th month in the Chinese calendar [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:40, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Not to be confused with|October 10|qq=October 10}}[[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]]<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=十月初十|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 10월 10일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar October|qq=}} '''October 10''' is the 10th day of month {{ill|October (Lunisolar)|ja|10月 (旧暦)|lt=October (Kannazuki)|1=Kannazuki|2=ja|3=10月 (旧暦)|1=Kannazuki|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/October (Lunisolar)|13=User:Immanuelle/Kannazuki|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} the 10th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Senshū|WD=Q96759839}}{{efn|ja|先勝|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}{{efn|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senshō|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}} .
== Events == * [[:en:Eiroku|Eiroku]] 10th year ( [[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1567|1567]] [[:en:November 10|November 10]] ) – In the {{ill|Todai-ji Daibutsuden Battle|ja|東大寺大仏殿の戦い|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Todai-ji Daibutsuden Battle|1=Battle of Tōdai-ji Daibutsuden|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11526465}} , due to a surprise attack by [[:en:Matsunaga Hisahide|Matsunaga Hisahide]] , the {{ill|Todai-ji Daibutsuden|ja|東大寺大仏殿|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Todai-ji Daibutsuden|1=Great Buddha Hall|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q3012032}} burned down. * [[:en:Tenshō (Momoyama period)|Tenshō Era]] 5th year ( [[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1577|1577]] [[:en:November 19|November 19]] ) – In the [[:en:Siege of Shigisan|Shigisan Castle Battle]] , [[:en:Matsunaga Hisahide|Matsunaga Hisahide]] shattered the famed weapon {{ill|Kotenyō Heipingumo|ja|古天明平蜘蛛|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kotenyō Heipingumo|1=Kotenmyō Hiragumo|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11411022}} and subsequently committed suicide. * [[:en:Kan'ei|Kanei]] 6th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1629|1629]] [[:en:November 24|November 24]] ) – Fuku, the wet nurse of [[:en:Tokugawa Iemitsu|Tokugawa Iemitsu]] , entered the palace and received the title of [[:en:Lady Kasuga|Kasuga no Tsubone]] .
== Births == * {{ill|Genpō|ja|元豊 (宋)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Genpō|1=Yuanfeng|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10889531}} 5th year ( [[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1082|1082]] [[:en:November 2|November 2]] ) – [[:en:Emperor Huizong of Song|Huizong]] , the 8th emperor of the {{ill|Northern Song|ja|北宋|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Northern Song|comment=changed title based on wikidata|1=Northern Song dynasty|WD=Q319460}} (died [[:en:1135|1135]] ). * [[:en:Kempo (era)|Kenpo]] 6th year ( [[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1218|1218]] [[:en:October 30|October 30]] ) – [[:en:Emperor Chūkyō|Emperor Chūkō]] , the 85th [[:en:Emperor of Japan|Emperor]] (died [[:en:1234|1234]] ). * [[:en:Tenpō|Tenpō]] 1st year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1830|1830]] [[:en:November 24|November 24]] ) – {{ill|Seikawa Hachirō|ja|清河八郎|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Seikawa Hachirō|1=Kiyokawa Hachirō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q129812}} , founder of the Mibu rōshitai (the precursor to the [[:en:Shinsengumi|Shinsengumi]] ) (died [[:en:1863|1863]] ). * {{ill|Dōkō|ja|道光|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Dōkō|1=Daoguang Era|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1133186}} 15th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1835|1835]] [[:en:November 29|November 29]] ) – {{ill|Empress Dowager Cixi|ja|慈禧太后|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Empress Dowager Cixi|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 西太后|1=Empress Dowager Cixi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q47842}} (Western Empress Dowager), consort of [[:en:Xianfeng Emperor|Emperor Xianfeng]] and a de facto dictator of the late [[:en:Qing dynasty|Qing Dynasty]] (died [[:en:1908|1908]] ). * [[:en:Tenpō|Tenpō]] 13th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1842|1842]] [[:en:November 12|November 12]] ) – {{ill|Ōyama Gen|ja|大山厳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōyama Gen|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 大山巌|1=Ōyama Iwao|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q359819}} , Marshal of the Army (died [[:en:1916|1916]] ).
== Deaths == * [[:en:Hakuchi (era)|Hakuchi]] 5th year ( [[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:654|654]] [[:en:November 24|November 24]] ) – [[:en:Emperor Kōtoku|Emperor Kōtoku]] , the 36th Emperor. * [[:en:Tenshō (Momoyama period)|Tenshō Era]] 5th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1577|1577]] [[:en:November 19|November 19]] ) – [[:en:Matsunaga Hisahide|Matsunaga Hisahide]] , a {{ill|samurai|ja|Samurai|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/samurai|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to サムライ|1=Samurai|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q529624}} (born [[:en:1510|1510]] ). * [[:en:Hōei|Hōei]] 4th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1707|1707]] [[:en:November 3|November 3]] ) – {{ill|Utsunomiya Tonan|ja|宇都宮遯庵|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Utsunomiya Tonan|1=Utsunomiya Ton'an|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q6561283}} , a Confucian scholar (born [[:en:1633|1633]] ). * [[:en:Kyōhō|Kyōhō]] 4th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1719|1719]] [[:en:November 21|November 21]] ) – [[:en:Yamamoto Tsunetomo|Yamamoto Tsuna]] , a {{ill|samurai|ja|Samurai|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/samurai|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to サムライ|1=Samurai|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q529624}} (born [[:en:1659|1659]] ). * {{ill|Enkyō|1=Enkyō|2=ja|3=延享|lt=Enkyō|ja|Enkyō|1=Enkyō (Edo period)|2=ja|3=延享|lt=Enkyō|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Enkyō|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1183728}} 4th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1747|1747]] [[:en:November 12|November 12]] ) – {{ill|Shimazu Yoshitaka|ja|島津吉貴|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shimazu Yoshitaka|1=Shimazu Yoshitaka|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11246537}} , the 4th lord of the [[:en:Satsuma Domain|Satsuma Domain]] (born [[:en:1675|1675]] ).
== Commemorations == {{ill|Tokan'ya|ja|十日夜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tokan'ya|1=Tōkanya|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9384647}} (とおかんや)

Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=十月初十|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 10월 10일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar October|qq=}} '''October 10''' is the 10th day of month {{ill|October (Lunisolar)|ja|10月 (旧暦)|lt=October (Kannazuki)|1=Kannazuki|2=ja|3=10月 (旧暦)|1=Kannazuki|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/October (Lunisolar)|13=User:Immanuelle/Kannazuki|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} the 10th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Senshū|WD=Q96759839}}{{efn|ja|先勝|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}{{efn|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senshō|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}} .
== Events == * [[:en:Eiroku|Eiroku]] 10th year ( [[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1567|1567]] [[:en:November 10|November 10]] ) – In the {{ill|Todai-ji Daibutsuden Battle|ja|東大寺大仏殿の戦い|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Todai-ji Daibutsuden Battle|1=Battle of Tōdai-ji Daibutsuden|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11526465}} , due to a surprise attack by [[:en:Matsunaga Hisahide|Matsunaga Hisahide]] , the {{ill|Todai-ji Daibutsuden|ja|東大寺大仏殿|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Todai-ji Daibutsuden|1=Great Buddha Hall|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q3012032}} burned down. * [[:en:Tenshō (Momoyama period)|Tenshō Era]] 5th year ( [[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1577|1577]] [[:en:November 19|November 19]] ) – In the [[:en:Siege of Shigisan|Shigisan Castle Battle]] , [[:en:Matsunaga Hisahide|Matsunaga Hisahide]] shattered the famed weapon {{ill|Kotenyō Heipingumo|ja|古天明平蜘蛛|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kotenyō Heipingumo|1=Kotenmyō Hiragumo|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11411022}} and subsequently committed suicide. * [[:en:Kan'ei|Kanei]] 6th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1629|1629]] [[:en:November 24|November 24]] ) – Fuku, the wet nurse of [[:en:Tokugawa Iemitsu|Tokugawa Iemitsu]] , entered the palace and received the title of [[:en:Lady Kasuga|Kasuga no Tsubone]] .
== Births == * {{ill|Genpō|ja|元豊 (宋)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Genpō|1=Yuanfeng|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10889531}} 5th year ( [[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1082|1082]] [[:en:November 2|November 2]] ) – [[:en:Emperor Huizong of Song|Huizong]] , the 8th emperor of the {{ill|Northern Song|ja|北宋|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Northern Song|comment=changed title based on wikidata|1=Northern Song dynasty|WD=Q319460}} (died [[:en:1135|1135]] ). * [[:en:Kempo (era)|Kenpo]] 6th year ( [[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1218|1218]] [[:en:October 30|October 30]] ) – [[:en:Emperor Chūkyō|Emperor Chūkō]] , the 85th [[:en:Emperor of Japan|Emperor]] (died [[:en:1234|1234]] ). * [[:en:Tenpō|Tenpō]] 1st year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1830|1830]] [[:en:November 24|November 24]] ) – {{ill|Seikawa Hachirō|ja|清河八郎|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Seikawa Hachirō|1=Kiyokawa Hachirō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q129812}} , founder of the Mibu rōshitai (the precursor to the [[:en:Shinsengumi|Shinsengumi]] ) (died [[:en:1863|1863]] ). * {{ill|Dōkō|ja|道光|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Dōkō|1=Daoguang Era|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1133186}} 15th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1835|1835]] [[:en:November 29|November 29]] ) – {{ill|Empress Dowager Cixi|ja|慈禧太后|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Empress Dowager Cixi|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 西太后|1=Empress Dowager Cixi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q47842}} (Western Empress Dowager), consort of [[:en:Xianfeng Emperor|Emperor Xianfeng]] and a de facto dictator of the late [[:en:Qing dynasty|Qing Dynasty]] (died [[:en:1908|1908]] ). * [[:en:Tenpō|Tenpō]] 13th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1842|1842]] [[:en:November 12|November 12]] ) – {{ill|Ōyama Gen|ja|大山厳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōyama Gen|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 大山巌|1=Ōyama Iwao|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q359819}} , Marshal of the Army (died [[:en:1916|1916]] ).
== Deaths == * [[:en:Hakuchi (era)|Hakuchi]] 5th year ( [[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:654|654]] [[:en:November 24|November 24]] ) – [[:en:Emperor Kōtoku|Emperor Kōtoku]] , the 36th Emperor. * [[:en:Tenshō (Momoyama period)|Tenshō Era]] 5th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1577|1577]] [[:en:November 19|November 19]] ) – [[:en:Matsunaga Hisahide|Matsunaga Hisahide]] , a {{ill|samurai|ja|Samurai|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/samurai|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to サムライ|1=Samurai|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q529624}} (born [[:en:1510|1510]] ). * [[:en:Hōei|Hōei]] 4th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1707|1707]] [[:en:November 3|November 3]] ) – {{ill|Utsunomiya Tonan|ja|宇都宮遯庵|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Utsunomiya Tonan|1=Utsunomiya Ton'an|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q6561283}} , a Confucian scholar (born [[:en:1633|1633]] ). * [[:en:Kyōhō|Kyōhō]] 4th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1719|1719]] [[:en:November 21|November 21]] ) – [[:en:Yamamoto Tsunetomo|Yamamoto Tsuna]] , a {{ill|samurai|ja|Samurai|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/samurai|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to サムライ|1=Samurai|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q529624}} (born [[:en:1659|1659]] ). * {{ill|Enkyō|1=Enkyō|2=ja|3=延享|lt=Enkyō|ja|Enkyō|1=Enkyō (Edo period)|2=ja|3=延享|lt=Enkyō|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Enkyō|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1183728}} 4th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1747|1747]] [[:en:November 12|November 12]] ) – {{ill|Shimazu Yoshitaka|ja|島津吉貴|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shimazu Yoshitaka|1=Shimazu Yoshitaka|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11246537}} , the 4th lord of the [[:en:Satsuma Domain|Satsuma Domain]] (born [[:en:1675|1675]] ).
== Commemorations == {{ill|Tokan'ya|ja|十日夜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tokan'ya|1=Tōkanya|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9384647}} (とおかんや)

It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Senshū|WD=Q96759839}}{{efn|ja|先勝|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}{{efn|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senshō|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}} .
== Events == * [[:en:Eiroku|Eiroku]] 10th year ( [[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1567|1567]] [[:en:November 10|November 10]] ) – In the {{ill|Todai-ji Daibutsuden Battle|ja|東大寺大仏殿の戦い|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Todai-ji Daibutsuden Battle|1=Battle of Tōdai-ji Daibutsuden|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11526465}} , due to a surprise attack by [[:en:Matsunaga Hisahide|Matsunaga Hisahide]] , the {{ill|Todai-ji Daibutsuden|ja|東大寺大仏殿|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Todai-ji Daibutsuden|1=Great Buddha Hall|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q3012032}} burned down. * [[:en:Tenshō (Momoyama period)|Tenshō Era]] 5th year ( [[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1577|1577]] [[:en:November 19|November 19]] ) – In the [[:en:Siege of Shigisan|Shigisan Castle Battle]] , [[:en:Matsunaga Hisahide|Matsunaga Hisahide]] shattered the famed weapon {{ill|Kotenyō Heipingumo|ja|古天明平蜘蛛|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kotenyō Heipingumo|1=Kotenmyō Hiragumo|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11411022}} and subsequently committed suicide. * [[:en:Kan'ei|Kanei]] 6th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1629|1629]] [[:en:November 24|November 24]] ) – Fuku, the wet nurse of [[:en:Tokugawa Iemitsu|Tokugawa Iemitsu]] , entered the palace and received the title of [[:en:Lady Kasuga|Kasuga no Tsubone]] .
== Births == * {{ill|Genpō|ja|元豊 (宋)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Genpō|1=Yuanfeng|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10889531}} 5th year ( [[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1082|1082]] [[:en:November 2|November 2]] ) – [[:en:Emperor Huizong of Song|Huizong]] , the 8th emperor of the {{ill|Northern Song|ja|北宋|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Northern Song|comment=changed title based on wikidata|1=Northern Song dynasty|WD=Q319460}} (died [[:en:1135|1135]] ). * [[:en:Kempo (era)|Kenpo]] 6th year ( [[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1218|1218]] [[:en:October 30|October 30]] ) – [[:en:Emperor Chūkyō|Emperor Chūkō]] , the 85th [[:en:Emperor of Japan|Emperor]] (died [[:en:1234|1234]] ). * [[:en:Tenpō|Tenpō]] 1st year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1830|1830]] [[:en:November 24|November 24]] ) – {{ill|Seikawa Hachirō|ja|清河八郎|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Seikawa Hachirō|1=Kiyokawa Hachirō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q129812}} , founder of the Mibu rōshitai (the precursor to the [[:en:Shinsengumi|Shinsengumi]] ) (died [[:en:1863|1863]] ). * {{ill|Dōkō|ja|道光|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Dōkō|1=Daoguang Era|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1133186}} 15th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1835|1835]] [[:en:November 29|November 29]] ) – {{ill|Empress Dowager Cixi|ja|慈禧太后|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Empress Dowager Cixi|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 西太后|1=Empress Dowager Cixi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q47842}} (Western Empress Dowager), consort of [[:en:Xianfeng Emperor|Emperor Xianfeng]] and a de facto dictator of the late [[:en:Qing dynasty|Qing Dynasty]] (died [[:en:1908|1908]] ). * [[:en:Tenpō|Tenpō]] 13th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1842|1842]] [[:en:November 12|November 12]] ) – {{ill|Ōyama Gen|ja|大山厳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōyama Gen|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 大山巌|1=Ōyama Iwao|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q359819}} , Marshal of the Army (died [[:en:1916|1916]] ).
== Deaths == * [[:en:Hakuchi (era)|Hakuchi]] 5th year ( [[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:654|654]] [[:en:November 24|November 24]] ) – [[:en:Emperor Kōtoku|Emperor Kōtoku]] , the 36th Emperor. * [[:en:Tenshō (Momoyama period)|Tenshō Era]] 5th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1577|1577]] [[:en:November 19|November 19]] ) – [[:en:Matsunaga Hisahide|Matsunaga Hisahide]] , a {{ill|samurai|ja|Samurai|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/samurai|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to サムライ|1=Samurai|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q529624}} (born [[:en:1510|1510]] ). * [[:en:Hōei|Hōei]] 4th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1707|1707]] [[:en:November 3|November 3]] ) – {{ill|Utsunomiya Tonan|ja|宇都宮遯庵|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Utsunomiya Tonan|1=Utsunomiya Ton'an|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q6561283}} , a Confucian scholar (born [[:en:1633|1633]] ). * [[:en:Kyōhō|Kyōhō]] 4th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1719|1719]] [[:en:November 21|November 21]] ) – [[:en:Yamamoto Tsunetomo|Yamamoto Tsuna]] , a {{ill|samurai|ja|Samurai|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/samurai|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to サムライ|1=Samurai|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q529624}} (born [[:en:1659|1659]] ). * {{ill|Enkyō|1=Enkyō|2=ja|3=延享|lt=Enkyō|ja|Enkyō|1=Enkyō (Edo period)|2=ja|3=延享|lt=Enkyō|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Enkyō|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1183728}} 4th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1747|1747]] [[:en:November 12|November 12]] ) – {{ill|Shimazu Yoshitaka|ja|島津吉貴|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shimazu Yoshitaka|1=Shimazu Yoshitaka|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11246537}} , the 4th lord of the [[:en:Satsuma Domain|Satsuma Domain]] (born [[:en:1675|1675]] ).

It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Senshū|WD=Q96759839}}{{efn|ja|先勝|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}{{efn|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senshō|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}} .
== Events == * [[:en:Eiroku|Eiroku]] 10th year ( [[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1567|1567]] [[:en:November 10|November 10]] ) – In the {{ill|Todai-ji Daibutsuden Battle|ja|東大寺大仏殿の戦い|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Todai-ji Daibutsuden Battle|1=Battle of Tōdai-ji Daibutsuden|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11526465}} , due to a surprise attack by [[:en:Matsunaga Hisahide|Matsunaga Hisahide]] , the {{ill|Todai-ji Daibutsuden|ja|東大寺大仏殿|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Todai-ji Daibutsuden|1=Great Buddha Hall|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q3012032}} burned down. * [[:en:Tenshō (Momoyama period)|Tenshō Era]] 5th year ( [[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1577|1577]] [[:en:November 19|November 19]] ) – In the [[:en:Siege of Shigisan|Shigisan Castle Battle]] , [[:en:Matsunaga Hisahide|Matsunaga Hisahide]] shattered the famed weapon {{ill|Kotenyō Heipingumo|ja|古天明平蜘蛛|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kotenyō Heipingumo|1=Kotenmyō Hiragumo|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11411022}} and subsequently committed suicide. * [[:en:Kan'ei|Kanei]] 6th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1629|1629]] [[:en:November 24|November 24]] ) – Fuku, the wet nurse of [[:en:Tokugawa Iemitsu|Tokugawa Iemitsu]] , entered the palace and received the title of [[:en:Lady Kasuga|Kasuga no Tsubone]] .
== Births == * {{ill|Genpō|ja|元豊 (宋)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Genpō|1=Yuanfeng|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10889531}} 5th year ( [[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1082|1082]] [[:en:November 2|November 2]] ) – [[:en:Emperor Huizong of Song|Huizong]] , the 8th emperor of the {{ill|Northern Song|ja|北宋|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Northern Song|comment=changed title based on wikidata|1=Northern Song dynasty|WD=Q319460}} (died [[:en:1135|1135]] ). * [[:en:Kempo (era)|Kenpo]] 6th year ( [[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1218|1218]] [[:en:October 30|October 30]] ) – [[:en:Emperor Chūkyō|Emperor Chūkō]] , the 85th [[:en:Emperor of Japan|Emperor]] (died [[:en:1234|1234]] ). * [[:en:Tenpō|Tenpō]] 1st year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1830|1830]] [[:en:November 24|November 24]] ) – {{ill|Seikawa Hachirō|ja|清河八郎|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Seikawa Hachirō|1=Kiyokawa Hachirō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q129812}} , founder of the Mibu rōshitai (the precursor to the [[:en:Shinsengumi|Shinsengumi]] ) (died [[:en:1863|1863]] ). * {{ill|Dōkō|ja|道光|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Dōkō|1=Daoguang Era|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1133186}} 15th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1835|1835]] [[:en:November 29|November 29]] ) – {{ill|Empress Dowager Cixi|ja|慈禧太后|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Empress Dowager Cixi|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 西太后|1=Empress Dowager Cixi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q47842}} (Western Empress Dowager), consort of [[:en:Xianfeng Emperor|Emperor Xianfeng]] and a de facto dictator of the late [[:en:Qing dynasty|Qing Dynasty]] (died [[:en:1908|1908]] ). * [[:en:Tenpō|Tenpō]] 13th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1842|1842]] [[:en:November 12|November 12]] ) – {{ill|Ōyama Gen|ja|大山厳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōyama Gen|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 大山巌|1=Ōyama Iwao|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q359819}} , Marshal of the Army (died [[:en:1916|1916]] ).
== Deaths == * [[:en:Hakuchi (era)|Hakuchi]] 5th year ( [[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:654|654]] [[:en:November 24|November 24]] ) – [[:en:Emperor Kōtoku|Emperor Kōtoku]] , the 36th Emperor. * [[:en:Tenshō (Momoyama period)|Tenshō Era]] 5th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1577|1577]] [[:en:November 19|November 19]] ) – [[:en:Matsunaga Hisahide|Matsunaga Hisahide]] , a {{ill|samurai|ja|Samurai|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/samurai|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to サムライ|1=Samurai|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q529624}} (born [[:en:1510|1510]] ). * [[:en:Hōei|Hōei]] 4th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1707|1707]] [[:en:November 3|November 3]] ) – {{ill|Utsunomiya Tonan|ja|宇都宮遯庵|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Utsunomiya Tonan|1=Utsunomiya Ton'an|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q6561283}} , a Confucian scholar (born [[:en:1633|1633]] ). * [[:en:Kyōhō|Kyōhō]] 4th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1719|1719]] [[:en:November 21|November 21]] ) – [[:en:Yamamoto Tsunetomo|Yamamoto Tsuna]] , a {{ill|samurai|ja|Samurai|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/samurai|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to サムライ|1=Samurai|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q529624}} (born [[:en:1659|1659]] ). * {{ill|Enkyō|1=Enkyō|2=ja|3=延享|lt=Enkyō|ja|Enkyō|1=Enkyō (Edo period)|2=ja|3=延享|lt=Enkyō|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Enkyō|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1183728}} 4th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1747|1747]] [[:en:November 12|November 12]] ) – {{ill|Shimazu Yoshitaka|ja|島津吉貴|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shimazu Yoshitaka|1=Shimazu Yoshitaka|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11246537}} , the 4th lord of the [[:en:Satsuma Domain|Satsuma Domain]] (born [[:en:1675|1675]] ).

== Events == * [[:en:Eiroku|Eiroku]] 10th year ( [[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1567|1567]] [[:en:November 10|November 10]] ) – In the {{ill|Todai-ji Daibutsuden Battle|ja|東大寺大仏殿の戦い|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Todai-ji Daibutsuden Battle|1=Battle of Tōdai-ji Daibutsuden|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11526465}} , due to a surprise attack by [[:en:Matsunaga Hisahide|Matsunaga Hisahide]] , the {{ill|Todai-ji Daibutsuden|ja|東大寺大仏殿|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Todai-ji Daibutsuden|1=Great Buddha Hall|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q3012032}} burned down. * [[:en:Tenshō (Momoyama period)|Tenshō Era]] 5th year ( [[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1577|1577]] [[:en:November 19|November 19]] ) – In the [[:en:Siege of Shigisan|Shigisan Castle Battle]] , [[:en:Matsunaga Hisahide|Matsunaga Hisahide]] shattered the famed weapon {{ill|Kotenyō Heipingumo|ja|古天明平蜘蛛|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kotenyō Heipingumo|1=Kotenmyō Hiragumo|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11411022}} and subsequently committed suicide. * [[:en:Kan'ei|Kanei]] 6th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1629|1629]] [[:en:November 24|November 24]] ) – Fuku, the wet nurse of [[:en:Tokugawa Iemitsu|Tokugawa Iemitsu]] , entered the palace and received the title of [[:en:Lady Kasuga|Kasuga no Tsubone]] .
== Births == * {{ill|Genpō|ja|元豊 (宋)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Genpō|1=Yuanfeng|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10889531}} 5th year ( [[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1082|1082]] [[:en:November 2|November 2]] ) – [[:en:Emperor Huizong of Song|Huizong]] , the 8th emperor of the {{ill|Northern Song|ja|北宋|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Northern Song|comment=changed title based on wikidata|1=Northern Song dynasty|WD=Q319460}} (died [[:en:1135|1135]] ). * [[:en:Kempo (era)|Kenpo]] 6th year ( [[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1218|1218]] [[:en:October 30|October 30]] ) – [[:en:Emperor Chūkyō|Emperor Chūkō]] , the 85th [[:en:Emperor of Japan|Emperor]] (died [[:en:1234|1234]] ). * [[:en:Tenpō|Tenpō]] 1st year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1830|1830]] [[:en:November 24|November 24]] ) – {{ill|Seikawa Hachirō|ja|清河八郎|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Seikawa Hachirō|1=Kiyokawa Hachirō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q129812}} , founder of the Mibu rōshitai (the precursor to the [[:en:Shinsengumi|Shinsengumi]] ) (died [[:en:1863|1863]] ). * {{ill|Dōkō|ja|道光|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Dōkō|1=Daoguang Era|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1133186}} 15th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1835|1835]] [[:en:November 29|November 29]] ) – {{ill|Empress Dowager Cixi|ja|慈禧太后|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Empress Dowager Cixi|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 西太后|1=Empress Dowager Cixi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q47842}} (Western Empress Dowager), consort of [[:en:Xianfeng Emperor|Emperor Xianfeng]] and a de facto dictator of the late [[:en:Qing dynasty|Qing Dynasty]] (died [[:en:1908|1908]] ). * [[:en:Tenpō|Tenpō]] 13th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1842|1842]] [[:en:November 12|November 12]] ) – {{ill|Ōyama Gen|ja|大山厳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōyama Gen|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 大山巌|1=Ōyama Iwao|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q359819}} , Marshal of the Army (died [[:en:1916|1916]] ).
== Deaths == * [[:en:Hakuchi (era)|Hakuchi]] 5th year ( [[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:654|654]] [[:en:November 24|November 24]] ) – [[:en:Emperor Kōtoku|Emperor Kōtoku]] , the 36th Emperor. * [[:en:Tenshō (Momoyama period)|Tenshō Era]] 5th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1577|1577]] [[:en:November 19|November 19]] ) – [[:en:Matsunaga Hisahide|Matsunaga Hisahide]] , a {{ill|samurai|ja|Samurai|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/samurai|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to サムライ|1=Samurai|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q529624}} (born [[:en:1510|1510]] ). * [[:en:Hōei|Hōei]] 4th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1707|1707]] [[:en:November 3|November 3]] ) – {{ill|Utsunomiya Tonan|ja|宇都宮遯庵|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Utsunomiya Tonan|1=Utsunomiya Ton'an|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q6561283}} , a Confucian scholar (born [[:en:1633|1633]] ). * [[:en:Kyōhō|Kyōhō]] 4th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1719|1719]] [[:en:November 21|November 21]] ) – [[:en:Yamamoto Tsunetomo|Yamamoto Tsuna]] , a {{ill|samurai|ja|Samurai|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/samurai|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to サムライ|1=Samurai|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q529624}} (born [[:en:1659|1659]] ). * {{ill|Enkyō|1=Enkyō|2=ja|3=延享|lt=Enkyō|ja|Enkyō|1=Enkyō (Edo period)|2=ja|3=延享|lt=Enkyō|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Enkyō|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1183728}} 4th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1747|1747]] [[:en:November 12|November 12]] ) – {{ill|Shimazu Yoshitaka|ja|島津吉貴|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shimazu Yoshitaka|1=Shimazu Yoshitaka|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11246537}} , the 4th lord of the [[:en:Satsuma Domain|Satsuma Domain]] (born [[:en:1675|1675]] ).
== Commemorations == {{ill|Tokan'ya|ja|十日夜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tokan'ya|1=Tōkanya|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9384647}} (とおかんや)

{{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=十月初十|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 10월 10일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar October|qq=}} '''October 10''' is the 10th day of month {{ill|October (Lunisolar)|ja|10月 (旧暦)|lt=October (Kannazuki)|1=Kannazuki|2=ja|3=10月 (旧暦)|1=Kannazuki|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/October (Lunisolar)|13=User:Immanuelle/Kannazuki|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} the 10th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Senshū|WD=Q96759839}}{{efn|ja|先勝|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}{{efn|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senshō|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Eiroku|en|Eiroku|WD=Q1143341|lt=Eiroku}} 10th year ( {{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1567|en|1567|WD=Q6642|lt=1567}} {{ill|November 10|en|November 10|WD=Q2988|lt=November 10}} ) – In the {{ill|Todai-ji Daibutsuden Battle|ja|東大寺大仏殿の戦い|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Todai-ji Daibutsuden Battle|1=Battle of Tōdai-ji Daibutsuden|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11526465}} , due to a surprise attack by {{ill|Matsunaga Hisahide|en|Matsunaga Hisahide|WD=Q1143038|lt=Matsunaga Hisahide}} , the {{ill|Todai-ji Daibutsuden|ja|東大寺大仏殿|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Todai-ji Daibutsuden|1=Great Buddha Hall|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q3012032}} burned down. * {{ill|Tenshō (Momoyama period)|en|Tenshō (Momoyama period)|WD=Q1145058|lt=Tenshō Era}} 5th year ( {{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1577|en|1577|WD=Q6704|lt=1577}} {{ill|November 19|en|November 19|WD=Q3026|lt=November 19}} ) – In the {{ill|Siege of Shigisan|en|Siege of Shigisan|WD=Q6132231|lt=Shigisan Castle Battle}} , {{ill|Matsunaga Hisahide|en|Matsunaga Hisahide|WD=Q1143038|lt=Matsunaga Hisahide}} shattered the famed weapon {{ill|Kotenyō Heipingumo|ja|古天明平蜘蛛|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kotenyō Heipingumo|1=Kotenmyō Hiragumo|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11411022}} and subsequently committed suicide. * {{ill|Kan'ei|en|Kan'ei|WD=Q1192913|lt=Kanei}} 6th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1629|en|1629|WD=Q6847|lt=1629}} {{ill|November 24|en|November 24|WD=Q3022|lt=November 24}} ) – Fuku, the wet nurse of {{ill|Tokugawa Iemitsu|en|Tokugawa Iemitsu|WD=Q314481|lt=Tokugawa Iemitsu}} , entered the palace and received the title of {{ill|Lady Kasuga|en|Lady Kasuga|WD=Q835747|lt=Kasuga no Tsubone}} .

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:10 nguŏk 10 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:10月10日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 10월 10일]][[zh-min-nan:10 goe̍h 10 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:十月初十]][[zh:十月初十]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:10 nguŏk 10 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:10月10日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 10월 10일]][[zh-min-nan:10 goe̍h 10 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:十月初十]][[zh:十月初十]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:10 nguŏk 10 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:10月10日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 10월 10일]][[zh-min-nan:10 goe̍h 10 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:十月初十]][[zh:十月初十]]
{{Not to be confused with|October 10|qq=October 10}}<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?-->
{{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=十月初十|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 10월 10일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar October|qq=}} '''October 10''' is the 10th day of month {{ill|October (Lunisolar)|ja|10月 (旧暦)|lt=October (Kannazuki)|1=Kannazuki|2=ja|3=10月 (旧暦)|1=Kannazuki|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/October (Lunisolar)|13=User:Immanuelle/Kannazuki|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} the 10th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Senshū|WD=Q96759839}}{{efn|ja|先勝|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}{{efn|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senshō|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Eiroku|en|Eiroku|WD=Q1143341|lt=Eiroku}} 10th year ( {{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1567|en|1567|WD=Q6642|lt=1567}} {{ill|November 10|en|November 10|WD=Q2988|lt=November 10}} ) – In the {{ill|Todai-ji Daibutsuden Battle|ja|東大寺大仏殿の戦い|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Todai-ji Daibutsuden Battle|1=Battle of Tōdai-ji Daibutsuden|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11526465}} , due to a surprise attack by {{ill|Matsunaga Hisahide|en|Matsunaga Hisahide|WD=Q1143038|lt=Matsunaga Hisahide}} , the {{ill|Todai-ji Daibutsuden|ja|東大寺大仏殿|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Todai-ji Daibutsuden|1=Great Buddha Hall|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q3012032}} burned down. * {{ill|Tenshō (Momoyama period)|en|Tenshō (Momoyama period)|WD=Q1145058|lt=Tenshō Era}} 5th year ( {{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1577|en|1577|WD=Q6704|lt=1577}} {{ill|November 19|en|November 19|WD=Q3026|lt=November 19}} ) – In the {{ill|Siege of Shigisan|en|Siege of Shigisan|WD=Q6132231|lt=Shigisan Castle Battle}} , {{ill|Matsunaga Hisahide|en|Matsunaga Hisahide|WD=Q1143038|lt=Matsunaga Hisahide}} shattered the famed weapon {{ill|Kotenyō Heipingumo|ja|古天明平蜘蛛|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kotenyō Heipingumo|1=Kotenmyō Hiragumo|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11411022}} and subsequently committed suicide. * {{ill|Kan'ei|en|Kan'ei|WD=Q1192913|lt=Kanei}} 6th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1629|en|1629|WD=Q6847|lt=1629}} {{ill|November 24|en|November 24|WD=Q3022|lt=November 24}} ) – Fuku, the wet nurse of {{ill|Tokugawa Iemitsu|en|Tokugawa Iemitsu|WD=Q314481|lt=Tokugawa Iemitsu}} , entered the palace and received the title of {{ill|Lady Kasuga|en|Lady Kasuga|WD=Q835747|lt=Kasuga no Tsubone}} .
== Births == * {{ill|Genpō|ja|元豊 (宋)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Genpō|1=Yuanfeng|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10889531}} 5th year ( {{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1082|en|1082|WD=Q19452|lt=1082}} {{ill|November 2|en|November 2|WD=Q2996|lt=November 2}} ) – {{ill|Emperor Huizong of Song|en|Emperor Huizong of Song|WD=Q7486|lt=Huizong}} , the 8th emperor of the {{ill|Northern Song|ja|北宋|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Northern Song|comment=changed title based on wikidata|1=Northern Song dynasty|WD=Q319460}} (died {{ill|1135|en|1135|WD=Q19594|lt=1135}} ). * {{ill|Kempo (era)|en|Kempo (era)|WD=Q1194251|lt=Kenpo}} 6th year ( {{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1218|en|1218|WD=Q5381|lt=1218}} {{ill|October 30|en|October 30|WD=Q2950|lt=October 30}} ) – {{ill|Emperor Chūkyō|en|Emperor Chūkyō|WD=Q357253|lt=Emperor Chūkō}} , the 85th {{ill|Emperor of Japan|en|Emperor of Japan|WD=Q208233|lt=Emperor}} (died {{ill|1234|en|1234|WD=Q5424|lt=1234}} ). * {{ill|Tenpō|en|Tenpō|WD=Q1369045|lt=Tenpō}} 1st year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1830|en|1830|WD=Q7576|lt=1830}} {{ill|November 24|en|November 24|WD=Q3022|lt=November 24}} ) – {{ill|Seikawa Hachirō|ja|清河八郎|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Seikawa Hachirō|1=Kiyokawa Hachirō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q129812}} , founder of the Mibu rōshitai (the precursor to the {{ill|Shinsengumi|en|Shinsengumi|WD=Q221031|lt=Shinsengumi}} ) (died {{ill|1863|en|1863|WD=Q7701|lt=1863}} ). * {{ill|Dōkō|ja|道光|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Dōkō|1=Daoguang Era|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1133186}} 15th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1835|en|1835|WD=Q7597|lt=1835}} {{ill|November 29|en|November dynasty|en|Qing dynasty|WD=Q8733|lt=Qing Dynasty}} (died {{ill|1908|en|1908|WD=Q2056|lt=1908}} ). * {{ill|Tenpō|en|Tenpō|WD=Q1369045|lt=Tenpō}} 13th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1842|en|1842|WD=Q7625|lt=1842}} {{ill|November 12|en|November 12|WD=Q2986|lt=November 12}} ) – {{ill|Ōyama ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1719|en|1719|WD=Q6902|lt=1719}} {{ill|November 21|en|November 21|WD=Q3023|lt=November 21}} ) – {{ill|Yamamoto Tsunetomo|en|Yamamoto Tsunetomo|WD=Q548162|lt=Yamamoto Tsuna}} , a {{ill|samurai|ja|Samurai|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/samurai|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to サムライ|1=Samurai|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q529624}} (born {{ill|1659|en|1659|WD=Q6995|lt=1659}} ). * {{ill|Enkyō|1=Enkyō|2=ja|3=延享|lt=Enkyō|ja|Enkyō|1=Enkyō (Edo {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=十月初十|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 10월 10일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar October|qq=}} '''October 10''' is the 10th day of month {{ill|October (Lunisolar)|ja|10月 (旧暦)|lt=October (Kannazuki)|1=Kannazuki|2=ja|3=10月 (旧暦)|1=Kannazuki|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/October (Lunisolar)|13=User:Immanuelle/Kannazuki|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} the 10th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Senshū|WD=Q96759839|1=senshū}}{{efn|ja|先勝|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}{{efn|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senshō|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Eiroku|en|Eiroku|WD=Q1143341|lt=Eiroku|1=Eiroku}} 10th year ( {{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1567|en|1567|WD=Q6642|lt=1567|1=1567}} {{ill|November 10|en|November 10|WD=Q2988|lt=November 10|1=November 10}} ) – In the {{ill|Todai-ji Daibutsuden Battle|ja|東大寺大仏殿の戦い|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Todai-ji Daibutsuden Battle|1=Battle of Tōdai-ji Daibutsuden|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11526465}} , due to a surprise attack by {{ill|Matsunaga Hisahide|en|Matsunaga Hisahide|WD=Q1143038|lt=Matsunaga Hisahide|1=Matsunaga Hisahide}} , the {{ill|Todai-ji Daibutsuden|ja|東大寺大仏殿|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Todai-ji Daibutsuden|1=Great Buddha Hall|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q3012032}} burned down. * {{ill|Tenshō (Momoyama period)|en|Tenshō (Momoyama period)|WD=Q1145058|lt=Tenshō Era|1=Tenshō (Momoyama period)}} 5th year ( {{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1577|en|1577|WD=Q6704|lt=1577|1=1577}} {{ill|November 19|en|November 19|WD=Q3026|lt=November 19|1=November 19}} ) – In the {{ill|Siege of Shigisan|en|Siege of Shigisan|WD=Q6132231|lt=Shigisan Castle Battle|1=Siege of Shigisan}} , {{ill|Matsunaga Hisahide|en|Matsunaga Hisahide|WD=Q1143038|lt=Matsunaga Hisahide|1=Matsunaga Hisahide}} shattered the famed weapon {{ill|Kotenyō Heipingumo|ja|古天明平蜘蛛|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kotenyō Heipingumo|1=Kotenmyō Hiragumo|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11411022}} and subsequently committed suicide. * {{ill|Kan'ei|en|Kan'ei|WD=Q1192913|lt=Kanei|1=Kan'ei}} 6th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1629|en|1629|WD=Q6847|lt=1629|1=1629}} {{ill|November 24|en|November 24|WD=Q3022|lt=November 24|1=November 24}} ) – Fuku, the wet nurse of {{ill|Tokugawa Iemitsu|en|Tokugawa Iemitsu|WD=Q314481|lt=Tokugawa Iemitsu|1=Tokugawa Iemitsu}} , entered the palace and received the title of {{ill|Lady Kasuga|en|Lady Kasuga|WD=Q835747|lt=Kasuga no Tsubone|1=Lady Kasuga}} .

{{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=十月初十|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 10월 10일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar October|qq=}} '''October 10''' is the 10th day of month {{ill|October (Lunisolar)|ja|10月 (旧暦)|lt=October (Kannazuki)|1=Kannazuki|2=ja|3=10月 (旧暦)|1=Kannazuki|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/October (Lunisolar)|13=User:Immanuelle/Kannazuki|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} the 10th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Senshū|WD=Q96759839|1=senshū}}{{efn|ja|先勝|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}{{efn|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senshō|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}} .
